name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The difference heaven makes today
body:
Is heaven a real place or just a state of mind?
Imagine you’re planning a move to a new country
| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e636861122914c60852968da17afc501&_e=M95cAIIY2rJSj7R_LdarXYfKpUf53oGfOOezjgEOH1bY9elxfm65cVHZacDzsB4E09KaV5guDYiEvLqOkCKIbPaHAX6WaVwM_Q1g_sG1V2vdlBMk_zvmeMgLrvHYKRW7eTYVNfk-uqISIHdkxXQ9Z1H76LMKXTopi-n1xBisFd5TADrcn4jupxISLZOWLYctCcyej50mnoHN0udULk2_MpoMWmI4SR17S12x8OrvFRi3buZElH1dvE-BkjEEEjNY0tC8BX-89ZcwS8Pfhst9SA-omQM4w0ITWVv-n-7_55zc3veCXMCzlfYT29DTde647mNYPCAXwT53k5PAu1gGDOJIZCyZTCPhLpCB0AjYqlnzXZjxNIbPAWKYAmpUz1A5uCtPQ-0Pl7B2tvu5hJuxy38fO0TFlQQd2KcFUfAf_-c%3D)
---
Hello Peter,

Imagine you're planning a move to a new country--a faraway place you've never visited before. Wouldn't you want to know everything you could about it--what the culture is like, the language, the climate, and most importantly, how to get there? It would make a huge difference in how you prepare for the journey!

As Christians, we know that one day we will leave this world and be united with God in heaven. But surprisingly, many of us know very little about what awaits us in that incredible place.
---
| | In my book _A Place Called Heaven_ , I dive into Scripture to answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, including:

* Is heaven a real place or just a state of mind?
* Will we know our loved ones when we get there?
* Do people in heaven know what's happening on earth?
* What difference does a future heaven make in our lives today?

---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e636861122914c60852968da17afc501&_e=M95cAIIY2rJSj7R_LdarXYfKpUf53oGfOOezjgEOH1bY9elxfm65cVHZacDzsB4E09KaV5guDYiEvLqOkCKIbPaHAX6WaVwM_Q1g_sG1V2vdlBMk_zvmeMgLrvHYKRW7eTYVNfk-uqISIHdkxXQ9Z1H76LMKXTopi-n1xBisFd5TADrcn4jupxISLZOWLYctCcyej50mnoHN0udULk2_MpoMWmI4SR17S12x8OrvFRi3buZElH1dvE-BkjEEEjNYHMGRJTc9bf6bzPMWc8biqTZOP-wT2rlqSfvSEdfxg1TxPrkHT_n8OHaZG48HbJBbz_MsPPjlY9K-53XjPVMWDJZfKQ7jseYP8qQa7ZPu9S8Zs4i4n91aLVjqPFXnxCiG7gr8_L-uhhnOy9EM34424V374X8BO8rBcsj7qCvMrR4%3D)
---
| | I know many of us have asked these questions at some point. Understanding what the Bible says about our eternal home doesn't just satisfy our curiosity--it transforms how we live today. By shifting our focus from the temporary struggles of this life to the eternal glory that awaits us, we can live with greater hope, purpose, and peace.

To thank you for your generous gift to _Pathway to Victory_ today, I'd love to send you a copy of _A Place Called Heaven_ , [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e636861122914c60852968da17afc501&_e=M95cAIIY2rJSj7R_LdarXYfKpUf53oGfOOezjgEOH1bY9elxfm65cVHZacDzsB4E09KaV5guDYiEvLqOkCKIbPaHAX6WaVwM_Q1g_sG1V2vdlBMk_zvmeMgLrvHYKRW7eTYVNfk-uqISIHdkxXQ9Z1H76LMKXTopi-n1xBisFd5TADrcn4jupxISLZOWLYctCcyej50mnoHN0udULk2_MpoMWmI4SR17S12x8OrvFRi3buZElH1dvE-BkjEEEjNYfsCUNMOFqMjg-8Q5KMgz5os_6hxfpo30cRc_mHrw7avqyfDU-eW21U6UTMkJ4528sj7N559GV3sNxvITTwaXTb6RsBmMQrWlfqar4SNeN6894_S_BMn9JPp3avIdeIU4V4_pbWVRuxOCXZx8t1Xf0m-JSaKNWJn1kednhZ7nJNE%3D)

I hope this book will give you a clearer picture of the future God has prepared for you and help you live each day with eternity in mind.

Thank you for your continued support, which helps us spread the gospel of Jesus Christ to a world in need of hope.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - For your gift of $75 or more, we'll send you _A Place Called Heaven_ , the beautiful gift book _Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven_ , our exclusive ministry brochure, and the companion message series on DVD and MP3 audio. Click here to get a copy of this spiritually uplifting bundle: [https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-large-kit-1](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e636861122914c60852968da17afc501&_e=M95cAIIY2rJSj7R_LdarXZmzEqkOrlKEOuItEC9F_ZkHLqwZZrzPpgVyKjiokgXV2lr9nmD7BtOwzMa4Z8yGvBi-6yEmxuHVjM2J1xbYaXJYJWOImPOnYl-BL5DgF0BkKpqlDFga0suRjqPHYzKuQBNlMwFsl0ltgziUgVnzKXAz0oCF-Ey3qZBtBv7fnbsUdf5rA4QJIy-KDS7gIutC3lmR-vvyO8bfNn5iWD9KRujxf2nA_hcX4G8-i13XNuun_0HArp3jOtq8iq-1BYnVMv3VfTxRhCwn0E13CNlnHE8iAQtXhdqUosVBzRfbMz8DNWuujMAFItIAvyaSwCBY7uizE0A3L8IEXM9i2qoBA_jS8pEaGcPTrcY5P45ME6O8FP8refn93hmXTMjcefgWrlTfzzFc0-9OdMrEvZoujyseDZGEvnpAyZPOhUqwEdl2)

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Personal and Urgent Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.| | |

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cac400386faf43eca19f776a3033e128&_e=fRHljfNcUBKIcBa9_MWc9O45GGmzx6RHiRc6nJZ0BZyDoAMrAlvl0DMNIgCY3DpRxkSu4sSdiyBcP6YuAL5txbpMHbsA2kKYC2vouZnymekUPlP2_whjo9KsJbPEZIeGKI382UBLwRlYO1TZRIKM5f-zbWJzrhfAGLmnucnRgDC_ahbQ4HG6D_A_NRism9PXm_mTr4LxCFhDWlolhzWoGaMp8zpRFDJqCP9s8yCGF0K-iXQ09KmlFonjgIOSO6qjl0SfW9ip_RiM6sCJiVJ3wKs24FijyoWVk7M0UVo9zMH_na5HqP4OTqGQShl5CYzpY_q4IJvqh1C5HEHu4KCjesINGEQ-Qng_KBuSkNDoHNNEqVM_0wVksbOByx8TZc6sw5eBwosrrR0mQNImKor6QOLohha9g3y0wE7r6EH0F9I%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cac400386faf43eca19f776a3033e128&_e=fRHljfNcUBKIcBa9_MWc9O45GGmzx6RHiRc6nJZ0BZyDoAMrAlvl0DMNIgCY3DpRxkSu4sSdiyBcP6YuAL5txbpMHbsA2kKYC2vouZnymekUPlP2_whjo9KsJbPEZIeGKI382UBLwRlYO1TZRIKM5f-zbWJzrhfAGLmnucnRgDC_ahbQ4HG6D_A_NRism9PXm_mTr4LxCFhDWlolhzWoGaMp8zpRFDJqCP9s8yCGF0K-iXQ09KmlFonjgIOSO6qjaGWZcNI7boJpfXWxVYwcPRVScABalWp96w2fG7yr_oYGWUIuAdUn4ZlILfi2YdWhZYJuR0cYesiGZcgVLhy3tNIbviOSYG4jz6eMgQtwpFT5VqyWGBxJHVl2qtigZV3DVhFhHwMLUGDbtcpPE-dCQprlZox7brHssWzwah8f7s0%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cac400386faf43eca19f776a3033e128&_e=fRHljfNcUBKIcBa9_MWc9O45GGmzx6RHiRc6nJZ0BZyDoAMrAlvl0DMNIgCY3DpRxkSu4sSdiyBcP6YuAL5txbpMHbsA2kKYC2vouZnymekUPlP2_whjo9KsJbPEZIeGKI382UBLwRlYO1TZRIKM5f-zbWJzrhfAGLmnucnRgDC_ahbQ4HG6D_A_NRism9PXm_mTr4LxCFhDWlolhzWoGaMp8zpRFDJqCP9s8yCGF0K-iXQ09KmlFonjgIOSO6qj-cj6Wn59mbR7N9Z2WSEmz3dMfOCIs9-yvL4Kh3zBXKvVKbSXT7IGp5TdxWjP6DEXWMBIlzh8Pc-nUBv9TXmCelOjvLuUaBr69u4yUD4s1ExVWu8gEuK78TGEfiHvxrNnAdwpKuNUQFzLE71vjwgFYS2GmQU4RiiLza5A3KKUQh0%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cac400386faf43eca19f776a3033e128&_e=fRHljfNcUBKIcBa9_MWc9O45GGmzx6RHiRc6nJZ0BZyDoAMrAlvl0DMNIgCY3DpRxkSu4sSdiyBcP6YuAL5txbpMHbsA2kKYC2vouZnymekUPlP2_whjo9KsJbPEZIeGKI382UBLwRlYO1TZRIKM5f-zbWJzrhfAGLmnucnRgDC_ahbQ4HG6D_A_NRism9PXm_mTr4LxCFhDWlolhzWoGaMp8zpRFDJqCP9s8yCGF0K-iXQ09KmlFonjgIOSO6qjCjnCHu_hzzRBKgi5q6THfzj2xlY8FpzebGvorRGwnz-0PEf_Pdu_wHlyLXlQTj5wxAFtIlTUEh64XGUxhlsWv8x84auYBC1plbzqav3N3zgfwbZjXgbjt14dOIxE_J04MW3rQh9NtZSVBZxrwwk0e3gL9YZPOeFD38ITAV3qfFs%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

| | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cac400386faf43eca19f776a3033e128&_e=fRHljfNcUBKIcBa9_MWc9O45GGmzx6RHiRc6nJZ0BZyDoAMrAlvl0DMNIgCY3DpRxkSu4sSdiyBcP6YuAL5txbpMHbsA2kKYC2vouZnymekUPlP2_whjo9KsJbPEZIeGKI382UBLwRlYO1TZRIKM5f-zbWJzrhfAGLmnucnRgDC_ahbQ4HG6D_A_NRism9PXm_mTr4LxCFhDWlolhzWoGaMp8zpRFDJqCP9s8yCGF0K-iXQ09KmlFonjgIOSO6qjqz6Rh-DbNNulvSAaWO7FY-7ihailg0DL8n2rbHMrdOGEDDDlGYcGMSbpAFEFns8pDA1uWAgUHXsDAOvPUDBkgETvNhBCWC7SMVAxtV7akNtWeS-FRAE4JmF2HEIGoPcYRhhClDL_nB1rINOkz-tUxfnqSKo19I2BStplXSZ6tfQ%3D)**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: What happened when I tried to call Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I promised I would not do this all the time, and I won't. But I did want to share a few short clips from my podcast that I thought you might be interested in.
What I saw on the campaign trail:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4037?t=1&akid=2286%2E4767699%2EgzXbBE)
What happened when I tried to call Trump post-election:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4038?t=2&akid=2286%2E4767699%2EgzXbBE)
Mark Cuban on the impact of retaliatory tariffs:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4039?t=3&akid=2286%2E4767699%2EgzXbBE)
An interview with Demi Lovato about child stardom and a bill I signed to protect kids in that situation from financial abuse:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4040?t=4&akid=2286%2E4767699%2EgzXbBE)
And, non-podcast related, a clip from our post election Zoom call with more than 50,000 people where I talked about what we are doing in California to prepare for the second Trump administration along with what we can expect to see during his presidency:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4035?t=5&akid=2286%2E4767699%2EgzXbBE)
[**And please subscribe to our campaign YouTube channel here.**](https://www.youtube.com/@Campaign-for-Democracy?source=em241203-1)
[SUBSCRIBE TODAY](https://www.youtube.com/@Campaign-for-Democracy?source=em241203-1)
Thanks,
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=2286%2E4767699%2EgzXbBE).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk
subject: Where we are
body:
Only hours left... | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98117233/515623064/59579377?sourceid=1150076&utm_campaign=25emkge-1119aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=6xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzg0YWJlYi1kNWIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsknHlUUI2yW9hEmGfhMTNiPKSvhPc0Hgg2DsoBiWH4=&emci=84bd0eaa-f6ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=1784abeb-d5b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)
---
Peter—

[**Time is running out! | | Over 5 million seniors across America each year face the threat of hunger. **It's going to take all of us stepping up to make sure they get through the winter season.** [**Today, on Giving Tuesday, please join me in supporting Meals on Wheels. Our donations**** _will save lives_****during the holidays.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98117305/515623767/122331349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGI2ZDEzMy1kNmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RhlDRQwrs45kMZPfVS27KEgPs8FLi8Dt6_ormICHis=&emci=8ec12c8c-cab1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=24b6d133-d6b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=9818364) Recently, I had the opportunity to join Meals on Wheels People to deliver meals to seniors around the Portland area. The volunteers at Meals on Wheels in Portland and nationwide are doing the hard work day in and day out to ensure seniors have food on the table, especially during the holidays. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98117306/515623768/122331349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGI2ZDEzMy1kNmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RhlDRQwrs45kMZPfVS27KEgPs8FLi8Dt6_ormICHis=&emci=8ec12c8c-cab1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=24b6d133-d6b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=9818364) My entire career, I've been proud to be an advocate for our nation's seniors. That was my commitment when I helped found the Oregon Gray Panthers, and it's something I always fight for with my work in Congress. And _today_ , our seniors need _all of us._ Thanks to Meals on Wheels, nearly 2 million volunteers deliver meals to seniors facing the threat of hunger in almost every community in America. But unfortunately, Meals on Wheels is underfunded. Eighty percent of low-income, food-insecure seniors are not receiving the home-delivered meals they need. A hot meal in tough times is about more than just food on the table – it's a life-saving dignity and a connection to the community that we must not overlook. **Seniors in our community, our neighbors in their golden years, are going hungry**** _right now_****. I'm calling on all of us to support people who have already given us**** _so_****much. **[**Chip in today to Meals on Wheels, and let's keep our seniors afloat during this difficult time**.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98117307/515623769/122331349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGI2ZDEzMy1kNmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RhlDRQwrs45kMZPfVS27KEgPs8FLi8Dt6_ormICHis=&emci=8ec12c8c-cab1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=24b6d133-d6b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=9818364) Onward, _Ron_ [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98117308/515623770/122331349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGI2ZDEzMy1kNmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RhlDRQwrs45kMZPfVS27KEgPs8FLi8Dt6_ormICHis=&emci=8ec12c8c-cab1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=24b6d133-d6b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=9818364) |

clean_body: | | | | Over 5 million seniors across America each year face the threat of hunger. It's going to take all of us stepping up to make sure they get through the winter season. Recently, I had the opportunity to join Meals on Wheels People to deliver meals to seniors around the Portland area. The volunteers at Meals on Wheels in Portland and nationwide are doing the hard work day in and day out to ensure seniors have food on the table, especially during the holidays. My entire career, I've been proud to be an advocate for our nation's seniors. That was my commitment when I helped found the Oregon Gray Panthers, and it's something I always fight for with my work in Congress. And today , our seniors need all of us. Thanks to Meals on Wheels, nearly 2 million volunteers deliver meals to seniors facing the threat of hunger in almost every community in America. But unfortunately, Meals on Wheels is underfunded. Eighty percent of low-income, food-insecure seniors are not receiving the home-delivered meals they need. A hot meal in tough times is about more than just food on the table – it's a life-saving dignity and a connection to the community that we must not overlook. Seniors in our community, our neighbors in their golden years, are going hungry right now. I'm calling on all of us to support people who have already given us somuch. Onward, Ron | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Devin
subject: Peter, 15 Amazing Nonprofits Fighting Trump’s Agenda! 🥳
body:
Not sure what’s next? My 15 fav nonprofits will help you connect with your tribe and protect the vulnerable, our rights, and our democracy. | | | | | |
---
[](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=38d2d1b8df&e=10cc7d1928)
| | | | |
---
| Hi Peter,This election was a gut punch and I’ve found it hard to process. Maybe you have, too. I’m in contact with several democratic groups and one thing I’m hearing consistently is that**it’s important to find community.**
Even if it’s all you do, find your tribe and begin to discuss where we are and where we’re going.
I’ve put together this [ACTION GUIDE](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=808cab31f1&e=10cc7d1928) to help you do that and much more. It’s a **simple, one-page, carefully curated list of absolutely amazing organizations**.

---
[](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=bf7941fc7a&e=10cc7d1928)
| From helping you **find a local chapter of activists to connecting you with outstanding independent, investigative journalism and fact-checkers** , this [ACTION GUIDE](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=926ca344d3&e=10cc7d1928) gives you what you need to join the critical movement to defend the vulnerable, protect our rights, and preserve our democracy.

We have more power than you may think and these organization will be fighting the good fight, every day. **They give me hope!**
As grim as things may seem right now, it’s in times like these the most beautiful, amazing things happen. **Hope Heroes everywhere are dusting themselves off and beginning the work of bringing people together. Hope is stirring and love will crowd out hate in America.** It won’t be easy, but facing down tyrants is in our DNA.
[**Click here to see our list of 15 “Hope Hero” organizations and find your place in this movement**!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=843176f132&e=10cc7d1928)
Onward!
\- Devin
_There’s an adage a historian once called ‘a law of history,’ true of every society across the ages. The adage is: ‘Only when it is dark enough, can you see the stars.’_ \- Kamala Harris

---
[VISIT THE ACTION GUIDE!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=4733de10f7&e=10cc7d1928)

subject: Thanks to Kash, I stood up to the Deep State
body:
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=65bc85f549de4b74813a86fc124f9c4e&_e=sKeErHH-3n6TLe5GyaHFUvojRhWu1-Q6CTZYmXXEW8B-2jVNAnuUdzUSvoIHlbi20JkIr1K5r1mPa4ycFoWo8tTf9QQL0N1mNvqSaczSz-OKy_N46984xw4dS24FD2KX9ziTPPvMpVqZxGAqn8SCp1W8qeS6S4zPxzDx4QgZlaCIhYPqGvQON3mnIezNt6JqasNzmTYltEywCpc8085ymkEJ_2Y9o89JlpQcU6Ksfsmkea3YyXHZknpcpkGtaAWUvFq5sDQkoZySSmsU8AVNCoqiwvbw2pZQPsiWRftl9SFND1DEl9x_JsMkGI5wfu7nvPJY5opX74SU6KUjuZAKBmtfOV9eXy5GBoMmaP_iPO4%3D)

Patriot,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=65bc85f549de4b74813a86fc124f9c4e&_e=sKeErHH-3n6TLe5GyaHFUvojRhWu1-Q6CTZYmXXEW8B-2jVNAnuUdzUSvoIHlbi20JkIr1K5r1mPa4ycFoWo8tTf9QQL0N1mNvqSaczSz-OKy_N46984xw4dS24FD2KX9ziTPPvMpVqZxGAqn8SCpy3gevBH0e_nWeuOzS9oJ_KFsUENRupB2uleAVw4fwPMXg91uP-r7lYRKofW4fxtCFd0cNWR75Hhb6BndIGqSLmYqJYPQXiinDep-adn-RGlHdD37d8-n0gcKHw0ZQ8SlfJ2NQkUGaP219o95xXOEQRDYM6nLJayyzMVH_qpbROiVCF5DY93qv5DJqgzSR4OO3YiCaBxThwQJxMVEEKLNrA%3D)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Wa92HL_BkIlWfk6z-xz1IQIIP3mFnu1nUNwxKksZfEs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152544487)
Dear friends,
I hope this finds you well. I want to take a moment to say how much your engagement and support mean to me. Running this publication is a labor of love, but let me tell you--it is also a lot of work!
I am a one-person team. Every article you read, every argument I craft, every fact I verify, every podcast I script, and every video I record, edit, and post--it all comes from hours of research, writing, edits, revisions, and dedication.
My goal is simple: to address the critical human rights issues that define our time and provide you with the insights, clarity, and tools to engage meaningfully with the world around us, and work to right the wrongs we see in front of us.
But here's the thing: for us to grow and reach more people, we need support and resources. I cannot do this alone. That's where you come in.
I am asking you to consider upgrading to a paid subscription. How much? A cup of coffee, once a month, i.e. $6/month. Your support will help me cover essential costs like research tools, platform fees, the sheer time spent creating this content to advance human rights, and--hopefully soon--hire researchers and writers to expand our reach and impact. With your help, we can build something even bigger, better, and farther reaching.
And by subscribing, you do something else critically important. You help ensure my writing and advocacy remains free and accessible to all those who may not have the means to upgrade to a paid subscription. I don't believe in paywalls, and I'm hopeful you can help ensure my content continues to remain accessible and sustainable.
We know 2025 and beyond are going to be a terrible four years (at least) for human rights. Now is the time to act and stand united. Together, we can amplify our message, speak truth to power, and continue fighting for justice. Let's make it happen. We can, if we work together.
Thank you for believing in me, for trusting in me, and for being part of this journey.
With gratitude,
Qasim
**Thank you for becoming a paid subscriber. Please enter your email below and pick the right level that works for you.**

body:
Please take advantage of this exclusive Giving Tuesday match opportunity before midnight!
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT*](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
I know how much you care about supporting the heroes in uniform who sacrifice so much for our country. But do you know that you can have your essential support DOUBLED by making a gift to the USO today?
**Today is Giving Tuesday, and in support of this day of giving, our generous partners at Jeep® are MATCHING all gifts up to a total of $125,000 to help us reach our $500,000 goal before midnight.**
As thousands of service members brace themselves for a holiday season without loved ones, family dinners or gifts under the Christmas tree, we're counting on caring supporters like YOU to take advantage of this offer. **[Will you make a MATCHED donation of $29 or more before midnight to help us connect service members with their families, send them care packages and provide them with warm holiday meals year-round?](https://links.e.uso.)**

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: We must be ready for 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The power grabs are already underway. And there's more coming -- in the courts, in state legislatures, in Congress. We desperately need resources to respond.
Please, folks: We know we're all stung by the election results, but we need everyone to step up and RUSH $25 or more to meet our $50,000 goal to defend voting rights across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120324_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120324_2&amount=25]
Team,
Giving Tuesday is right around the corner, and we cannot think of a better gift for everyone than protecting our right to vote.
We're not going to lie -- we know things look bleak. Opponents of voting rights had a good Election Day. We're staring down the barrel of more suppressive policies. That's no reason to give up, however, and we can't afford to throw our hands up and obey in advance. Not with the court cases, state bills, new laws, special elections, and so much more on the horizon.
We've set our goal to raise $50,000 from grassroots donors to help mobilize and defend voting rights before state legislative sessions start next year.
Will you chip in $25 or more to help reach our must-hit $50,000 fundraising goal before December 31? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120324_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120324_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120324_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120324_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120324_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120324_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120324_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project was founded to expand mail-in ballot access during the pandemic.
When voting rights were threatened in the wake of the 2020 election, we mobilized to fight back against the wave of voter suppression that swept across the country with more than 400 bills in 49 of 50 states.
Since then we've been on the front lines of every battle for our right to vote, from Congressional legislation to court cases to voter registration to voter turnout in the last two elections. We've helped countless voters register, find their polling place, get informed about the issues, and make their ballot count.
Simply put: There's no way we're giving up now. Not for a second. Not ever.
Team -- to accomplish these goals we need everyone with us. Fuel our efforts for Giving Tuesday and more with $25 or whatever you can give today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120324_2&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120324_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120324_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120324_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120324_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=acxTYiqJ%2FNF54l4aIBXSifeZFdQ5SjcG%2Ffislgpq229013OxQw%2BgpHJ%2FtaeDYf26XqvVF%2F1yvpmNGrii5uxi4o5uhxKPXXdF%2Fsc43wn0ZTIFVo29uGGH0nzghzzcgyeqz%2B1np%2Bo8IlrjRZ%2BcUsXZ8vJjMNn7ofIMXWlbMDnpBcLSq1WJy3n65tUb49D2DO8EfSa2JXRSiQRv9hjUkkkZO0cxVBLRsG8ZP0oW93uN3TvgE%2FARL49GinLSIJ8jLUojpy7sT%2FOk4E1QpiFLYzDm1Vw2uWwscccAGwklwBusFiN30w3ftPAkyaaS8u1MyKZQJnqjHsG9bIJsKnmQ40OvWuZ5CINIyEH5YlfwzuLk6Gc7GEM3oqBQ2L8aNzjTsWi3oY7Qg9NjoSItn0nPzfJvIxN0Mos%2F8aH88%2B3xHIdJudw%3D .

name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Every special election marks a chance to protect or expand Democratic power in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. | | |
---
| |
---|---
$7. That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** _Seven_ special elections are on the horizon in states like Delaware, Louisiana, and Virginia – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** Every special election marks a chance to protect or gain Democratic seats in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. **Reason #3:** State legislatures have an important role to play in protecting access to the ballot box, abortion rights, and more – $7 helps elect leaders who will stand up to the ultra-extreme MAGA agenda in our statehouses. [So what do you say? Will you donate $7 today to help elect state Democrats nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNDdVqdt3XmlEmIYOTNwZd_V4m5Yvoq10lHY_L8YgxBfPieDZATmgMqr9jbNT3S-KJ6QDxGJRcFr2R6czFBg0j3iGJYgtsbywRzrHP9EDxNeNkp0W3KEweyVBLgJi4QQYtcMWg_-DLuCSjSE1EcP9wgiE-Pncu9_z1_VeHIjSd84mJa5LK5bY-NYXmYn3phGL6WzJ99fwQyb8I0hSk0Dn2BXRM6Ej2XFKfj9zNiamcwAY9eaXw-h2FV-P4diMhJe3tTAQnVAxyeiv02zcVPqbNIB7SElvQL3Z3X97cqRgNHi_hZjmkIuaFO1YfXy7zcFx8A/4c0/sN5Sk5T0SlK_JoRSmBn1eg/h0/h001.caTcI5UVchMOKtOP9B3ibydiFkP09atwIduy0F_mZoM) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Peter, 2024 has been nothing short of historic for Republicans.

This was the year we fired Joe Biden, and put America back on the path to greatness!

To celebrate this incredible year, we're offering our exclusive **[2024 Commemorative Ornament](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0734205149af4cfd878c06fffd14493a&_e=UPRVea8fyxCcym3nlIo6LTtkOTOml-2vLRz1I3BnS_UclrNFhAjNMaZXFomtuBq3dvNeX0-f589ZqlCIq00SHK1lJvNyFbp-HXoleqNz73-6GidTqJs7NX9JDbdB6rPNof3Xd9a2xyF-pIoYvbEMQfGSwqiiXwHwyg1S622aFyYsi8C3fopshVcotWQRUHL636uT4OqGtSTzKtQqh8RPw3jFzpuY4qhLKePQuVIo_nNRL5-1MNfXn6x5PvwZ4FNW2N_CHlRjMfY-75g5dXhplt_ABeYxkNPoO2Y9x5e_Enc0akPNL1P3YK-Yi-ozOaBzV6h00JAK1DSnhaajCsWlxNLBIv31kNQM1IUdZau0mukqAiDO6hy9RPIPB8yAzX8kehvbhEYhmvZvpoo7uRWgieVWfxQRCzTU7l7jsF3D2wHLjs-G2-n_C1Xqtt_plu9MAqrOiU0AX6PyXl2VLhZMEA%3D%3D "2024 Commemorative Ornament")** to our most dedicated supporters like you.

With your help, Republicans achieved victories that will define the future of our country, restoring conservative leadership to the White House and holding our control in Congress.

name: MAGA Alert
subject: This is THE END of the Deep State.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Overhaul PAC
body:
_“ON DAY ONE I’LL SHUT DOWN THE FBI HOVER BUILDING... AND REOPEN
IT AS A MUSEUM OF THE DEEP STATE”_

WOW!

Trump's new FBI pick is making waves.

In case you missed it Trump nominated Kash Patel to be our next FBI
Director.

This is MASSIVE!

And it has the Left sweating.

They know that he’s going to END the rampant corruption and return
our country to the American people.

We just have one BIG PROBLEM!

He needs to be confirmed by the Senate first.

It would only take 3 RINOs in the Senate to stop his appointment and
any other of Trump's picks..

So we need to keep the pressure on them to GET THE JOB DONE!

It’s not enough to just win an election, we have to MAGA.

And that means appointing every one of Trump's nominees.

We have to make sure Republicans who just won DO THEIR JOBS and DRAIN
THE SWAMP!

Because if Trump can’t rely on the Senate to get patriots like Kash
appointed, then we won for nothing.

Any RINO Republican that refuses to help Trump MAGA needs to lose
their seat.

It’s that simple.

And we need your help to keep them in check.

Without the commitment of voters like you to get rid of FAKE
CONSERVATIVES, the MAGA movement could be dead in the water.

PLEASE, sign this petition now and pledge to hold the Senate
accountable:

We have to put every RINO on notice.

If you get in the way of MAGA, YOU’RE GONE!

ADD YOUR NAME

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e326a1cffa7946ed94546c894abcbaf2&_e=Xu-P112z8wGR6Io40YVNUpZTAxvWEp11Gbu_ey3dLreCVw9up5_lCwQ2eVTZNWh0miUwVyC7ZvEbevCmLEHjf3QeU_Pjl8suTjvFuuqFsKGJkAIJ2h3yLl9kN8IjeV5dygz1eMxlzqK5wSE1_adwk2Lc-slRrrq5tUIj3feW0cBlfRa215b_h3LcfsgyPeafy_lYUHVZ1wkxfQUF-NPFwbV6D3r8M8CLhfDCg2o3USXXeaduioGoHh71lFzE-ka1uNtEFWMW7a27FB2Atu_Lr-XaaJ6rxsSD-LmMP_1j_x7OtAbpNft6AOPIzIiF6mv-sESM3ymstHY8Y60QzsSXz-D5Q-EA4FgJrRvoeQn0-ktDatl9gx7wzAaAy0etBQFW74cabpc1svc5N5dCqdtJgA%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e326a1cffa7946ed94546c894abcbaf2&_e=Xu-P112z8wGR6Io40YVNUpZTAxvWEp11Gbu_ey3dLreCVw9up5_lCwQ2eVTZNWh0miUwVyC7ZvEbevCmLEHjf3QeU_Pjl8suTjvFuuqFsKGJkAIJ2h3yLl9kN8IjeV5dygz1eMxlzqK5wSE1_adwk2Lc-slRrrq5tUIj3feW0cBlfRa215b_h3LcfsgyPeafy_lYUHVZ1wkxfQUF-NPFwbV6D3r8M8CLhfDCg2o3USXXeaduioGoHh71lFzE-ka1UMrKCxZRZAEmFlGgCdLigFgrkS1TXWNN7OnRXxnM3mOLtO243T2BFMBbvnicB-K3g7f0RmGmP8f6VP5U2PajuwNdYS4LUHzTYuChbThdEueMWkWkJiYOcGd5vHfpxu-VgGgqe0M83ZjVxYpbpQmbWg%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e326a1cffa7946ed94546c894abcbaf2&_e=Xu-P112z8wGR6Io40YVNUpZTAxvWEp11Gbu_ey3dLreCVw9up5_lCwQ2eVTZNWh0miUwVyC7ZvEbevCmLEHjf3QeU_Pjl8suTjvFuuqFsKGJkAIJ2h3yLl9kN8IjeV5dygz1eMxlzqK5wSE1_adwk2Lc-slRrrq5tUIj3feW0cBlfRa215b_h3LcfsgyPeafy_lYUHVZ1wkxfQUF-NPFwbV6D3r8M8CLhfDCg2o3USXXeaduioGoHh71lFzE-ka1zk1J_Z8pwG39tsKFinArXbTN5h9SnBljfxAli4t4sG5MSObJp-beMvd0s1Yru53ETS0D1CNBY8UnxdUEori59BOzayTpTcuqQmAQM6Q2kcwpHyw8bsw8-wNkb6dJ5Lk9oioqHYP6khjDoke3XVjPoA%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e326a1cffa7946ed94546c894abcbaf2&_e=Xu-P112z8wGR6Io40YVNUpZTAxvWEp11Gbu_ey3dLreCVw9up5_lCwQ2eVTZNWh0miUwVyC7ZvEbevCmLEHjf3QeU_Pjl8suTjvFuuqFsKGJkAIJ2h3yLl9kN8IjeV5dygz1eMxlzqK5wSE1_adwk2Lc-slRrrq5tUIj3feW0cBlfRa215b_h3LcfsgyPeafy_lYUHVZ1wkxfQUF-NPFwbV6D3r8M8CLhfDCg2o3USXXeaduioGoHh71lFzE-ka161VSIS8F0Ho872xDok8sueFloOYcHv7BnSrUpw4mP_kxhkCQmF-hoPAPmbfNydZ1-LmTbYTlDLypQfmlV9NMuJx40SoyIcwjfSkV9Ty48MaN_m7DLQigSMSHLmByOxAe4YQRo0uFBmDTnHaoDRQEbA%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e326a1cffa7946ed94546c894abcbaf2&_e=Xu-P112z8wGR6Io40YVNUpZTAxvWEp11Gbu_ey3dLreCVw9up5_lCwQ2eVTZNWh0miUwVyC7ZvEbevCmLEHjf3QeU_Pjl8suTjvFuuqFsKGJkAIJ2h3yLl9kN8IjeV5dygz1eMxlzqK5wSE1_adwk2Lc-slRrrq5tUIj3feW0cBlfRa215b_h3LcfsgyPeafy_lYUHVZ1wkxfQUF-NPFwbV6D3r8M8CLhfDCg2o3USXXeaduioGoHh71lFzE-ka1RC4R5bM-WrFXFTepViYsZsBtGqnKbBl38p6cFLRhpLqHqgKlPx2-dCjaAYzxPSrX6C3Mnh8KFNbtvSjq-gVovHoacJ0VmrqGzpUPh6Jh9XzF3JqJoV6EOW-qSAN4IygP-bHvU1q5oe0EXTJClCcONg%3D%3D)

As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

name: sydney@uso.org
subject: FW: I don’t want you to miss this match
body:
Time is running out: Make your matched gift before midnight.
Did you see my message earlier? It's important!
If you haven't had the chance to make a MATCHED* gift to support our service members this Giving Tuesday, it's not too late:
**Every dollar you can give right now will help provide our service members with essential resources and connections to home during the holidays and into the new year -- AND your contribution will be worth twice as much in helping us meet our midnight goal thanks to the matching gift offer from our friends at Jeep®.**
So please: **[Can we count on you to donate $29 or more for Giving Tuesday now and have it go TWICE AS FAR toward helping us reach our $500,000 goal to support our military heroes serving around the world?](https://links.e.uso.)**
Thank you so much for your support.
Sydney Jones, USO
* * *
**From: **Sydney Jones | USO
**Sent: **Tuesday, Dec 3, 2024
**Subject:** Your support for service members will be DOUBLED today
[](https://secure.uso.org/2411_GT_M/)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
I know how much you care about supporting the heroes in uniform who sacrifice so much for our country. But do you know that you can have your essential support DOUBLED by making a gift to the USO today?
**Today is Giving Tuesday, and in support of this day of giving, our generous partners at Jeep® are MATCHING* all gifts up to a total of $125,000 to help us reach our $500,000 goal before midnight.**
As thousands of service members brace themselves for a holiday season without loved ones, family dinners or gifts under the Christmas tree, we're counting on caring supporters like YOU to take advantage of this offer. **[Will you make a MATCHED donation of $29 or more before midnight to help us connect service members with their families, send them care packages and provide them with warm holiday meals year-round?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~8eXC0j3P2fe/YnBvNEZ6TDFQMnAvQVhNaFVhalk5bVduUVhrY2l1VnJLcWdYaFdXNmlMOEJwdVBGa0pnS1M5UWh2SlpHRk1kYzQ1YkltWXY4SHh5SkJIb3ZjNnhqc3lIZGIwaDZuNkZwYS9MT2hJNVNweEU9S0/UnVsYjN1NlRiLy91MThkRUZUcUJwNjVBdFhLc2o0UmhSaVlNMitPYy9Nc2dpQlZzR2NidVRVMVJGUmIxLzcyc3RQWkw4MnVXNGlLRFo5SDlwSTA3aUFOS1JWNmRaeEtTS0)**
[$29 CAN HELP FUND
~~ONE~~ TWO PHONE CALLS HOME](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 CAN HELP FUND
~~ONE~~ TWO WARM HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/q7bgHLygRPS-/YnBvNEZ6TDFQMnAvQVhNaFVhalk5bVduUVhrY2l1VnJLcWdYaFdXNmlMOEJwdVBGa0pnS1M5UWh2SlpHRk1kYzQ1YkltWXY4SHh5SkJIb3ZjNnhqc3lIZGIwaDZuNkZwYS9MT2hJNVNweEU9S0/UnVsYjN1NlRiLy91MThkRUZUcUJwNjVBdFhLc2o0UmhSaVlNMitPYy9Nc2dpQlZzR2NidVRVMVJGUmIxLzcyc3RQWkw4MnVXNGlLRFo5SDlwSTA3aUFOS1JWNmRaeEtTS0)
---
[$150 CAN HELP FUND
~~10~~ 20 HOLIDAY CARE PACKAGES](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you so much for doubling the value of your gift for service members today.
Sydney Jones, USO

body:
This Giving Tuesday, all gifts up to $10k will be matched, and you’ll be entered to win an Owyhee swag package. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121537/515663055/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) **[Give to OLCV today on Giving Tuesday and have your gift matched!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121541/515663063/-1487584020?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) ** Hi Peter, [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121543/515663068/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)There's only 6 hours to go until midnight, and we still need your help to get closer to our goal!. Today, all gifts will be matched by a generous donor. If you make your gift now, you won’t miss this special opportunity to be entered to win an Owyhee swag package, which includes a copy of the Owyhee art book, a shirt, hat, and pin. **[Will you make your contribution now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121545/515663070/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)** We've got a lot of work ahead of us. These next four years we’ve got to make sure that Oregon stands strong against federal threats on our climate and environment. It’s a critical time for us to stand tall and fight for our climate, because the rest of the country is looking to us as an example in 2025. Oregon has been a leader on climate, and we aren’t ready to give that up. [**With your help, we can show what states can do to get us through the next four years.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121547/515663072/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) But why are we fundraising $10k? All the work that’s ahead of us means we need all hands on deck. We’re fundraising not only to ensure we’ve got the funds to empower our legislators and fight for climate legislation, but to uplift our youth and volunteers. **$5,000 is what it takes to engage young climate activists** in OLCV’s work through an innovative youth-led climate campaign. **$2,500 funds a lobby day in Salem** , opening the door for 200 volunteers to meet with lawmakers and advocate in person for our climate and environment. **$1,000 provides us the resources to sponsor an OLCV campaign fellow** to help train the next generation of climate organizers. There are so many possibilities and things to accomplish once we reach our goal! Think of what your contribution will do for our work, volunteers, members, and youth - especially now that your gift will be doubled! [**Will you make your gift of $100 today to have it matched tomorrow? If you’re feeling extra generous, a contribution of $500 will enter you in the Owyhee swag package raffle twice!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121550/515663075/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121553/515663078/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230)** Take a look at OLCV’s Democracy Fellows taking a tour of the Washington County elections office before the 2024 primary! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121556/515663081/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) It will be imperative for us to set the bar high for standing strong for our climate this upcoming year. We never stopped being Oregon’s political arm for the environment, and we aren’t going to stop any time soon. OLCV is committed to making sure Oregon remains the green state that it is. Let’s be a beacon of hope for climate action across the country! I hope you’ll make your contribution to help us reach our goal and get all donations matched by a generous donor. Not to mention, you’ll be entered to win an exclusive Owyhee swag package. Don’t wait. [**Make your mark in the climate movement, and give double today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98121559/515663084/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmQzZDc5LWUzYjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qhfXEVAQxhxZTYpYG3UxmlRLNLDr10AklRvpS2iJeQ4=&emci=415b236b-a9b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=852d3d79-e3b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=2107230) Thank you for your support! Sincere gratitude,
Sarah Kline

clean_body: This Giving Tuesday, all gifts up to $10k will be matched, and you’ll be entered to win an Owyhee swag package. | | | Hi Peter, only 6 hours to go until midnight, and we still need your help to get closer to our goal!. Today, all gifts will be matched by a generous donor. If you make your gift now, you won’t miss this special opportunity to be entered to win an Owyhee swag package, which includes a copy of the Owyhee art book, a shirt, hat, and pin. We've got a lot of work ahead of us. These next four years we’ve got to make sure that Oregon stands strong against federal threats on our climate and environment. It’s a critical time for us to stand tall and fight for our climate, because the rest of the country is looking to us as an example in 2025. Oregon has been a leader on climate, and we aren’t ready to give that up. But why are we fundraising $10k? All the work that’s ahead of us means we need all hands on deck. We’re fundraising not only to ensure we’ve got the funds to empower our legislators and fight for climate legislation, but to uplift our youth and volunteers. $5,000 is what it takes to engage young climate activists in OLCV’s work through an innovative youth-led climate campaign. $2,500 funds a lobby day in Salem , opening the door for 200 volunteers to meet with lawmakers and advocate in person for our climate and environment. $1,000 provides us the resources to sponsor an OLCV campaign fellow to help train the next generation of climate organizers. There are so many possibilities and things to accomplish once we reach our goal! Think of what your contribution will do for our work, volunteers, members, and youth - especially now that your gift will be doubled! Take a look at OLCV’s Democracy Fellows taking a tour of the Washington County elections office before the 2024 primary! It will be imperative for us to set the bar high for standing strong for our climate this upcoming year. We never stopped being Oregon’s political arm for the environment, and we aren’t going to stop any time soon. OLCV is committed to making sure Oregon remains the green state that it is. Let’s be a beacon of hope for climate action across the country! I hope you’ll make your contribution to help us reach our goal and get all donations matched by a generous donor. Not to mention, you’ll be entered to win an exclusive Owyhee swag package. Don’t wait. Thank you for your support! Sincere gratitude, Sarah Kline OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator P.S.: Daunted by a large donation? No worries! You can start giving a manageable amount of $5 a month for Giving Tuesday, and have a larger impact in the climate fight. | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

name: Georgia Young
subject: We’re almost there
body:
Hi Peter,
I just checked with the team on our Giving TREESday progress, and we are so incredibly close to reaching our $100,000 match goal. So far, we’ve raised $61,275. Every dollar will have triple the impact and will go toward purchasing and protecting the Sonoma Coast Redwoods property.
We’re running out of time, and I don’t think I saw your gift come in yet. Can we count on you to give now and get us over the finish line before midnight?
Use this link and I’ll make sure your gift is applied to our 3x match: [**https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/scr-gt**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98122110/515664234/471999250?contactdata=A9yP9UQnKjRUsEUsyVUTYT0vdWl4X6+AcIROqW3oB/Svlqg0KFHE39WnKzKiAWXjyD8sXRnw1hO1Q2XxzPH3wPb8XzLA08Gu0maos3MnelUjmUr8eZiRrV7RlbqydNaO8N13AkqiHOE10Z1fO87xua68cWiTZJYWc5FB23dIeBo=&ms=GT24_EM7_Link1&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiMDkzNzUwLWU0YjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mRgLP15iAAsKN2Rg8dzQ44QVeyQktqJBMSo3wZHdOgc=&emci=518f0273-dcac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=db093750-e4b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)
I know your inbox is probably flooded today, but I don’t want you to miss out on this opportunity. The threat of harmful development that would destroy these unique and incredible forests is too high. We need to act now if we want to save Sonoma Coast Redwoods.
The match expires at midnight, so make sure to get your gift in by then. Thank you for supporting our redwoods forests and taking action to protect them!
[**https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/scr-gt**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98122111/515664235/471999250?contactdata=A9yP9UQnKjRUsEUsyVUTYT0vdWl4X6+AcIROqW3oB/Svlqg0KFHE39WnKzKiAWXjyD8sXRnw1hO1Q2XxzPH3wPb8XzLA08Gu0maos3MnelUjmUr8eZiRrV7RlbqydNaO8N13AkqiHOE10Z1fO87xua68cWiTZJYWc5FB23dIeBo=&ms=GT24_EM7_Link2&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiMDkzNzUwLWU0YjEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mRgLP15iAAsKN2Rg8dzQ44QVeyQktqJBMSo3wZHdOgc=&emci=518f0273-dcac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=db093750-e4b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1504551)
Warmly,
Georgia Young
Director of Development
Save the Redwoods League
111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor
San Francisco, CA 94104
United States
* * *

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun’s Urgent Mission
body:
The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.
It's a voice America needs

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

body:
The fact is that races are getting closer and closer, which means we need to raise funds to support Senate Republicans in purple states. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54874a44ce674e5a893088d67d635559&_e=WC5UkrGKLVksbkHAVY-fuMbUUFESE_9ajyJmAS0XrSVN0gptXxLjAaYWyBMubmWSQIfegTYuR-pnBxnxhaqaO4egac6Yp-tQ98kUiY2QCTYhW-zpWtkW34euNYSZTg1Pl_tRuI9haTn4-dx64PHbtiT3wJSqhIzXTRL5R7XQ3qQJowpYWhPg748vkknFgRCth4DKe-XwLQOPSLkCzwJqJMx_t8rwxtoiUDcz2ZRQP9POzJd3m_3vnkE3xQRglayUthhQK9hCMh764Hg09Dp-POKx3WIidp1HJ-4DoCLGc3lzSw05FloCuW-U-mu36uiGQ2TH2ROA7A1TC6bceTFP9Y6UuvqBDe9Dsw6GvK0JWYiPkLrGwvfhnxWiVDp7t2OU8CyAfExd91hq4e_ofD5XGUVQIS1O1zGHXTtbVF_J8GtANgylXE-s0nU4qLjo7R3OgBJuZKGkQ9Aw9uW_VX_v1w%3D%3D)
[**In Nevada and Wisconsin, the GOP was outspent in advertising by $20 to 25 million. In Arizona, it was $66 million.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54874a44ce674e5a893088d67d635559&_e=WC5UkrGKLVksbkHAVY-fuMbUUFESE_9ajyJmAS0XrSVN0gptXxLjAaYWyBMubmWSQIfegTYuR-pnBxnxhaqaO4egac6Yp-tQ98kUiY2QCTYhW-zpWtkW34euNYSZTg1Pl_tRuI9haTn4-dx64PHbtiT3wJSqhIzXTRL5R7XQ3qQJowpYWhPg748vkknFgRCth4DKe-XwLQOPSLkCzwJqJMx_t8rwxtoiUDcz2ZRQP9POzJd3m_3vnkE3xQRglayUthhQK9hCMh764Hg09Dp-POKx3WIidp1HJ-4DoCLGc3lzSw05FloCuW-U-mu36uiG_EV7UMvrOJ5RlHpZSYn5HCY56WRFhW59V7XrkKpHlKeEnViekubi14naQC8EYE5hbWNrkhyCu9rzufTibSDJtaPusnwfzN0wYutMoAqHVpSsvT4uk-ZXnjb0WxKpnGhE8O4gXXCMvLLfTyvrUIdfYw%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

I know you've already done so much for Senate Republicans as one of our top supporters of the 2024 election cycle, so I hate to ask again, but we can't fall behind again this year.

[**We were just outspent 4 to 1 by Democrats, and if that happens again in 2026, we will likely lose this Senate majority we worked so hard to build.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54874a44ce674e5a893088d67d635559&_e=WC5UkrGKLVksbkHAVY-fuMbUUFESE_9ajyJmAS0XrSVN0gptXxLjAaYWyBMubmWSQIfegTYuR-pnBxnxhaqaO4egac6Yp-tQ98kUiY2QCTYhW-zpWtkW34euNYSZTg1Pl_tRuI9haTn4-dx64PHbtiT3wJSqhIzXTRL5R7XQ3qQJowpYWhPg748vkknFgRCth4DKe-XwLQOPSLkCzwJqJMx_t8rwxtoiUDcz2ZRQP9POzJd3m_3vnkE3xQRglayUthhQK9hCMh764Hg09Dp-POKx3WIidp1HJ-4DoCLGc3lzSw05FloCuW-U-mu36uiG7O9GBcySttERkzXZMebMpjvVYXyX0N1xdeEmxgAbhc4l5xnEkrlbXMF4TFawrZ0hSFoLnw0tJ-vNTyYNTXxE4pKwZNnXXfthyWw5ujroCRJIi0pn-H7ovNvQavyfYsoOryzkhTXlLzo05r-1XZl83g%3D%3D)

We found GREAT success flipping four Democrat seats this year, but we will be on defense next time, and if we fall behind again, as we did in 2024,**this majority won't last long.** [**The fact is in 2024, the Democrats had to defend 23 Senate seats but now it is reversed and we need to defend 22 seats and counting.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54874a44ce674e5a893088d67d635559&_e=WC5UkrGKLVksbkHAVY-fuMbUUFESE_9ajyJmAS0XrSVN0gptXxLjAaYWyBMubmWSQIfegTYuR-pnBxnxhaqaO4egac6Yp-tQ98kUiY2QCTYhW-zpWtkW34euNYSZTg1Pl_tRuI9haTn4-dx64PHbtiT3wJSqhIzXTRL5R7XQ3qQJowpYWhPg748vkknFgRCth4DKe-XwLQOPSLkCzwJqJMx_t8rwxtoiUDcz2ZRQP9POzJd3m_3vnkE3xQRglayUthhQK9hCMh764Hg09Dp-POKx3WIidp1HJ-4DoCLGc3lzSw05FloCuW-U-mu36uiGC-R8wdhjo1flhjzBscHR3fW15jzo-WapB-k7xHmQOwnUEnEWi4TePCLm0mPS_z-sp-vhq7m5E30tMl3xZMV6X87VJ57iHSHtwGylSz5cgiEF6yuTinPJcpHevI9UUuK4XpCm5ct7gaw0E0YjYxCFqg%3D%3D)

Purple states are the key to holding our GOP majority, and with Republican seats up for election, we can't waste any time if we want to HOLD our majority.

[**CLOSE THE FUNDRAISING GAP >>>**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54874a44ce674e5a893088d67d635559&_e=WC5UkrGKLVksbkHAVY-fuMbUUFESE_9ajyJmAS0XrSVN0gptXxLjAaYWyBMubmWSQIfegTYuR-pnBxnxhaqaO4egac6Yp-tQ98kUiY2QCTYhW-zpWtkW34euNYSZTg1Pl_tRuI9haTn4-dx64PHbtiT3wJSqhIzXTRL5R7XQ3qQJowpYWhPg748vkknFgRCth4DKe-XwLQOPSLkCzwJqJMx_t8rwxtoiUDcz2ZRQP9POzJd3m_3vnkE3xQRglayUthhQK9hCMh764Hg09Dp-POKx3WIidp1HJ-4DoCLGc3lzSw05FloCuW-U-mu36uiG38p7AqirY98j-SsibQ8sazT69rWfAOB1uqdAGWRXsbAcMcglHvY1sq9HWCG7vJDsHiCLIZu7BES94_qeQ520G8-EJu5csyt_-XTdLQ3XeXcaP-hMkge1nJrv1SUvR6Qo-fW41415SjzVp8F1vZXcSg%3D%3D)
We **LOST THREE VERY CLOSE RACES BY 10 VOTES PER PRECINCT** _and narrowly won in Pennsylvania._

[**In Nevada, Republican Sam Brown _lost_ by just 23,806 votes.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54874a44ce674e5a893088d67d635559&_e=WC5UkrGKLVksbkHAVY-fuMbUUFESE_9ajyJmAS0XrSVN0gptXxLjAaYWyBMubmWSQIfegTYuR-pnBxnxhaqaO4egac6Yp-tQ98kUiY2QCTYhW-zpWtkW34euNYSZTg1Pl_tRuI9haTn4-dx64PHbtiT3wJSqhIzXTRL5R7XQ3qQJowpYWhPg748vkknFgRCth4DKe-XwLQOPSLkCzwJqJMx_t8rwxtoiUDcz2ZRQP9POzJd3m_3vnkE3xQRglayUthhQK9hCMh764Hg09Dp-POKx3WIidp1HJ-4DoCLGc3lzSw05FloCuW-U-mu36uiGonlizW7N7eDeXSZ2mP_Rl8baZHzNbJHsoj8jjddRRaFgck5T9f_jCUCzoW6xLd1uhbyK5qDVVH-ckjrxJ4oR5tjC6l5OZi9wQmu-hgk6taoP1N-JQaWouH_ImhI5OuSPY5foKZ6Kwm4bktgIhjhZ0g%3D%3D)

[**In Michigan, Republican Mike Rogers _lost_ by 19,766 votes.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54874a44ce674e5a893088d67d635559&_e=WC5UkrGKLVksbkHAVY-fuMbUUFESE_9ajyJmAS0XrSVN0gptXxLjAaYWyBMubmWSQIfegTYuR-pnBxnxhaqaO4egac6Yp-tQ98kUiY2QCTYhW-zpWtkW34euNYSZTg1Pl_tRuI9haTn4-dx64PHbtiT3wJSqhIzXTRL5R7XQ3qQJowpYWhPg748vkknFgRCth4DKe-XwLQOPSLkCzwJqJMx_t8rwxtoiUDcz2ZRQP9POzJd3m_3vnkE3xQRglayUthhQK9hCMh764Hg09Dp-POKx3WIidp1HJ-4DoCLGc3lzSw05FloCuW-U-mu36uiGOxI_1ZRLbTnCG8rNIva-pP71rlSnKv7mP5tuUYqbG9o2ywj0n-PnDPE3VMFcTnTw6Lc3S9CvfkCARfth-pchnaxpsgsmmqG_x-lgiGlycMvYoSnMgdLXgBuLnD_r1VPzcTodRbf3GvRPgM_dvggPtg%3D%3D)
_**“The fact our candidates were so overwhelmed in September made these close races and knocking off incumbents just a little too steep of a hill,”** - NRSC Executive Director Jason Thielman said_
If we get outspent again in critical races, we will LOSE our Senate majority, and President Trump will be forced to serve out a wasted lame-duck term.

Senate Republicans rely on exceptional Americans like you, Fellow American.[**Can we count on you again today if you can afford to donate to these five races that have already started for the next election?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54874a44ce674e5a893088d67d635559&_e=WC5UkrGKLVksbkHAVY-fuMbUUFESE_9ajyJmAS0XrSVN0gptXxLjAaYWyBMubmWSQIfegTYuR-pnBxnxhaqaO4egac6Yp-tQ98kUiY2QCTYhW-zpWtkW34euNYSZTg1Pl_tRuI9haTn4-dx64PHbtiT3wJSqhIzXTRL5R7XQ3qQJowpYWhPg748vkknFgRCth4DKe-XwLQOPSLkCzwJqJMx_t8rwxtoiUDcz2ZRQP9POzJd3m_3vnkE3xQRglayUthhQK9hCMh764Hg09Dp-POKx3WIidp1HJ-4DoCLGc3lzSw05FloCuW-U-mu36uiGwR69lJ0HS_rRYSnDW-DVhsxaOovlVn0ZtxaJYfZQAe-KIBYCPrV4TjoHRH9tlveGcDNGK-vuWs9iS6JllBs1oSAJRzMdfm1MgW1yfqhcszw1AFU1iNCM6WzN7OeIaaznxvbNt4JihMqgGJvaTnooHw%3D%3D)

clean_body: The fact is that races are getting closer and closer, which means we need to raise funds to support Senate Republicans in purple states. | Fellow American, I know you've already done so much for Senate Republicans as one of our top supporters of the 2024 election cycle, so I hate to ask again, but we can't fall behind again this year. We found GREAT success flipping four Democrat seats this year, but we will be on defense next time, and if we fall behind again, as we did in 2024,this majority won't last long. Purple states are the key to holding our GOP majority, and with Republican seats up for election, we can't waste any time if we want to HOLD our majority. We LOST THREE VERY CLOSE RACES BY 10 VOTES PER PRECINCT and narrowly won in Pennsylvania. “The fact our candidates were so overwhelmed in September made these close races and knocking off incumbents just a little too steep of a hill,” - NRSC Executive Director Jason Thielman said If we get outspent again in critical races, we will LOSE our Senate majority, and President Trump will be forced to serve out a wasted lame-duck term. Senate Republicans rely on exceptional Americans like you, Fellow American. Thank you, Mike Alm Marketing Director, NRSC If you want to help Republicans, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Nancy Northup
subject: Sorry–I know it's late
body:
Are you with us?
Peter,

I'm sorry to reach out so late, but we are incredibly close to our Giving Tuesday match goal, and I didn't want you to miss out.

**Your gift to the Center will be matched 6X, but only until midnight tonight. Use this link to make a gift, and I’ll make sure it counts toward the match:**
[**reprorights.org/6Xmatch**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98122753/515666305/59579377?sourceid=1150077&utm_campaign=25emkge-1120aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=6xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI4MjIyOC1lYmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-gNF61jhhHxVKNAe8RZmrXNP6INeWgX97hsL5x3gok=&emci=0163d663-f8ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=55b82228-ebb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)

I know you care deeply about the future of reproductive rights in this country. [**Right now, this is an unmissable opportunity to make a tangible difference and fuel the critical work ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98122754/515666306/59579377?sourceid=1150077&utm_campaign=25emkge-1120aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=6xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI4MjIyOC1lYmIxLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-gNF61jhhHxVKNAe8RZmrXNP6INeWgX97hsL5x3gok=&emci=0163d663-f8ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=55b82228-ebb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=954237)

Please don't wait—give before the midnight deadline. Your role in this fight matters more than ever. We couldn't do this without you!

Nancy

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: [LAST CHANCE] LCV 2024 Giving Tuesday Status for Peter: PENDING
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4NDU2MDkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDUxMTg5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
There are only a few hours left of Giving Tuesday, and it looks like you haven’t
yet renewed your LCV membership to help LCV unlock an additional $100,000
matching gift. Is that right, Peter? We’re sending one final reminder before midnight, because we know that LCV
supporters like you won’t want to miss this opportunity to make a big impact for
our environment this Giving Tuesday. I hope you’ll take a moment to review the information below and then renew your LCV membership to help us reach our 1,000 donor goal before midnight. Even $5 makes a difference >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/qjPNcm_g~ And remember: if you start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday,
you’ll receive a free tote bag from LCV so you can show your support for the environment year-round. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. Onward, LCV Membership Team Peter — Recently, we got the incredibly welcome news that a major donor
agreed to put up a $100,000 challenge grant to help fund LCV’s pro-environment
campaigns into the new year. With Trump headed back to the White House in just a few weeks and promising to
pursue a dangerous anti-environmental agenda — meeting this goal matters tremendously. To unlock those funds, we need 1,000 LCV supporters to make a contribution
before midnight on Giving Tuesday — that’s tonight, just a few hours away, and
we haven’t heard from you yet, Peter. Defeating Trump’s dirty and dangerous agenda is going to take all of us. Please, renew your membership now for just $5 to help us reach our Giving Tuesday goal >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ec- To help us reach this critical goal, we’ll send a free tote bag to LCV members who start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday. NAME EMAIL YOUR STATUS P. FRENCH - Current Peter Willis dpwillis67@gmail.com RENEW NOW FOR $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f3w- M. BLAKE - Current With Trump headed back to the White House in just a few weeks, this year’s
Giving Tuesday goal is even more important than usual. It’s going to take everyonein our movement standing together to disrupt his dangerous anti-environmental
agenda. Here are just a few reasons why your Giving Tuesday gift is EXTRA important
right now: Because we’re up against a critical deadline to secure environmental progress before Trump takes office. Right now, we’re campaigning for the Biden administration to protect clean air and public lands, and for the Senate to confirm pro-environment judges before Trump’s inauguration in January. We’re counting on your support to safeguard environmental progress. Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Because we’re fighting back against Donald Trump’s most extreme anti-science nominees. By nominating climate change deniers like Chris Wright — a Big Oil CEO — to lead federal agencies, Trump is putting polluters’ profits before people like you and me. We’re leading the fight to keep them from key positions. We can block these nominations, but only if the environmental movement shows up >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Because we need to be ready on DAY ONE to oppose Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. From abolishing the National Weather Service, to gutting environmental enforcement and allowing more toxic pollution into our air and water, to allowing more oil and gas drilling and infrastructure, Trump has laid out a blueprint for environmental disaster. We’re ready to fight this pro-polluter agenda in Congress, in the states, and the courts — but we need your help >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Because a group of donors has offered $100,000 in matching gift funds. Bottom line: Your contribution goes further to support environmental campaigns that matter if you give now and help unlock this critical funding. Renew your LCV membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT- Meeting our Giving Tuesday goal matters — now more than ever.I hope you’ll pitch in: Our match unlock goal is 1,000 donors, but it ends at
midnight tonight. Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMV_ And remember: if you start an annual gift of $19 or more by this Giving Tuesday,
you’ll receive a free tote bag from LCV to show your support for the environment year-round. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_ I hope you’ll respond before midnight tonight, Peter. With your help, I
know that we can make this Giving Tuesday matter for our environment. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11845609&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDUxMTg5NgS2&spReportId=MjEwMDUxMTg5NgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11845609&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDUxMTg5NgS2&spReportId=MjEwMDUxMTg5NgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

subject: We need your help to close the gap!

body:
Friend,

We're racing against the clock, and we're just _**[A FEW DOLLARS SHORT](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/mo_XDakYzwnXGkzWCRT2DQ~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpMsW8P0TgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL2VuZC1vZi1kYXktZGVhZGxpbmUtZS1hZWRnZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFlZGdlX25yc2NfQUZSJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwMV9uYV9lbmRvZmRheWdvYWxjbG9zZS12MV9BRlJfbnJzY19ucnNjJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWZ1bmRyYWlzaW5nJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTQmYW10ND0xMDAmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWVXA3NwY0IKZ0bezE9nGZsEh1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) **_from hitting today's critical goal.
