name: The CAGOP
subject: Trump voters under attack!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Republican Party
body:
Fight back. Add your name:

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc9lu8nmm9cuaccqdumr2ebmr6tjk9862kek3kmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o70clh2bs)
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjv5m3nq51bqfrvaj8rrhvl6o3secnhbu8oint6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o70clh2bs)
---
_**OUTRAGEOUS!**_
Trump hasn’t even set foot in the Oval Office yet, and the Democrats are already in a state of absolute panic.
Gavin Newsom just proposed a staggering $25 MILLION to ram through legislation that will SABOTAGE Trump’s agenda before it even begins.
He’s not hiding it, either. In his own words, they want to “Trump-proof” the entire state.
**This is a direct assault on the WILL OF THE PEOPLE.**
_Let’s not sugarcoat it:_ California Democrats have declared war on the nearly 40% of Californians who voted for Trump.
And this isn’t their first rodeo - remember, California sued the first Trump administration over 120 times.
They’re gearing up to do it again, and they won’t stop until they’ve crushed EVERY Republican value under the weight of their far-Left agenda.
But this time, it’s worse.
Newsom’s proposed legislation is just the FIRST WAVE of his all-out assault to block Trump’s policies.
We cannot sit back and watch as Gavin Newsom and his radical allies trample on our votes, our values, and our vision for America.
This is a DIRECT threat to every Republican, every conservative, and every patriot who believes in free and fair governance.
Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda.
_**[_**We need 10,000 signatures IMMEDIATELY.**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfavpsub58crt5nim1hn41m67mlqkepdaimevuio_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o70clh2bs)**_
Friend, we need YOUR name on that list. Time is running out.
---
[**TAKE A STAND**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlhhhfnvi02ts63ies0353f8j1vcsn4vbv6ti960_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o70clh2bs)
---
Thank you for your support. -CAGOP

name: American Action News
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjgmblklqohu49dm2loinc2d775147dud1d7mv1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o74chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvi3ur9bipo6v5qfj1geedl56rda5o3vicq7fvr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o74chh2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhl03mehe2pcmng6scqur30pfvgiccbu09l0bsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o74chh2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhicoj6n1ogejiknkmol5dah0dkkanmiq51p7a28_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o74chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbvankrsirkqgem5gdrf1l5984bdqlrlljt56g5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o74chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsffju0hdgv6hjd99t5rbe85sdlebvpfq2m1ius0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o74chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zok409jqr2b8ukvhl06fqd15ec3pmhak7odgp4hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg64o74chh2bs)**

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Discover the Facts: Socialism and Capitalism Explained
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlog0t4dnue7ju9ovmglioj8v0epd0afu5u1nljo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg66ob2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znq9qjd4rkr5vhq24vbk60ocsk7joe4qvs9mvsh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg66ob2c3h2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbpmm0qpqgt76gn1pe3qrt9h6lb6ugeslak37s50_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg66ob2c3h2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhg01ns7cmhu8i3unpbqrl1mlo4iaaheheubtbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg66ob6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4c5ocnj0i7oosutm8r53ispscfp11fvbai4li2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg66ob6cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq4qle4g2l6l7l3m56bilpb2skupg5j6vv4senrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg66ob6cth2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr9lpbe2u5bqotd5khaok0tc3ds2tfe1esuflhoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg66ob6cth2bs)**

Trump hasn’t even set foot in the Oval Office yet, and the Democrats are already in a state of absolute panic.

**This is a direct assault on the WILL OF THE PEOPLE.**
_Let’s not sugarcoat it:_ California Democrats have declared war on the nearly 40% of Californians who voted for Trump.
And this isn’t their first rodeo - remember, California sued the first Trump administration over 120 times.
They’re gearing up to do it again, and they won’t stop until they’ve crushed EVERY Republican value under the weight of their far-Left agenda.
But this time, it’s worse.
Newsom’s proposed legislation is just the FIRST WAVE of his all-out assault to block Trump’s policies.
We cannot sit back and watch as Gavin Newsom and his radical allies trample on our votes, our values, and our vision for America.
This is a DIRECT threat to every Republican, every conservative, and every patriot who believes in free and fair governance.
Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda.

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb5287tfoucmpnu7fjprgr79k2b2saqi7pd2l5q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg69p36cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zflkscgchtosobc1js3s93qgl3d7jfhsa7n7vgbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg69p36cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1qd0i60uhvukm70fgim8fd3d71l99g6bb294a80_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg69p36cjh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z536dn8mpmrqukg0a0vavt9k8qq6tm1dh1g1etkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpg69p36cjh2bs)**
---

name: First Look News
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zas68hjq4aob89bsgmbdprfvm0bj445pnc5hage0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60o34cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze085nnf8ar704ravl51chlh735470r4sj73deig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60o34cjh2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv3jtqcfhbr0cddfrln6up07uvbtff5tijpb59ho_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60o34cjh2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

---

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: The Fight to Protect Christian Attorneys
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Fellow American,

This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats
to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America
don't know anything about it!

The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians
in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological
activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50
states.

That could make critical legal victories for Americans of
faith-like protection of personal prayer without getting fired,
protection of moral conscience so you can't be forced to dispense
abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming
a Christian student club-IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . .

. . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside
religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal
defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or
punishment for their biblical values!

Fellow American, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and
legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to
protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by
state.

Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're
counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you
to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75,
$100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society
in this critical work?

Support Christian Legal Society

For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm
discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model
Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association.

But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for
Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing
and punishment of Christian attorneys-and the faithful Americans
they would otherwise defend-seems to be the sole goal of this
rule change.

Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any
response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by
all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar
Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical
activists could use this to:

discourage or punish attorneys from sharing political,
social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current
political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as
"progressive" or "Woke");

stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches, sitting
on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those
schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries, no
matter how much good work those ministries do in their
communities; and

put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work to
defend religious freedom on behalf of Christian ministries,
nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to
biblical values!

Fellow American, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root
in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major
investment of time, talent, and legal work.

Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important
issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN
this fight-and preserve religious freedom and protection for
Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith-I'm
counting on your support.

Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250,
or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical
protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry,
nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?

Support Christian Legal Society

Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of
Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice
and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and
the provision of legal aid to the needy.

And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for
Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to
this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all
Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in
the public square.

No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian
attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like
Christian Legal Society.

That's why I encourage you-and hope-that you'll make your most
generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right
now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the
battles still to come.

Thank you for your support and for your prayerful
consideration.

David Nammo

Executive Director & CEO

Christian Legal Society

Support Christian Legal Society

Christian Legal Society

P.O. Box 7712

McLean, VA 22106-7712

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ze05bravb9itlt3j7bkbflcf167ijirb0gaja398_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60p76c1h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvcdv0jlm5ijlqblfm1j947lho11p0kvnjgmg4p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60p76c1h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zdcbjds94t32fek0vudvnnnlqo9nd806iljhabng_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60p76c1h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zn2kugp29ge8a74t6vhmbun82d0dppm1h67kqt0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60p76c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq4t9k66q3bd9ieir38ctieko7fcjheiprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cor0s3ie8oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqnul5m18dukcgu9lukruklh2dpce288svumroio_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60p76c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvrk990m2one4qhv0rl666p1qk5ajdbtgeegeop8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60p76c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: The California Republican Party
subject: Newsom’s $25M “Trump-proof” plan is a direct THREAT.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Republican Party
body:
Fight back. Add your name:

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqnhs6lgc061lh41m4d2vnnhf8g289lhh3e4jla8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi60p76cth2bs)
---

We cannot sit back and watch as Gavin Newsom and his radical allies trample on our votes, our values, and our vision for America.

Join the California GOP in DEMANDING that Newsom HALT his radical efforts to block Trump’s agenda.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaeqsunhv4oi6fmg3ofbrh7qebj6kj3qdp3virco_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi68o76chh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zabsp76t7ilsloq5sg67flecfq9olnv64hdrdub0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi68o76chh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr6d557pqg44egsmd0sikj1iqh2kv2kjar6bft58_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi68o76chh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi9apttqqj96ho8d8e57jrvcu5nfklrm7lgdgu68_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cphm1o74sph238h1e8he4937cpj6cp34c3j68oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr0rv8uk2r9sfur9paposfnh8e3gmvjhuvacgung_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpi68o76chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs7ra9s1jmubb8600uvob7l98pgue8c56brikg28_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cpj68p30spi649fg)

**[Red, White,& Brew](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19280/6374453/cf7b43528e346421097ca576ca47774fa23c085f/5b8545bc56d293f00f0613b3ba7c2f15fc89cd88)** This is one of the best tasting coffees customers say they have ever tasted. This specific blend of medium roast Arabica beans gets your day going like no other.

[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19280/6374453/cf7b43528e346421097ca576ca47774fa23c085f/5b8545bc56d293f00f0613b3ba7c2f15fc89cd88)

You can pick your grind, or get it whole bean. Whatever you want, this Fresh Java Brew kick starts your day.

name: Team Evergreen
subject: 📢 One last chance! Triple your impact before it's gone
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Final countdown and EVERY dollar counts
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3106481/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

**This is it.** The clock is ticking to Trump-proof our climate wins before Inauguration. And after seeing our incredible push to meet our match goal yesterday for #GivingTuesday, [**our donor has agreed to extend the deadline one more day to give you a FINAL chance to make your donation count THREE times as much for the climate!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3106482/87SdQ4wZ)

Now through **midnight tonight** , every dollar you give will be **TRIPLED** to fuel our fight to secure the climate wins we've worked so hard to achieve.

[**With this final opportunity to hit the match deadline, every dollar matters. Triple the impact, triple the power: Are you in?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3106483/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[YES, I WANT TO MAKE 3X THE IMPACT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3106484/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Big Oil wants to see us fail. They're banking on us falling short in this critical moment so they can push their fossil fuel agenda unopposed. But they're underestimating us—our movement, our grit, and our resolve to make climate progress unstoppable.

You've already helped us do so much: |
---
|
* From challenging Biden to reject six massive fossil fuel projects,
* To defending groundbreaking state policies like New York's congestion pricing and California's zero-emission standards,
* To building coalitions that hold polluters accountable and protect the Inflation Reduction Act from corporate sabotage.

|
---
| **But here's the hard truth:** We'll be leaving climate progress that could be saved vulnerable if we don't have the resources to amplify our work in these final, crucial weeks of 2024.

**Don't forget what your gift will empower us to do:** |
---
|
* Fight tooth and nail to block the fossil fuel projects Biden can still stop,
* Mobilize the state and local leadership that will drive climate progress over the next four years,
* And stand with our allies to defend the climate gains we've secured from Big Oil's attacks.

|
---
| [**Your gift today will be TRIPLED to fuel the fight for bold climate action. Let's make it count!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3106485/87SdQ4wZ)

This isn't just a sprint—it's a generational effort to protect our planet. Together, we can keep building a movement that won't back down, no matter the challenges ahead. |
---
[⏰ DONATE BEFORE TIME RUNS OUT ⏰](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3106486/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| In solidarity,

The Evergreen Action Team |

Just read the fine print right here: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbdba3f1c-0cbc-494f-b1d5-5356c81e075c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3059f354-53c7-44c9-b546-60d2a90a066d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2KZMZ7OhJCp6XUYMx2kTCQ~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2KZMZ7OhJCp6XUYMx2kTCQ~~/AARclAA~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2KZMZ7OhJCp6XUYMx2kTCQ~~/AARclAA~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2KZMZ7OhJCp6XUYMx2kTCQ~~/AARclAA~)**
---

Conservative Broadcast
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e1454d52fda84fdaa5e4112c7ac8ab62&_e=tFmyReEC3VAme3Jz4kFYY6hiPrMazupvDYbZqTF-HJd9cebak9OuJTVX594c4VLE2j1QW_LWKUZhC4RQFP8VqXgRCFVi5qmt_k7tmZlNtu-7my1q6Hb-nGzaZ7qxw5xm_vAjw0cUXpnUP_xEpxMM3Huy2DNB8laovbMrG3kIuxVJmuoYBN-sxe8S1V5huCFFoUx13AsNC9evWYuL_kpKuPXVv1-7HWr_A1ieupCKtQqhQdr1DiZ6cw6zKR0Bd8WtZEIRGZ84UIajXkO_iodiPEcEb0NCJFILb82n1yIAafK0EpMsV9MjQIh4J5TY1q881Tvu0W2Z7DxHVUZd8S1g6KvbvoWU0vZi9ZS9U7Gn2GfxQESx0N3MCwrGJN-RB2zbxx_C2WzZnOW3JuEdpAGPo7FRJtrXPaQ-0fyxVUwvayYBi_XQJYKlLaYn4qAiIw7M)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e1454d52fda84fdaa5e4112c7ac8ab62&_e=tFmyReEC3VAme3Jz4kFYY6hiPrMazupvDYbZqTF-HJd9cebak9OuJTVX594c4VLE2j1QW_LWKUZhC4RQFP8VqXgRCFVi5qmt_k7tmZlNtu-7my1q6Hb-nGzaZ7qxw5xm_vAjw0cUXpnUP_xEpxMM3Huy2DNB8laovbMrG3kIuxVJmuoYBN-sxe8S1V5huCFFoUx13AsNC9evWYuL_kpKuPXVv1-7HWr_A1ieupCKtQqhQdr1DiZ6cw6zKR0Bd8WtZEIRGZ84UIajXkO_iodiPIgJF_SGkghiUMBUe30s-J4rexG7YjJolq1eEBd1qLbAQLIvr6omSBl0XDnFaeGY8vdHJcU1gyHSanYkY7Dg5RPeGVULnLID-f0h8HKdrwlWh1VJm-uDwUFCbewwpLUd75ZuRa3abVtg5fv-jjvvA94kNBvyyrk3CcD2OSzSL9KW) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e1454d52fda84fdaa5e4112c7ac8ab62&_e=tFmyReEC3VAme3Jz4kFYY6hiPrMazupvDYbZqTF-HJd9cebak9OuJTVX594c4VLE2j1QW_LWKUZhC4RQFP8VqXgRCFVi5qmt_k7tmZlNtu-7my1q6Hb-nGzaZ7qxw5xm_vAjw0cUXpnUP_xEpxMM3Huy2DNB8laovbMrG3kIuxVJmuoYBN-sxe8S1V5huCFFoUx13AsNC9evWYuL_kpKuPXVv1-7HWr_A1ieupCKtQqhQdr1DiZ6cw6zKR0Bd8WtZEIRGZ84UIajXkO_iodiPMwJmQzFplfLipezvCAU1nAfPKt3kZOQM_Z_abtS2_HvNqYvy8wWDbyH30zKeNWsaby4tsOP_49wal1GV6atMk_uVTyrwXtl9ZakrJML8w55B2DtmXXrLfJwpwGaN6PYKE-yrc_vwMW050pUs6-VG3_qsHNESikglYBmsskZVUEO)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: An election smackdown
body:
Voters have made their voices heard.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6291b083c33c44aeac72200d6574d3ac&_e=no9FW3i95r3VulYv5nbV-0Bb94NyPsvKW1deESrPOIP5m8gYaKX-m5VgFmjZaYvUOVt5s0GUUbKXnrjJKqZgT5HThvEsenOaTQzAw9YKztsgC6KfkDQTkPpggOKAsXcqDU3YantJAVmHNABkT2Z9KSIMCnLV90bmRq-bmSWodSwSfoUsda9ukJ7sbznCXWtD6_nc8EZMWfp6Hyp-Uv5tWLaxUTsgejbX5CUl_1-AX7TnKyVOV1BVCsWsy4iCyTShlQP4M24BdwQbeLOUHZOPFQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6291b083c33c44aeac72200d6574d3ac&_e=no9FW3i95r3VulYv5nbV-0Bb94NyPsvKW1deESrPOIP5m8gYaKX-m5VgFmjZaYvUOVt5s0GUUbKXnrjJKqZgT5HThvEsenOaTQzAw9YKztsgC6KfkDQTkPpggOKAsXcqMJZDGf2VKaBdatSsA8aDsMXDWtfqVrqTAu5I7Lv9fLh_CBiDK0PRtIgmWS4MdrpPoml7bXQZfiS1R8sjREfIE0olUaj0EiSripBkB7WY2WU8SvmkidCiKFV1grCMagj8u0sPXmwDdF_BN5Xh9wMOdg%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6291b083c33c44aeac72200d6574d3ac&_e=no9FW3i95r3VulYv5nbV-0Bb94NyPsvKW1deESrPOIP5m8gYaKX-m5VgFmjZaYvUOVt5s0GUUbKXnrjJKqZgT5HThvEsenOaTQzAw9YKztsgC6KfkDQTkPpggOKAsXcq3MFFA0tO7wA_b9AvqMCn8GtGdL9Qc6QS8kJm1ca3qPNuj-r0KHOp4uKQTmG0-h7JKLViqbcqurh0LzeQSeX-rcmWRxfrn4GZgv68VGmJHc62HXFjN41_HuNJdDTtsrMF7HR3VGxLTbvXSwZE265slA%3D%3D)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6291b083c33c44aeac72200d6574d3ac&_e=no9FW3i95r3VulYv5nbV-0Bb94NyPsvKW1deESrPOIP5m8gYaKX-m5VgFmjZaYvUOVt5s0GUUbKXnrjJKqZgT5HThvEsenOaTQzAw9YKztsgC6KfkDQTkPpggOKAsXcqQg-fG7Rww5GiL3KNej2hiKsvOHG87cEkutO6ze6VdRVncaWAM4JeaBPouVc3vEII3k8Ut7kN9u_waSUlDbk1bK0snN6oozLXabpIX4F3wwPxQEgP8zOM_oqFJKUqU8YO0lfQ041zAZuYw69nvRDLag%3D%3D)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6291b083c33c44aeac72200d6574d3ac&_e=no9FW3i95r3VulYv5nbV-0Bb94NyPsvKW1deESrPOIP5m8gYaKX-m5VgFmjZaYvUOVt5s0GUUbKXnrjJKqZgT5HThvEsenOaTQzAw9YKztsgC6KfkDQTkPpggOKAsXcqHgJa8kDCfxkmvMT2i8Oqah8h7xkYEYqiiuW0SAsx99qyBdd6DoaL77jyx2ohW94dw173D6KHAMhpBEG0b8TH5A-mit4EmVaMMZtEP_tsbUXfwBFGXRB_3CuwfeJsDaXm0OU2ERPsX7K2MS52AkraOw%3D%3D)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa8813b97e64519b4dbeaa83ac7c9d4&_e=690OAeEo6rBC9TIGjCzrAHnLMobQ0EHa9GRFGBiHrHfWi1cX8d8j0_syEqVI69_bZ2Z5QFgquG9HawhC_Sv3uJutVvUBpyqpiyerHLBIgPyiZRqNG7IBc1RrXnK36RXu243OY1vdOhYe4jWrgrZjla0jNh5F1QEvhjLsfU1u54jf0KcGRuum_nP43rlevJSHg4cyj4i6ibEdCN0ASsgzIIH__lt7AuUzGWyhIdPpEXKysVahnXSPmKWyvf6M2Z0mwFmZP-BOm0jkxF_NKzki7mxvnjXDqmm5aGJNs_cuI8MmHZQB2SLI25F9F0s57NgiJVx_W3-7lDPnDD67vokiNP3yRpVDTHcKzgIlsIZBSyQ2WawiZed-vnXsKPK70NpziVClaM4UCxucU3Op5-kujq1oLWhWSTjnmS61U3tmv5es6eQiROX30M3PKHau3Jbu) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa8813b97e64519b4dbeaa83ac7c9d4&_e=690OAeEo6rBC9TIGjCzrAHnLMobQ0EHa9GRFGBiHrHfWi1cX8d8j0_syEqVI69_bZ2Z5QFgquG9HawhC_Sv3uJutVvUBpyqpiyerHLBIgPyiZRqNG7IBc1RrXnK36RXu243OY1vdOhYe4jWrgrZjla0jNh5F1QEvhjLsfU1u54jf0KcGRuum_nP43rlevJSHg4cyj4i6ibEdCN0ASsgzIIH__lt7AuUzGWyhIdPpEXKysVahnXSPmKWyvf6M2Z0mwFmZP-BOm0jkxF_NKzki7kIswierHWfp53GhzayDXqC2NuyYE6Hvz59lZf15gejVakeUVeF1IxzY9krX1vo1jf4B7xtRQG9zvEAK_nebZ4_HU700X3T-nH4UyAFIDMmvRo_QRan9jVh2j2G0M9lyNEStl1deXVKRoLtVVRR36uOOtI7ydl2N7S1daG7F1W-Q) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa8813b97e64519b4dbeaa83ac7c9d4&_e=690OAeEo6rBC9TIGjCzrAHnLMobQ0EHa9GRFGBiHrHfWi1cX8d8j0_syEqVI69_bZ2Z5QFgquG9HawhC_Sv3uJutVvUBpyqpiyerHLBIgPyiZRqNG7IBc1RrXnK36RXu243OY1vdOhYe4jWrgrZjla0jNh5F1QEvhjLsfU1u54jf0KcGRuum_nP43rlevJSHg4cyj4i6ibEdCN0ASsgzIIH__lt7AuUzGWyhIdPpEXKysVahnXSPmKWyvf6M2Z0mwFmZP-BOm0jkxF_NKzki7pHWMKNB83y2uFXimSSdKV7J_SqkVLKJZgL9W9uHM5aouDW2DlOos4Dw2ol1Rc6TiEpHlAzy8max6IcVrUG6IkMVr62KvtQRmpDE5Z2qw-hUOzPkrM3_J67QDnqRTJqpw9JnOWtKdg5Mv7eS8y1braHjHUNQYaD0QOACdzkAWg_P)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

# Wednesday, December 4, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1928, Carl G. Cromwell drilled the [world's deepest oil well](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAUheGngU7DvSAXC4pt7GbbLQ0KKgnKRMk4vv3G6af6q_Ml5-_RP1xMcZt_3RpseU-5R4GqAqyE6r2L6eoV93YQvgUeLJCUEqA1mi8WpPBN04w00AiEZvBGC5LjQI6URsOjvTFAoQDQKF2b0DqYqNGEKBtUTIngY8l7XZZQwtsdU7ryK-z1mFee7FLK82Dyh2HHsDvPsy7H4vKW4hbqvM8Mu8-q8u6qhusOwy5sZb-LreC79c8zphQPTUyJeXUxffDy9e3L4n8AAAD__4WHVY4) on University of Texas land in Reagan County, defying orders to shut down work at the site. At a depth of 8,525 feet, the University 1-B remained the world’s deepest oil well until 1931. If you like going fast, you'll be excited to hear about the [latest developments from COTALand](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFutDAQhJ_GdCDv2oBduPgbuvvblGiDfYcVYyOzOe7ePiJ92pnR6NP3cZtvFFPMj_-0Bceve5lRom4BW6lnTzG9Z9149ym9hSY4GJVSANYMzeos4uJHNKSt9mYEPQD0i_TWe1Smt0101xmg1ABo9NCZYAnuYz-MiKpHLbQMPnKpHa-Bw4uOe3qXZ6jdUrYmuZV5P4T6J3ASOJ3n2W3vgzJlLjmWayRwCplDZYp5C5kFTlQ5LikInJbC1NL2fYSraneqX-2VJcq-BWt7hQa7fd2b6vx-xpTiMYxCy8dGMf0y8J9Sng5_AgAA__9IhWQX), a new amusement park being built next to a racetrack in Austin. Do you love Texas? So do our 230,000+ readers. Advertise in _The Texas Flyover_ and connect your business with passionate locals. [Learn more](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQgOGnsTeQ72xsM3jowpauHZGDj2DJBGSuSXj7qp2b_dcn_V-X8RJzyffbZ1wp8GveRlRoGsBGmTHFXM7RyBSuKvUgKYDTWgP03soleO0oWULotaWpm1Myzk8qOpuw89NV5vCLASoDgN7Y1lMfYXaddYi6QyOMopR5qy0vxPSKx1zO7UG1nbZVlrAw74fQHwIHgcM_jcBhj5XvVJtn5qX5PgQOsoa0P3Mp-bBOGHVbYy5_Ir9dfAT8CQAA__-ty1OE). We're flying today with [Pacaso](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80L2u4yAQBeCnwV2s4ccGCoqVonTZdks0a8Y2EtgWkGzy9ivn1ve2M59Gc86fu79jTHFbfmMm117z7gUIdeHiAsoHjOntVRfcXwiWd-S4llJybs3YrQ4tobHzECQMU5itscOoBSk-Ga0kQBfdeYwLUJwLo8bekEU-65MJOQjFFFCIbS99W6nRC-uc3vuTSj_tuUtube2oTP5i4sbELW5Pqq0_cMK6n-Icy9ujZV_3R5mIyWvI5WufcAtxWw5ciInxNJlCfGQmrweWtlGpazy4gYsC7T95mRjbhpnqD8Zz0IOREgzYrrhw_IspxTpqpmDJGNPn8_ZtlU8n_gcAAP__6E5zWQ). They are offering an investment opportunity you won't want to miss.

## Austin's Property Tax Rate Is Nation's Highest
According to a recent report by Redfin, the Austin metropolitan area [leads the nation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOozAQBOCngc6IXRs7LlxcQ5drr0RLbIIlg5G9CuHtT4n-9u-mGH0azb_7dKeY4v78S1tw_F7yhD0qASh6NXmK6ZpU693cewttcGCklAD2ptvVeYR51pLA2Hn2CwwKUMkhaDAGtZnb6D4YYK8A8KZ0dwuWYDGDNohyQNWoPvjIuXS8Bg5vqku68iuU7pG3NrmV-aiN_NPg2OB4nme3XZV22jnvMX9KDY4lUAqViUODIxWOj_RJX04cJR-h8CWY3qIQhyoq7eJHEGCtAiv77liPtjh_nDGlWLVpVP_cKKbvEP71mZfD_wEAAP__olJmSQ) with an effective property tax rate of 1.8%. San Antonio, Houston, and Fort Worth are close behind, each with effective property tax rates of 1.7%, while Dallas sits at 1.6%. Property tax payments in Texas have [surged since 2019](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0jzGPtCAUAH8NdhreAwUKiq-x26-90rDyWElQDHKr_vvLXn_1JDOZr8f0cDHF7fXfrWTrFfKEHGUL2HI5eRfTPcnG2yf3BhqyoIQQAEYPzWKd40bO2kAPCuc-cK8NEBihAtdaQBPtRwbIJQBqOXSajIOg-kEhih4lk5x8rLl0daFKlztCuvObSjfntUl2qXU_mPjHcGQ4nufZFfIhbh_McNzoPBiOe8k7lXq31V3tkld6ft9U2rjNhdxBbUi5RO8Yjk2xfj9jSvEYFJP8tbqYflv1z_m3xZ8AAAD__w5UXAs), with elevated home values driving increases as high as 44.1% in Fort Worth and 43.4% in San Antonio. Property taxes now account for a significant portion of monthly housing costs, making up 20% of the median housing bill in Austin and 19% in San Antonio and Houston, compared to a nationwide average of 8%. State legislators have taken measures to reduce property taxes in recent years, with some advocating for the complete elimination of property taxes, which, according to estimates, would cost the state $81.5 billion annually.
## Billions in Broadband Funding Available
The Texas Broadband Development Office is [asking residents for their input](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuuszAQBOCngc6RvZhb4eJv6PK3p0QLXsNKxo7M5vb2R0l_6hl9Gs3Pdb4iR07bfzzIySvkGTRYZUBpO3vk-J5t7d2i_WhqcqZvmsaYcejq3fXBrkPA1eKqvcHWoA_d0rbNuOgVyNTsPpgBbY2BwXaXgUY0oW-7HqBpwVZWk2fJ5SI7Cb3wDPGdH1Quaz7q6HaR21k1_yqYKpgK561g8rTdsXjG9GlVMJ2CQgo3SutbPTHJqSSrnbCoUPKhvrAqdLKnb7ijqB0fpO6pUGRcIilOQiWRVDDVxfnbk2Pks-srq7cDOX4XyZ8XPRz8BgAA___7t2xT) to update maps showing which areas of the state have the least access to reliable high-speed internet service. The data will be used to distribute more than $5 billion in state and federal funds allocated for the expansion of broadband internet service in Texas, which has been [hampered by faulty maps](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL9uwyAchJ8Gb1jw44_NwNDFW7p2tLDBAQkDAhonb18le9c73enT93NbbybEkO7f5nS6P4-8AgGOKWDCV2tCfK18sHojVtHBaToxxihVsxy8Br4LBVwQISfDYJbqsFYdkvB9h5mRIej3GQXCKYWZy3F2ytBjEnICYAI44sTZ0HMdu3fdPU074is_XB33fA5R-95LQ-wLwYJgua5r3H3N6d0iWJK7GoLF59_Wc8KfPYLF1B726BAsnwRvNRu7mWSxexaTWsgJl5q36M6GqVJCgBRj8WWo2pYrxBianBAn99OE-CHp_6p5aPgLAAD__2m6Zd8) and a cumbersome application process for grants. Last month, the state [received federal approval](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D-P3CAUBPBPgzsseMb8KSjSuLu0Ka1neNyisMbCxL779tGulDLVFCP9NJpfH-sH5pL3z5_4JN-_Ul1BgOISuFBrxFy-VzVEv4no5EBemmmapHRWDw8frDbOQhDGWhGSncO8CUwRkiEFWg_ZvzAJQkkJVunRkkOZzKwNwDSDYkpQzL22sT-o0xeeqXzXi9oY6nMo_tH7cbLpB4OFwXLf9_j7-kOvksGCredQiMGy030yWEoNWBgsb-hf8kSRGhaOx9HqhYVvrWLccI88753aTp3n_exYCvZcdwYLaMfJqSlZEFwap7mSpDhqFfkUBEFURLNyQ_PxuHMp-dSGKfH5xFze0_t_v7w8_A0AAP__slh0lg) for its plan to use $3.3 billion in allocated funds from the 2021 Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. The state’s broadband office was [created in 2021](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAUAL8GtljweDEwMHRhS9eO1ksAGwkbC1M3-fuq2buf7nRft-lGueRt_qQ1uv5MdQIBeJFwETgFyuU1IQ_uLoKVPDqplVJSWjPyxSWrBF5RE1htURuRyESVzAhWayk0z-5PJkGglGBwHEy0JJO-jhpAXQEZihhyr23oS-zxSUcqr3rGNjzqyotbet8Ppj4YeAb-Ude9t1pKbMMbHuZ6MvB7q3Oj9WDg761SuNMWGPj0vYW8zQw8by7sP7mUfIyaoZhXyuWd6P8-nw5-AwAA__-CEVgc) and is administered by the Comptroller’s office. To date, it has distributed $12 million for 20 projects across the state, and 24 counties have been selected for a second round of funding.
## Enron Returns As Elaborate Joke
Enron, the infamous Houston-based energy company that collapsed in 2001 due to a massive fraud scandal, has [been "relaunched" as a satirical parody](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSrCAURL8GMy3ulRENCF5CNi_d0AK5jNSiTAEzjn-_5eYbddLVfep83ee7CTHsj_9mI1U_Ps3IUbSALRezMyGes2icstxN0JAC2fc9wDQOzapuIJy3IL23fhkWARJRSimMn6bRk22CusYAuQDAUQzdSJMBL2-DROxvKJjg5EJNuasrVfqY4uOZ3pS7JW1NVGutz8L6fww1Q30cR_cqpiZnzqvAUJea8slQb2mnK-2rhJ1KYaiva4YakKHmPUNNe057a83y3WaK5rUva_s0ObmzPciWUImhloNE2cPIuWSom6zc8wgxhjJIJvhjMyH-stU_Zb0V_gQAAP__tsJpdg). A [new website with the company’s branding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8GtljccTEwMHTxlq4dLVKO-CRsIhulyd9X6d756T3pfV3mS5Iq2-0zrRz7s7QZDdIJ8GRozknqayad49XkAJojOGstQPCjXiI7Zyw6IPTgr4iOCnAJqYTsrWWjJb5jgIYA0NM4eA4JijuPDtGekRQZztLbPvSFOz_TUeqrPXgfvtuqa1x6vx_KfiicFE687W17E4WT3mO-_0itcoxOkbmtSeqf1f_deET8DQAA__8bqEfa) debuted on Monday, the 23rd anniversary of Enron's bankruptcy. The site features a press release announcing its new mission to “solve the global energy crisis” and a promotional video with corporate platitudes about progress and innovation. The project appears to be [the work of Connor Gaydos](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OtCAUQJ8GOwz3iqIFxfcVdrPNFlsalKuygzAB5se338z2W5_k5OR8XaaLcd6F7cMcpMtrjRMKlByQCzlZ4_w5ycrqWdgBKtKgmqYBGPqu2vW62E4pEkINspGwCCMEYW8G1c4KpK2cfssAhQTAXnZ1T4OBVbWdQmxalEwKsq7EVJedCr1MXv0ZH5TqJR6V13spt8yafwxHhqOZl0DPXG_xjRmO_-_ZBcqZ4fh0iT5LTCfDkUKKgc9mufLveCW-xnRQ4nTcfDyJMvfmvu0ubBygk6javq-Stren897lTjEptsM4_xtR_rzy0PgTAAD__53lZBE), who purchased the Enron trademark for $275 in 2020. Gaydos has participated in other parody projects, including the “Birds Aren’t Real” conspiracy popularized through social media. The website [explicitly states](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8Gd1jsGkNcULzGXV57pUXMOqBgiAwXnL8_5frrRzPSfF2Xqw0xpPt_u5Op55YXFCg5IBdycTbE9yI7Z27CTdCRAT0MA8B0UZ03SsM26EkCjatA0BOJUaJTGhwRbGMXzEcGKCQAXqTqLzRZ2PSoNOIwomRSkAs1H331VOm0ZYvv_KKjX_PeReNrfRY2_GM4M5xba_2WT1Q-f5ea0wdiOCdqheEcCqd05MR3-wjpzte8082uD-7poMKbt5U34o-UW3cY92whxlCUZlLcdxvib7L--eBl8CcAAP__uLZesw) that it is a “First Amendment protected parody” and for “entertainment purposes only.” That doesn’t mean visitors can’t buy merchandise or sign up for its emails.

clean_body: Enron, the infamous Houston-based energy company that collapsed in 2001 due to a massive fraud scandal, has been "relaunched" as a satirical parody. | | | | | | Wednesday, December 4, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1928, Carl G. Cromwell drilled the on University of Texas land in Reagan County, defying orders to shut down work at the site. At a depth of 8,525 feet, the University 1-B remained the world’s deepest oil well until 1931. If you like going fast, you'll be excited to hear about the , a new amusement park being built next to a racetrack in Austin. Do you love Texas? So do our 230,000+ readers. Advertise in The Texas Flyover and connect your business with passionate locals. . We're flying today with . They are offering an investment opportunity you won't want to miss. Abilene 🌧️ 65/49° | Amarillo 🌤️ 59/37° | Austin 🌧️ 63/53° | Brownsville 🌦️ 76/62° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 75/68° | DFW 🌧️ 54/50° | El Paso ⛅ 68/47° | Houston 🌦️ 71/58° | Lubbock ⛅ 65/43° | San Antonio 🌦️ 68/55° | Texarkana 🌧️ 51/37° | Austin's Property Tax Rate Is Nation's Highest According to a recent report by Redfin, the Austin metropolitan area with an effective property tax rate of 1.8%. San Antonio, Houston, and Fort Worth are close behind, each with effective property tax rates of 1.7%, while Dallas sits at 1.6%. Property tax payments in Texas have , with elevated home values driving increases as high as 44.1% in Fort Worth and 43.4% in San Antonio. Property taxes now account for a significant portion of monthly housing costs, making up 20% of the median housing bill in Austin and 19% in San Antonio and Houston, compared to a nationwide average of 8%. State legislators have taken measures to reduce property taxes in recent years, with some advocating for the complete elimination of property taxes, which, according to estimates, would cost the state $81.5 billion annually. Billions in Broadband Funding Available The Texas Broadband Development Office is to update maps showing which areas of the state have the least access to reliable high-speed internet service. The data will be used to distribute more than $5 billion in state and federal funds allocated for the expansion of broadband internet service in Texas, which has been and a cumbersome application process for grants. Last month, the state for its plan to use $3.3 billion in allocated funds from the 2021 Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. The state’s broadband office was and is administered by the Comptroller’s office. To date, it has distributed $12 million for 20 projects across the state, and 24 counties have been selected for a second round of funding. Enron Returns As Elaborate Joke Enron, the infamous Houston-based energy company that collapsed in 2001 due to a massive fraud scandal, has . A debuted on Monday, the 23rd anniversary of Enron's bankruptcy. The site features a press release announcing its new mission to “solve the global energy crisis” and a promotional video with corporate platitudes about progress and innovation. The project appears to be , who purchased the Enron trademark for $275 in 2020. Gaydos has participated in other parody projects, including the “Birds Aren’t Real” conspiracy popularized through social media. The website that it is a “First Amendment protected parody” and for “entertainment purposes only.” That doesn’t mean visitors can’t buy merchandise or sign up for its emails. | Last Chance: Own this “unlisted” stock before its share price changes When the team that created Zillow and grew it into a $16B real estate leader starts a new company, investors take note. That’s why top firms like SoftBank and Maveron already invested in . And you can join them as an investor before their share price changes tomorrow on account of 38% adjusted gross profit growth in their first-half earnings. Pacaso’s streamlined digital marketplace offers fractional ownership of premier properties – completely revamping a $1.3T market. This co-ownership approach maximizes demand by minimizing costs and worries. Look no further than their 1,500+ happy homeowners across 40 destinations – including the most recent addition, Paris – With over $100M in gross profits in four years, they’re ready to bring this co-ownership model across the globe (and into your portfolio). | ➤ The Texas Department of Criminal Justice is withholding the identities of five terminally ill inmates whose whereabouts are unknown after they were released under Medically Recommended Intense Supervision (MRIS). () ➤ Lago Vista: City council members met with the White House to lobby for federal funds to upgrade and expand the city’s water infrastructure. With a current population of 13,000, fast-growing Lago Vista could have up to 40,000 residents within a decade. () ➤ Amarillo: The Texas Department of Transportation has asked for community input on a feasibility study to extend I-27 from Amarillo to Dumas. In-person meetings are being held today in Dumas and tomorrow in Amarillo. () ➤ The Grand Prairie ISD board voted to fire Superintendent Jorge Arredondo during a closed session Monday. Arredondo sued the board after he was suspended in September for alleged violations of the district’s discrimination, harassment, and retaliation policy. () ➤ Odessa: Ongoing efforts to fix a malicious software script discovered on Nov. 21 have prevented residents from paying city bills online and forced the county court system to reschedule dockets and revert to paper filing methods. () ➤ Lindale: Firefighter Corey Crowell is retiring after 46 years of service, beginning when he was 16 years old. Crowell was elected to the Smith County Emergency Services District 1 Board last month. () Enjoy reading The Texas Flyover?mailto:?cc=editor@thetexasflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20news%20source&body=Hey!%0A%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Texas%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you'll%20love%20it%20too.%0A%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20Texas%20news.%20They%20cover%20everything%20happening%20around%20the%20state%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0A%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0A%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fthetexasflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3DDL%0A%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will! to share with your friends and family. | ➤ The College Football Rankings released last night puts Texas at No. 2 with a projected No. 2 seed in the 12-team bracket to be finalized next week. SMU is ranked No. 11, but with a current projected seed of No. 3 in the playoff. () ➤ Houston Texans linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair has been suspended for three games for his late hit on Jacksonville Jaguars quarterback Trevor Lawrence. () ➤ Alperen Sengun of the Houston Rockets was named the NBA’s Western Conference Player of the Week after averaging 21.3 points with 12.7 rebounds and 9.0 assists since Nov. 25. () ➤ Yesterday’s results:||| Flying together with our sponsor ➤** quickly and easily removes dangerous pesticide residues, bacteria, and mold from your fruits and vegetables. You’ll be shocked to see just how dirty your fruits & veg actually were... and even more shocked at how much better they taste, all thanks to AquaPure! () | ➤Elon Musk’s Neuralink, which aims to help people with paralysis control devices using their brain activity via implantable chips, is building a $14.7 million facility in Del Valle, just down the road from the Tesla Gigafactory. () ➤ The Tyler Economic Development Council purchased 281 acres to create a new business park. “ We are getting tremendous interest on this property, and we only closed two hours ago ,” said EDC president Scott Martinez on Monday. () ➤ COTALand, a highly-anticipated amusement park to be constructed on the grounds of the Circuit of the Americas racetrack in Austin, unveiled plans for projects totaling $105 million. This was the year we fired Joe Biden, and put America back on the path to greatness!

To celebrate this incredible year, we're offering our exclusive **[2024 Commemorative Ornament](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00ce06beb0b94f73aac605ac715218b1&_e=VIdyz4aaXfc1b7W1mS51Oot8N_NAS2wvuAj1vN7P1PNtscKA6UVY1d1RwuyaE-UlhuHCPcx0H_L953Yq9iyrw4LnhY3uqv0XA6Vix7JxEddcSUNa3W0ZczdWRIMICDIwcPdCeOkTieDgGy4aOCybgSs2GB1GIsSSChvVFesvJneWyFSy2_4rfzzMPIhzcMllN1Uqf-k5c65ZD4ZIshMsCoKYfnXamvKOsl90OULKk6Jfnn1y_AzdfQv8aivRS4RcTew3wR8SQF_JrKZn1c1Ir6sNV-t0mfsSwOYVfwnLPtNpwNfhvL4Lwrl9PbB9Fb0St9PWzVUir1lnCyH4gkidZd06HJJo_dSHUfQ7e5-Ycd2JDlkvXydCXa7ReVQ-ZLcu1c2yO9IZmkC2kyE0nsgPh5GVdZD9FwANnaoKuu2o6QJZPWds2JcgfLbRmWdtAWMofFRSlr89R2RwHlAT7PBSpZh9lCexEnIykYNDPqHldeQ%3D "2024 Commemorative Ornament")** to our most dedicated supporters like you.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/497966903baa536c/?utm_campaign=20241119&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card,
and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

But there’s one thing I want to make clear...

...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal
Defense Trust.

_THAT’S A LIE. _

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,
I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of
course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to
contribute, please don’t. End of story.

But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my
freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice,
and rights of every U.S. citizen.

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND, BECAUSE
EVEN AFTER EVERYTHING THE LEFT HAS DONE TO ME, I WILL _NEVER_
SURRENDER THE FIGHT FOR FREEDOM AND JUSTICE.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1783, George Washington delivered an emotional farewell to his officers at Fraunces Tavern in New York City, marking the end of the Revolutionary War. The event is commemorated with annual reenactments. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jz1vszAURn-NvQXZ9_rjZfCQV1GkDmm7ZUQmXAdXJkZgQPTXV3Tv-jzSOTr3W3PzMcXX890P5ErIDQhQJwknoZrOx7Q3incuEAEhJyctIkqQUvLeKWGgNhSQDLTeaEkQILTB29BZMjWP7qBJEEpK1KKuHjVpbdES2NbIf5opQV0seaq-cnyVnkLa80pT9cgDT64vZZwZnhlcGVy3bav2vJSlpeM_Fl8ePcPryvBSf96Xt4-z1d-KgfHDyPB_YXjRduaT68YtphRnY5kSz8HH9KsofyWvDn4CAAD__ys-VgY). ## Trump, Macron to Meet in Paris
President-elect Donald Trump has announced he will attend the [reopening celebration of Notre Dame Cathedral](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn-NvRFxBxgzMHTJlq4drbM5EipsLEwT5d9X7t7x0ye9J72v23SjlNN2_6SVfYtlQolaAAqpp0ApvyfdBx-ZkVXPHqxSChAA-ocfB5LazaMkUFbbEReFziDFGIxiCn3yJw1QagBlpLssjo2xyjLaeYDRdFpySK3Uy3dJW3twzO_y5HpZytpn_2htPzr10eG1wyvtG7-O8zpHbWnJ3OG11Z91FzvVdIittMoi0MpipaWWTSgMTo4Dq4ARgXi0EM08A6B06Gbuqw_7K-WcjsF2Wt5XSvlP3_7L8fT4GwAA__8fRF93) in Paris this weekend, marking his first foreign trip since winning the November presidential election. The reopening ceremonies, set for Saturday and Sunday, will bring together roughly 50 world leaders, including U.S. First Lady Jill Biden, to mark the cathedral's return after a five-year reconstruction following the 2019 fire. Following a [personal plea from French President](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8Gb1jcHYR4YOjiLV07WtgcMRUGy6Gx8vdVund-0nvS-7pNN59yKvdPv7FrsU6oUEtAqfQUfMqvSXfBRWZk6tiBJSJAAOhWd_VzhGiix-FiZhsi8DUQk-HZLt5Sl9zbBqg0ABk19MvAxliyjHa-wNUIrTikVo_-u6bSVo75VZ989EvduuzW1vaHoA-Bo8DxPM_-5dda31TgWPh8CBw3vxy1yD2zDxxkO362Xe5rLSx9a1yCREVKWT1Qv7Ytd4cL-5lyTo-LFVrdN5_yX7D9N-Dp8DcAAP__ISNdHQ) Emmanuel Macron during a recent phone call, Trump's attendance comes as European leaders seek to strengthen relations with the president-elect.
## S. Korea Declares, Then Ends, Martial Law
South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol declared [martial law late Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQgOGnsbegu7ONYfDQhS1dOyLA53CVgQgsUN6-SvfMv_RJ_8-9vw-SZX18DwuHkraegOwN6Qa2j4PkV291DImZ2GgO6I0xSIio59AONCZfG0eusdGDTwDctJBqn9BR1BLeGhJYROOgraaWnfPGM_mxxsYpCxylbHv1u8laZk75tZ28V9O26BzmUp6HMl-KOkXddV3VOE7vpqhb-ToUdVlOVtRNq2kMITbARe8hPi_JWY7aKwuPZZD8L5ZPh2egvwAAAP__3U1PuA) but reversed the order six hours later after a swift backlash from lawmakers, protests, and international concern. Yoon claimed the measure was necessary to counter [pro-North Korea threats](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMFutCAURp8GdxguF4VZsPiTP-6m2y4N4nWkRZggHePbNzbddvclJ_lyct7v492FGNLjzW1k65JHKaTiILlQ4-xCPEfVzHYhkoQNWdCICBIAmtU6ggnRaCSj0RjoJy_6m16mDpUxIJpgrzeQQgFgJ26tv1HXadQk9dSD6ZgSNIeaS_uRQ6orLfHMLyqtz1sT7Vrrc2f4j8mByeE4jjZNPtGxX5zJ4ZoXyCXOTA57_qor_8yFXOKbKzW4yKM7OG1UHpT8yYtPDozsRc9w8GFm-J-2OKYpjb-q2BQ7P48QY9h7zZR4bC7EH6H6V6CXld8BAAD__zXBZhM), but the announcement triggered a parliamentary resolution condemning it as unconstitutional. Protesters gathered outside the National Assembly, while opposition from lawmakers—including members of Yoon’s own party—forced his reversal. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGunDAQheGnMd2s7LGBpXCRxt1NmxLNwnBxYjCyZxfx9hHpUx_p16fz62v8opji_v2TNvay5BE1OjAI2o0zxXSNrpn9woxsG_amt9YaNMY0q7fPqRtm-3wtOLmO7fDSzqHTejGktXVN9HfNoHbG2FYPj2ngtu1tz9i_OvNsldM8R8nl8TvHXVZe0pU_XB5T3prkV5GjKvtDYVAY9uvIVe5JYbjDCoNBhUFbheHMJc2w81kVhsr5naDmt6zwJxcm4PI-pELcJcO0Uq5AFY6ShatwqTAlqiucUVagsl1wK2CjIpESJDph5ilRIYl5Vxia4ufjjCnF2vXK6e-NYvqnlv-9-PH4NwAA__8wp3TC). The sudden declaration, South Korea’s first martial law since 1980, caused brief unrest and financial uncertainty, drawing shock and concern from allies. U.S. officials said they had no prior warning.
