subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=10d558cdde5d49eeb16583b73bba7a28&_e=zsRXqTWfkyTINuxp871M0l2HfTyMpinEarA_qzcYsFr7msDD1GP3wuTCL7HCmuGH15xUlZ4ppaOqE66yG1oE_cdxnWyNxUfgTgu8Y9GL5h3xqeUWu2xxnUlIGevDiMvUhIHOGiJkXxCbAh44mx3NpOIjdam5fvkft0wtYVLslKvNmGmnKr8-C7Bxu-rpLKYo3hP0AqmVAESbdirDOaV8OC0t1xHmOYryenWm7DG3JD7PYuM3iHB5D06QKR_GXWzx3Pzbu-5nZn5TI5xvELow9w4yNpYT4GPsISVXe6Rx9ovWv-73ASv4Oyd4aqqw3c7DD3VqFAn4MxozFhO84qztLPVnN2MNET3-IpPcChD7TbA2D3jf_WQ7C9oRjY4Ow24D5GvYNXGk_Wjtwv_beJ9HTVvJCG19-NJDXge6Ivh0lTbYqV7LfuQETIM10AtcoiU-) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=10d558cdde5d49eeb16583b73bba7a28&_e=zsRXqTWfkyTINuxp871M0l2HfTyMpinEarA_qzcYsFr7msDD1GP3wuTCL7HCmuGH15xUlZ4ppaOqE66yG1oE_cdxnWyNxUfgTgu8Y9GL5h3xqeUWu2xxnUlIGevDiMvUhIHOGiJkXxCbAh44mx3NpOIjdam5fvkft0wtYVLslKvNmGmnKr8-C7Bxu-rpLKYo3hP0AqmVAESbdirDOaV8OC0t1xHmOYryenWm7DG3JD7PYuM3iHB5D06QKR_GXWzx3Pzbu-5nZn5TI5xvELow97u5bppGfHBKccQVcnjIaX9WACPV66CgNKHNsJ69DHnX--26TizbsX4tBy6q6TXGAflotdEKfw41dU4diXBc1ML1cAQl0fb6rqdDtgqzLxkDL4AJaaFT-IUAERc_Py7ZyMdoDLsCo_6UHALK_lnj_Q6CCLXUGkhErBpNSP_fvPAV) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=10d558cdde5d49eeb16583b73bba7a28&_e=zsRXqTWfkyTINuxp871M0l2HfTyMpinEarA_qzcYsFr7msDD1GP3wuTCL7HCmuGH15xUlZ4ppaOqE66yG1oE_cdxnWyNxUfgTgu8Y9GL5h3xqeUWu2xxnUlIGevDiMvUhIHOGiJkXxCbAh44mx3NpOIjdam5fvkft0wtYVLslKvNmGmnKr8-C7Bxu-rpLKYo3hP0AqmVAESbdirDOaV8OC0t1xHmOYryenWm7DG3JD7PYuM3iHB5D06QKR_GXWzx3Pzbu-5nZn5TI5xvELow99YSSLEJYZcac82jUQCNjSFYmcqNHYOxWJeNkuWyTZZ6X8_yJG7Vd3llkG4NSz_ceIvPlFOeIdTeMZGyN3HtIiQGmS4Lbr3t2_RgyBflpMUSB9a3bw057jxgYMXqDissD8SKp0pGmNISM0Q1T_Ffrf4S8mv3zrkMasERMvT7RGw-)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=10d558cdde5d49eeb16583b73bba7a28&_e=zsRXqTWfkyTINuxp871M0l2HfTyMpinEarA_qzcYsFr7msDD1GP3wuTCL7HCmuGH15xUlZ4ppaOqE66yG1oE_cdxnWyNxUfgTgu8Y9GL5h3xqeUWu2xxnUlIGevDiMvUhIHOGiJkXxCbAh44mx3NpOIjdam5fvkft0wtYVLslKvNmGmnKr8-C7Bxu-rpLKYo3hP0AqmVAESbdirDOaV8OC0t1xHmOYryenWm7DG3JD7PYuM3iHB5D06QKR_GXWzx3Pzbu-5nZn5TI5xvELow9ywoHDJ7Iv1WoX6IQ2sIAWy7qtAdVqp9IPIgm2-Duxe6GbFizcoMPECyabqqr2o4c88OTRZnZUS_vET_GGEY5R6EZLwvVyyBzA20hMqo9gjbUM6FU1xYe4H97N0Cs_ir--mjY81BdrhWm21eVnsJRhpo2eILniP_foI-Cvxc3gdl)**

body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HEq2sCtYZam_3LdqLPwG5w~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HEq2sCtYZam_3LdqLPwG5w~~/AARclAA~~~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HEq2sCtYZam_3LdqLPwG5w~~/AARclAA~~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HEq2sCtYZam_3LdqLPwG5w~~/AARclAA~~~)**

name: History Facts
subject: How Alexander Graham Bell thought we should answer the phone
body:
“Ahoy” is an 18th-century term most commonly used as a nautical greeting, though it was nearly reappropriated as the standard greeting for answering the phone. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cmz0jhakaf2psurtvwfp59irc8hva6netk4bmf5f71te3ir4zf21sojxvrp2ntcyscsc5gaa32yigan9agmpianpz9f8l7op4gd68oqmyqzc48e13bz4lcgbm7gtvt8c38z5vpxw51cg0pg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Alexander Graham Bell proposed using “ahoy” to answer the phone.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| “A hoy” is an 18th-century term most commonly used as a nautical greeting, though it was nearly [reappropriated](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) as the standard greeting for answering the phone. This suggestion came from Alexander Graham Bell — the inventor of the telephone — who received a patent for the device on March 7, 1876. Bell made the first phone call to his assistant Thomas Watson three days later, speaking the historic words: “Mr. Watson, come here. I want to see you.” While that inaugural call lacked any special greeting, Bell proposed using “ahoy” as a suitable introduction for phone calls going forward.
---
Bell’s contemporary Thomas Edison proposed an entirely different word for answering phone calls: “hello.” This relatively new term was first published in 1827, and despite its recency, Edison believed that “hello” was the perfect way to begin a phone call because it was easily distinguishable from other words. He first recommended using “hello” in an [1877 letter](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to the president of the Central District and Printing Telegraph Company of Pittsburgh, and the connection between “hello” and telephones only grew from there.
With both “ahoy” and “hello” as potential candidates, many early phone books accepted Edison’s suggestion, or derivations thereof. The very first phone book published — released by the Connecticut District Telephone Company in New Haven — recommended that readers begin phone calls with “a firm and cheery ‘hulloa.’” Other phone books of the time printed the term “hello” in their “how to” sections. By 1880, Bell’s “ahoy” suggestion fell by the wayside, while Edison’s “hello” was adopted as the standard.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Alexander Graham Bell's middle name was a birthday present.
The inventor we know today as Alexander Graham Bell lacked a middle name when he was born on March 3, 1847. Christened Alexander Bell and known to his family simply as “Aleck,” the young boy spent the first 10 years of his life without a middle name, unlike his brothers Melville James Bell and Edward Charles Bell. After expressing his desire for a middle name — possibly to help differentiate himself from his father and grandfather, both of whom were named Alexander — the future inventor got his wish. On Bell’s [11th birthday](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snyxqc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), he was given permission to assume a middle name. He adopted the moniker “Graham,” taking inspiration from a temporary houseguest and former student of Bell’s father named Alexander Graham. The family admired the guest dearly, and rechristened their own son as Alexander Graham Bell in his honor.

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Trump, Elon, & The Bee
body:
Voters have made their voices heard.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ebf28010e5d46eb80edd0804be27646&_e=u1f72VAbrL7XCduK6EJF2-OWhLlcFmia1Qh4yO6jP8Iw6cgdpT6wMCBDseugGcniAYcvM-maq03qLOq5-kevlxztW4tj5EYedTPvscCGKpM_oP85yQ0OOLsr2q2IZO6LZolxn_HpzuQ41sS3U0gez5Tj0q6eXgDuu6nD8vquOWxO-IQ2b0kP5dJoBdKiNLJUhkQE7DnAPK8ehJ0l5wiHjiyzp9C-1tX-b6YDILPbkD1DScShq_5ECaFpsdprEWXw4c5Ma0Z1Eg6UlFlg56N1GQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ebf28010e5d46eb80edd0804be27646&_e=u1f72VAbrL7XCduK6EJF2-OWhLlcFmia1Qh4yO6jP8Iw6cgdpT6wMCBDseugGcniAYcvM-maq03qLOq5-kevlxztW4tj5EYedTPvscCGKpM_oP85yQ0OOLsr2q2IZO6L7M8Yikzz6nlQz__b5jlsS1Mmcy2xURNbl3lAbROro6vDkTGR760kxjyRdtKZ-ZC-wXlH4d9IIzku0BEXoFQx0u4BbBlpXs7Wcui6bDQpW-OJQWdTexpJFHoLdmteyRtI2yIghKxrnISJ20zELE6avQ%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ebf28010e5d46eb80edd0804be27646&_e=u1f72VAbrL7XCduK6EJF2-OWhLlcFmia1Qh4yO6jP8Iw6cgdpT6wMCBDseugGcniAYcvM-maq03qLOq5-kevlxztW4tj5EYedTPvscCGKpM_oP85yQ0OOLsr2q2IZO6L-tgOQGJXDWSHzbTigInxsQsiMNvwPi9bIyUViBVlT8RwrMh6-ZFbmW6ovHdGPuUttmxONsLp5HM9Z97L6H2KWPkFhzDntr1YNZ3s4SBkuf-R38iakgHHp8QcUbNBeH4ncZD5J_m6gXTKRmEf4dFYFQ%3D%3D)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ebf28010e5d46eb80edd0804be27646&_e=u1f72VAbrL7XCduK6EJF2-OWhLlcFmia1Qh4yO6jP8Iw6cgdpT6wMCBDseugGcniAYcvM-maq03qLOq5-kevlxztW4tj5EYedTPvscCGKpM_oP85yQ0OOLsr2q2IZO6LMyH1IJksmXWoWmoGHIVZOdX4FU8FRJIobxGorknA0iCAUZ1V5-u749EdslYHt1jkkiuAW3nP3le7dP2k0qWpxIqA696IgUu9QnnVck9K0RiXSSRbsLbryLmlXDFq1HnIhL-LfOzjslGlIT4UAuEUeg%3D%3D)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ebf28010e5d46eb80edd0804be27646&_e=u1f72VAbrL7XCduK6EJF2-OWhLlcFmia1Qh4yO6jP8Iw6cgdpT6wMCBDseugGcniAYcvM-maq03qLOq5-kevlxztW4tj5EYedTPvscCGKpM_oP85yQ0OOLsr2q2IZO6LkL17cNw-xKvE04yUPuGfap7iF-jYGrhyOzN1qgdHKWXUNLL6uq-jo8ZvjGeslkAwujFAbjEu9T55LoASvwDjVAEEcsZgeQEqPefWORii-KLwKuRaqHQlKaxLkw4KYdItFmaHNaTcB_m_ZbyBYycYww%3D%3D)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ebf28010e5d46eb80edd0804be27646&_e=u1f72VAbrL7XCduK6EJF2-OWhLlcFmia1Qh4yO6jP8Iw6cgdpT6wMCBDseugGcniAYcvM-maq03qLOq5-kevlxztW4tj5EYedTPvscCGKpM_oP85yQ0OOLsr2q2IZO6LB4KWA5p4WUuZIhYSDzXhJGiEylnsWFtGgeCE2JLNvTbwiBcu_SiZwA-VMbRmWMgUbu8A05cMQSK264j-gVD7GQZ24NXtCfI8j7HeesceAx4fZ0vTcKzUmpts2fPTxq5Ooda9njQ5nULOtAzLQIW2Gw%3D%3D)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ebf28010e5d46eb80edd0804be27646&_e=u1f72VAbrL7XCduK6EJF2-OWhLlcFmia1Qh4yO6jP8Iw6cgdpT6wMCBDseugGcniAYcvM-maq03qLOq5-kevlxztW4tj5EYedTPvscCGKpM_oP85yQ0OOLsr2q2IZO6LyKgoA-S63vJrqyZeTA3d-1lHUbIx8rWKcZypOem4IBHZ3HvI6nZUEWjJmF6WBUHIxWHVeWM8fpib-Dnlw2yGIbyVTjEr-Y0mIQzG00gR7XZyI4cs97JiyH97M0HRE1uyDWqZ23pbm_8NvgRdaYxqbw%3D%3D)
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ebf28010e5d46eb80edd0804be27646&_e=u1f72VAbrL7XCduK6EJF2-OWhLlcFmia1Qh4yO6jP8Iw6cgdpT6wMCBDseugGcniAYcvM-maq03qLOq5-kevlxztW4tj5EYedTPvscCGKpM_oP85yQ0OOLsr2q2IZO6L0N5TkiV_ZG04xGX0VWqnVnEG9I5JogFnca1MO84WQLeXEmYoNSqHUw3q_twlEcv_h4Yd3X5ZXDT1zjCPjwRCXZdABwZHWz4_ZtHOdcTgnXKWqmE4HQqCdaD1AN-lt3ly7IBB6zMucas0tGtQhs7dgw%3D%3D)
---
Thanks for supporting free speech. **We 'll never give up the fight.**Seth Dillon
CEO, The Babylon Bee

This was the year we fired Joe Biden, and put America back on the path to greatness!

To celebrate this incredible year, we're offering our exclusive **[2024 Commemorative Ornament](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=756f8e0c767c4648ad6b4224525c80ed&_e=ug38cLmsD3b41L9ES2lgtnhH8KYPSe27m5O9aqoUkZwRQNFUR5uMTHtUnj4IxzvgVCievnSqYflvuCQNUDnP4sh1HHv8St_d8JR-2X13UxFt1r99OElUOBp3mu6HRJA3lsNo5RZdqhdXl72Lhv-2d9SdS_7MW3E5gS-0G_mBEbz5tpbOC1ddZtmS9wJsLvirNmBFs27z5fvouC39ayETWDZcK6-z0nGth4goIBHe9FD3YSPMHs5EbVymnn0FevfrlcSu01UZ1bVRZDzr_vxAELjwdMKT1ypaDnS6ZYuuxjAILBNO6mOXk8NuNXDp7no8Dj-aGmgAsw2QPTWycMzlTstqqvIr3pjrmReayHuCoY1U--qob3Lff1fbShYKFZyQrzoT3sadfbuMV8HE2vxWxnNi8FUrNG_6KLVKo0_joWlenGbkVNFRf2eFtre67a6yscXyfY75sh3TrTFYpBMkZB7dRMUmeYHMNbq-LX-OUEc%3D "2024 Commemorative Ornament")** to our most dedicated supporters like you.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/4/2024
body:
‘Most corrupt and partisan President our nation has ever seen’
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
Here’s a summary of today's newsletter using the attached articles:
**Here in Colorado...** Rep. Lauren Boebert calls out Biden as the ['most corrupt and partisan President our nation has ever seen'](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) amidst him pardoning his son Hunter Biden. Meanwhile, her replacement, Jeff Hurd, often called Colorado’s "accidental politician," prepares to represent the state in Congress to take on [Colorado’s fight against corruption](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Colorado also set a [new record for fentanyl seizures](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in 2024, with nearly 2.7 million pills recovered.
Locally, [Aurora’s police force faces new scrutiny](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) under a council member’s warnings about an upcoming operation targeting the department.
**In National News...** As President-elect Trump continues to announce key leadership roles, the "Make America Healthy Again" team is drawing attention for its [bold reform agenda](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) aimed at tackling the nation's health and bureaucracy crises.
**Commentary Spotlight...** A closer look at the[ implications of Hunter Biden’s pardon](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) reveals what many critics consider a betrayal of accountability, further fueling mistrust in governmental institutions.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, December 4, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[‘Most corrupt and partisan President our nation has ever seen’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
The question 4th District U.S. Rep. Ken Buck, R-Windsor, once popularly asked was “Where’s Hunter?” Now, the nation and his successor, U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert, R-Windsor, want to know “Why Hunter?”
The troubled son of the President, Hunter Biden was given a pardon by Joe Biden on Sunday, an erasure of his litany of criminal wrongdoings. It was not accompanied by pardons for Jan. 6 protesters, Julian Assange or even for Donald J. Trump — just for his son, Hunter.
“Joe Biden is the most corrupt and partisan President our nation has ever seen,” Boebert started a Twitter/X post on Tuesday.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Jeff Hurd, taking over 3rd District seat, headlines new crop of legislators in U.S. House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Jeff Hurd, an attorney and political newcomer, won Colorado's 3rd Congressional District seat, replacing Lauren Boebert. His campaign focused on providing voters a choice and delivering pragmatic solutions for rural Colorado.
* Hurd avoided a primary challenge from Boebert, who left the district to run in Colorado’s 4th District, and he defeated Adam Frisch by a wider margin than Boebert's narrow 2022 victory.
* Hurd emphasizes a collaborative approach, aiming to address critical issues such as energy independence, water management, and border security while reflecting the conservative values of his district.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[‘Operation Aurora is coming,’ Council member warns Aurora police chief, staff](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Aurora Councilwoman Danielle Jurinsky warned city staff and police about President-elect Trump's "Operation Aurora," a plan targeting mass deportation of illegal immigrants, emphasizing its implications for local law enforcement.
* Chief Todd Chamberlain reported a notable decrease in crimes like vehicle theft and homicides but resisted external assistance, stating that current measures suffice and mass deportations would demoralize staff.
* The ACLU of Colorado criticized "Operation Aurora," arguing it violates state laws limiting local collaboration with federal immigration enforcement and pledged to defend immigrant communities' rights

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado seizes nearly 2.7 million fentanyl pills in 2024, setting new record with month to go](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [KKTV-TV CBS 11](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado has set a new record for fentanyl seizures in 2024, with nearly 2.7 million pills confiscated so far, surpassing last year’s total and highlighting the ongoing fight against drug cartels.
* Roughly 50% of the confiscated pills contain lethal amounts of fentanyl, underscoring the severe risks and challenges faced by law enforcement and the community in combating this crisis.
* The DEA's Rocky Mountain Field Division remains steadfast in addressing the issue, working tirelessly to disrupt the flow of these counterfeit and deadly pills into Colorado.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Make America Healthy Again: Trump Team Hypes MAHA Dream Team](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [BREITBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* President Trump’s administration is rolling out the "Make America Healthy Again" (MAHA) agenda with key nominees including Dr. Janette Nesheiwat as Surgeon General, RFK Jr. at Health and Human Services, and Dr. Marty Makary leading the FDA.
* RFK Jr. and Dr. Oz are at the forefront of the effort to reform the healthcare system, combat corruption, and address the chronic health crisis plaguing America. Their agenda prioritizes banning harmful chemicals in food and creating a healthcare system free from Big Pharma influence.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Garbo: Hunter Biden’s pardon is the apex of corruption](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C.J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_President Joe Biden’s sweeping pardon of his son, Hunter Biden, covering all crimes committed or potentially committed between 2014 and 2024, represents not only a historic abuse of power but a grave affront to the principles of justice and democracy._
_It encapsulates years of suspicion and mounting evidence of corruption at the highest levels, justifying the worst fears of conservatives and others whose voices were silenced or dismissed by a complicit media._
_This pardon cannot be viewed in isolation; it is part of a larger web of criminality, collusion and a concerted effort to suppress dissent, manipulate public opinion and shield the Biden family from accountability. The implications are dire, and the actions taken by President Biden betray a deep corruption that undermines the very foundations of American democracy._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Rep. Thomas Massie, the 2024 keynote to RMGO, notes irony of President Biden pardon](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | NATIONAL | DECEMBER 2** _In the wake of President Joe Biden pardoning his son, Hunter, for a variety of criminal offenses, including the unlawful purchase of a firearm, one 2nd Amendment advocate familiar to gun-owning Coloradans noted the irony._
**[Schumann: Understanding special districts. Where your tax dollars meet local decisions and why you should care](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 2** _Coloradans, on average, will pay $540,680 in taxes over their lifetime. Many politicians promise to limit taxes once elected. President Trump believes there is a way the U.S. can abolish federal taxes._ __
[**Russel: If Republicans can deliver on populist platform, they can expand on majorities**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY ROBERT RUSSEL | COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 2** _Having won an impressive yet precarious electoral majority in the 2024 election, MAGA Republicans are faced with a conundrum — whether to follow several previous Republican majorities down the path of tired old policies that voters repeatedly reject, or embrace specific issues on which they campaigned to deliver what the voters asked._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🩺 DID YOU KNOW?** William Henry Harrison was the only president to study to become a **medical doctor**.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "I believe we are here on the planet Earth to live, grow up and do what we can to make this world a better place for all people to enjoy freedom." — Rosa Parks

Roughly 50% of the confiscated pills contain lethal amounts of fentanyl, underscoring the severe risks and challenges faced by law enforcement and the community in combating this crisis. The DEA's Rocky Mountain Field Division remains steadfast in addressing the issue, working tirelessly to disrupt the flow of these counterfeit and deadly pills into Colorado. | President Trump’s administration is rolling out the "Make America Healthy Again" (MAHA) agenda with key nominees including Dr. Janette Nesheiwat as Surgeon General, RFK Jr. at Health and Human Services, and Dr. Marty Makary leading the FDA. RFK Jr. and Dr. Oz are at the forefront of the effort to reform the healthcare system, combat corruption, and address the chronic health crisis plaguing America. Their agenda prioritizes banning harmful chemicals in food and creating a healthcare system free from Big Pharma influence. | BY C.J. GARBO, President Joe Biden’s sweeping pardon of his son, Hunter Biden, covering all crimes committed or potentially committed between 2014 and 2024, represents not only a historic abuse of power but a grave affront to the principles of justice and democracy. It encapsulates years of suspicion and mounting evidence of corruption at the highest levels, justifying the worst fears of conservatives and others whose voices were silenced or dismissed by a complicit media. This pardon cannot be viewed in isolation; it is part of a larger web of criminality, collusion and a concerted effort to suppress dissent, manipulate public opinion and shield the Biden family from accountability. The implications are dire, and the actions taken by President Biden betray a deep corruption that undermines the very foundations of American democracy. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ BY BRIAN PORTER | NATIONAL | DECEMBER 2 In the wake of President Joe Biden pardoning his son, Hunter, for a variety of criminal offenses, including the unlawful purchase of a firearm, one 2nd Amendment advocate familiar to gun-owning Coloradans noted the irony. BY JEN SCHUMANN | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 2 Coloradans, on average, will pay $540,680 in taxes over their lifetime. Many politicians promise to limit taxes once elected. President Trump believes there is a way the U.S. can abolish federal taxes. ROBERT RUSSEL | COMMENTARY |**DECEMBER 2 Having won an impressive yet precarious electoral majority in the 2024 election, MAGA Republicans are faced with a conundrum — whether to follow several previous Republican majorities down the path of tired old policies that voters repeatedly reject, or embrace specific issues on which they campaigned to deliver what the voters asked._ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🩺 DID YOU KNOW? William Henry Harrison was the only president to study to become a medical doctor. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "I believe we are here on the planet Earth to live, grow up and do what we can to make this world a better place for all people to enjoy freedom." — Rosa Parks | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. name: Left Action
subject: UPDATE: Target REVERSES decision to eliminate animal cruelty tools. Tell them to do what they promised!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Target: Animals Deserve Better](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74871930-5b58-43e5-823d-1f8380b7bfc0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e4cc14e-8b79-4930-802a-b89143d6834f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **Abused animals need your help.[Please sign this petition to Brian Cornell, the CEO of Target, urging the company to keep its animal welfare promises and stop using cruel cages and crates.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26884c59-27b5-403f-b003-57ccac96ce9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** On a typical egg factory farm, a hen is crammed into a battery cage roughly the size of a microwave with as many as nine other birds, where she is unable to spread her wings for her entire life. Each hen is forced to eat, sleep and defecate in the same limited space and is denied almost everything that is natural to her. Mother pigs in the pork industry are routinely confined to "gestation crates," which are small cages that prohibit the sensitive, intelligent mom from even being able to turn around. These conditions are not only cruel to animals, but they increase the spread of diseases like salmonella, leading public health and food safety organizations to oppose the caging of egg-laying chickens and crating of mother pigs. **[Nearly a decade ago, Target pledged to eliminate battery cages and gestation crates from its egg and pork supply chains](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta72cc0fa-9075-4b36-86e8-36d1af192d53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). However, the company has now changed its mind and decided to keep selling eggs and pork that come from caged chickens and crated pigs indefinitely.** This means that millions of chickens and pigs will continue to suffer in squalid, miserable cages and crates for Target even though the company told customers it would do away with allowing such abuse. **Abused animals need your help.[Please sign this petition to Brian Cornell, the CEO of Target, urging the company to keep its animal welfare promises and stop using cruel cages and crates.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1fc3f8c-4d2d-483b-9efa-a46cabb91565/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

body:
Should Elon Musk get involved?

| | | NEWS ALERT: MSNBC in a panic! Reports detail plans that would spin off MSNBC into a new company outside of NBC news, removing it from the NBC network and likely changing the name and branding! This could mark doomsday for the fake news media and the start of a nuclear meltdown at the home of some of President Trump’s fiercest media critics! MAGA patriots know it well: MSNBC has been a staunch propaganda machine for the DNC! But November 5th marked a palpable change in the relationship between Americans and their media sources. Millions of viewers across the country came face to face with the realization that everything the fake news media told them about President Trump - every disgusting lie, every last ditch smear campaign they launched out of desperation, every certainty they had announced that Kamala Harris would secure a sweeping victory - was nothing but corrupt LIES. **[**WE THE PEOPLE will no longer accept the mainstream media as the source of truth!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhq75oc1vp5tmbldctdbhsnmpi2smg9priva5kig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpj6ep74cdh2bs)** American trust in the media is plummeting! After everything he’s proven in turning Twitter into the most popular free-speech platform we’ve ever seen, Elon Musk may be the perfect man for the job. **_[**_They said his purchase of Twitter could never be done! That it would fail miserably! But he proved every doubter wrong!_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zthc822ajv88otdirq58asoku0rs50484rne8o28_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpj6ep74cdh2bs)_** With Elon at the helm, MSNBC’s transformation would be one for the ages and could SAVE our great nation’s trust and hope in the media again! **[We’re asking patriots across the country to join in petitioning for Elon Musk to take over MSNBC today!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7buv53o117sp9o12b5b5jptrm7e5kdlrdgnhfh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpj6ep74cdh2bs)**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
Brand-new kid's book "The 10 Commandments for Kids"
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d705c4a95bbf4c388b57d842893b2623&_e=-XI7n6f95OwaJPl41AahtyPSakA-pT6L02NtLjSXJpqHMOa-Jy010GYNWp2wIAhb_danpsb5bplWO9vEeModkPyyS2tWAFzE6DgwI4RbdiWzhB9-8VYDeJCtTwfKDVK4Z4cv9pB0289Dbw_3e9tzcL9Gha0gua0ooPpsHIgTDkcKN5ia7ZlBprhiV5Dm3GdBFBwa8YyKM_am0JB7qV0GbSC-dxfl9apmNnxeuhTldxSWOweOO8CINxne5G4ikng5vB1mnVBqX8yCNR9kOaa-MzLKjR-V-wN43ydrTqhNsW1ZrN4nSWIqZFlESt_eOnHVEtXjZlEkn-qcUFFqpMDPUnZ9aYtfROoYm0ATD8YgarZNYRzX63F7eUEVrvHJ8pPX)
---
Hello Peter,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d705c4a95bbf4c388b57d842893b2623&_e=-XI7n6f95OwaJPl41AahtyPSakA-pT6L02NtLjSXJpqHMOa-Jy010GYNWp2wIAhb_danpsb5bplWO9vEeModkPyyS2tWAFzE6DgwI4RbdiWzhB9-8VYDeJCtTwfKDVK4Z4cv9pB0289Dbw_3e9tzcL9Gha0gua0ooPpsHIgTDkcKN5ia7ZlBprhiV5Dm3GdBFBwa8YyKM_am0JB7qV0GbSC-dxfl9apmNnxeuhTldxSCKR18McIFvG-fxIPQwXJCa8VbF_UGFota4N0CoDCroBtmZ0juqjGBCnEp0TCz257E5FKaCPEuiBAKMr6kIuFOIChvNDg4PjE78nj9nEf77nwYcza_VCONVpPpI6crlyXC07Mg9vmUomJx5T2YInHO)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d705c4a95bbf4c388b57d842893b2623&_e=-XI7n6f95OwaJPl41AahtyPSakA-pT6L02NtLjSXJpqHMOa-Jy010GYNWp2wIAhb_danpsb5bplWO9vEeModkPyyS2tWAFzE6DgwI4RbdiWzhB9-8VYDeJCtTwfKDVK4Z4cv9pB0289Dbw_3e9tzcL9Gha0gua0ooPpsHIgTDkcKN5ia7ZlBprhiV5Dm3GdBFO8NNJLf1ze-6ar-Zhtvq4R4n5WktOvStH6oyHlNCdMavARr7wC_mwejbB9jWYPr3jUBVaNH0bzoasScZFq7LjBkXPX4_e3hmQa_D-SiMJr6FLm4goJ7F-Gxp7SvsssDB5sXW--LzezqVKXj62tG1xaoL29HMzsP5DDZLVl1mzg3IIomzkjP_sRVSHJtHFpo)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

PO Box 223609. Dallas, TX 75222

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: A free eBook on the most historic events in American history
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWTUSW_WNe

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTUSW_WNe

Dear
Fellow Conservative,

Because
you're someone who values America's heritage, we wanted to give
you access to this educational resource - the eBook "Moments in
American History."

This
eBook is a compilation of 22 significant events that have shaped
the United States. Each chapter dives into a key historical
moment, offering a concise and accessible overview that enriches
your understanding of America's profound heritage.

By
downloading this free eBook today, you will:

Gain
valuable insights into key moments and principles that have
shaped our nation.
Equip
yourself with a deeper understanding of American history to
better navigate current issues.
Take
a step towards preserving the essential foundations of our
republic for future generations.

Empower yourself to defend and uphold the values that make
America unique and strong.

"Moments
in American History" equips you with the knowledge you need to
appreciate and engage more deeply with America's story.

Click
here to request your free eBook of "Moments in American History"
and start your journey through the pivotal moments that define
our nation:
https://secured.heritage.org/free-moments-in-american-history-ebook/

We hope
this eBook inspires you to learn more about the importance of
American history, principles, and heritage.

Sincerely,

Kevin D.
Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The
Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington
D.C. 20002

name: SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?= From Team Scalise
subject: Urgent Update About Gaetz’s Seat in Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We know you’re probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

| |
---
| | | **URGENT UPDATE ABOUT SPECIAL ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT:**
__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

__Now:__ Early voting is about to begin in FL-01 and we urgently need your support to win key races like this!
| | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za8eb6ndrh02gveh328305ng7rus0hvlq0utb5bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm0or2cjh2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Do not forget this:

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

**_[That's why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks - before early voting begins - to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump's agenda.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv6q2q56hnifs13c41u78317109lac8k8g2mobe8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm0or2cjh2bs "That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks – before early voting begins – to help fill Matt Gaetz’s seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump’s agenda.")_**

We know you're probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

_Can you please help us? _
| [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztm67hcn0505tisicvd15q4v47chjjg7kuincq4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm0or2cjh2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Thank you for all you do,

**HOUSE REPUBLICANS**
Sent via Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9u11e3h8guri88ecu3r6a6d1t1i9dqgt750f040_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm0or2cjh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn6m93mb9mtj0krc22k21fse0buf1q7rv2ot3c70_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm0or2cjh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkfeann5vt7bfecoep5lsvbc86vtapkrarum8rl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm0or2cjh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Peter,

This past month has been a difficult one. We are all grappling with what the extremist, anti-abortion agenda of the incoming administration will mean for reproductive rights across the U.S.

**But here's what gives us hope: You.**

**Thanks to your incredible support, we not only met but exceeded our Giving Tuesday match goal! Every single dollar will go directly toward fighting attacks on abortion, defending essential reproductive health care, and advancing reproductive rights as fundamental human rights.**

If you missed our Giving Tuesday match, it's not too late to make an impact. [**Every gift fuels the fight to defend reproductive rights at this critical moment.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98145484/515718742/59579377?sourceid=1150078&utm_campaign=25emkge-1121aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=givingtuesday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRiMGUzNC00ZGIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iDsNI40cNK-naXsQv1vt9Fu8liEwZKFf7SF3n-ZETes=&emci=f716708c-ffac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=824b0e34-4db2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

The road ahead will not be easy, but with your passion and commitment, we are ready. Together, we will defend our lives, choices, and futures.

With gratitude,

Nancy Northup

clean_body: Thanks to you | | | ---|--- Peter, This past month has been a difficult one. We are all grappling with what the extremist, anti-abortion agenda of the incoming administration will mean for reproductive rights across the U.S. But here's what gives us hope: You. Thanks to your incredible support, we not only met but exceeded our Giving Tuesday match goal! Every single dollar will go directly toward fighting attacks on abortion, defending essential reproductive health care, and advancing reproductive rights as fundamental human rights. If you missed our Giving Tuesday match, it's not too late to make an impact. The road ahead will not be easy, but with your passion and commitment, we are ready. Together, we will defend our lives, choices, and futures. With gratitude, Nancy Northup President & CEO | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: From the steps of the Supreme Court
body:
People who went after our kids should be PUNISHED
| | |
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I63cGEZWk98egSfl0T_YA48svZbrmTOAYAhWy-2qHwShisaq9hl-k2iwa3Z_pBZYWPmTbD0By4y-XbvhGp3Yv9Fx27a095z9ZTIGY9_BbizhM-_7BkpCm_Vwn5VcAl9MzYgMhQz5pbgI837K2osLbL3qsae86e83IwOlLirYVjKe8KPnTaKfW81sZOX_LtNp0tM5LXJPbXhygZxZZc50Yg==&c=yTYDKqA6TPSkgcVztnSeZpWfgyfhhTu8TqiuBAeLBWsq1bnhq5XV6A==&ch=0HegSY3e-OWIvW-ZPSbOjRIk3u38LKwOj4ti1A0vRoL-zvsn-zYvTQ==)
---
| Friends,

You might think we'd take a victory lap after winning the most critical election in the history of our nation.
NOPE.
Today, I'm on the steps of the Supreme Court alongside patriots like Matt Walsh.
We're here to demand an end to the horrific mutilation of our children and the destruction of America's future.
Why? Because the American people sent a clear mandate: Drain the swamp. Protect our kids. End the billion-dollar schemes to emasculate and destroy the United States of America.
[That's why we filed an amicus brief and went to the steps of the Supreme Court. ](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I63cGEZWk98egSfl0T_YA48svZbrmTOAYAhWy-2qHwShisaq9hl-k2iwa3Z_pBZYgcD6iuIX-BTgo_m1AYM5Sn8p5C15ynH31DOea7znXYvoQBQU5tziUFEqfZwWq6S0HNaUdwaRzAqEo7bn0IqqGuFsRVtTFylXAylbXAqevWwiqg7WLQQPGnUuH_TdpwBmo3uhMA11Xs8=&c=yTYDKqA6TPSkgcVztnSeZpWfgyfhhTu8TqiuBAeLBWsq1bnhq5XV6A==&ch=0HegSY3e-OWIvW-ZPSbOjRIk3u38LKwOj4ti1A0vRoL-zvsn-zYvTQ==)
The idea that we would rob children of the chance to become fathers, to become mothers, is nothing short of CRIMINAL--and those responsible MUST BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE.
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I63cGEZWk98egSfl0T_YA48svZbrmTOAYAhWy-2qHwShisaq9hl-k2iwa3Z_pBZYzvhZK1Y462qtycPEiIfH87Qv2VAVkD0LchEvdhqNqVSWJhR-XIKd4X44dhjPf394tMj2OpVtCHnD_zGe3esp7HT9XNvvlyZyPJkQY9VKjxoqaKVtLkHdJVsmNPJBINCizg9V94-BEZw=&c=yTYDKqA6TPSkgcVztnSeZpWfgyfhhTu8TqiuBAeLBWsq1bnhq5XV6A==&ch=0HegSY3e-OWIvW-ZPSbOjRIk3u38LKwOj4ti1A0vRoL-zvsn-zYvTQ==)
---
| [Why It's Important](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I63cGEZWk98egSfl0T_YA48svZbrmTOAYAhWy-2qHwShisaq9hl-k2iwa3Z_pBZYzvhZK1Y462qtycPEiIfH87Qv2VAVkD0LchEvdhqNqVSWJhR-XIKd4X44dhjPf394tMj2OpVtCHnD_zGe3esp7HT9XNvvlyZyPJkQY9VKjxoqaKVtLkHdJVsmNPJBINCizg9V94-BEZw=&c=yTYDKqA6TPSkgcVztnSeZpWfgyfhhTu8TqiuBAeLBWsq1bnhq5XV6A==&ch=0HegSY3e-OWIvW-ZPSbOjRIk3u38LKwOj4ti1A0vRoL-zvsn-zYvTQ==)
---
Now, here's where I need you and your help.
Yesterday was National Giving Day--a day when many decide where to give to cut down their tax burden. If you're considering an end-of-year contribution, I know the perfect organization for your support.
---
| | [INVEST IN US](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I63cGEZWk98egSfl0T_YA48svZbrmTOAYAhWy-2qHwShisaq9hl-k2iwa3Z_pBZYWPmTbD0By4y-XbvhGp3Yv9Fx27a095z9ZTIGY9_BbizhM-_7BkpCm_Vwn5VcAl9MzYgMhQz5pbgI837K2osLbL3qsae86e83IwOlLirYVjKe8KPnTaKfW81sZOX_LtNp0tM5LXJPbXhygZxZZc50Yg==&c=yTYDKqA6TPSkgcVztnSeZpWfgyfhhTu8TqiuBAeLBWsq1bnhq5XV6A==&ch=0HegSY3e-OWIvW-ZPSbOjRIk3u38LKwOj4ti1A0vRoL-zvsn-zYvTQ==)
---
At the American Principles Project, we're leading the charge on the most critical battles of our time: family, freedom, and the fight for America's future.
We're breaking ground in Washington, D.C., and across the country, standing against the corrupt, globalist elites who want to destroy our small towns, silence our values, and brainwash us into submission.
If everyone who receives this email--every petition signer, event attendee, whistleblower, and supporter--contributed just $50 today, we'd not only smash our end-of-year goals but also set the stage for next year's critical fights.
Why should you trust us to deliver? Why should you INVEST in APP for the future of the country that you LOVE?
---
| BECAUSE next year will be pivotal. Here's what we're already doing:

* Fighting every day to establish a Family First Agenda for America.
* Winning hard-fought victories to protect kids online and in schools.
* Exposing the far-left's grotesque agenda targeting our children.
* Making family issues the driving force behind political victories--including Donald Trump's re-election in 2024.
* Advocating to remove harmful gender ideology from schools and public institutions.

---
| |
---
| But that's just the beginning. Here's a glimpse of our impact:
---
|
* Empowering parents to reclaim their rights in education and healthcare.
* Exposing billion-dollar schemes that erode family values.
* Strengthening grassroots coalitions to amplify pro-family messaging.
* Supporting investigative work to uncover government overreach and corporate corruption.
* Promoting policies that elevate families--without expanding federal overreach.

---
| Our enemies are organized, well-funded, and relentless. But we have you--true patriots who refuse to back down.
[So, are you in?](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I63cGEZWk98egSfl0T_YA48svZbrmTOAYAhWy-2qHwShisaq9hl-k2iwa3Z_pBZYWPmTbD0By4y-XbvhGp3Yv9Fx27a095z9ZTIGY9_BbizhM-_7BkpCm_Vwn5VcAl9MzYgMhQz5pbgI837K2osLbL3qsae86e83IwOlLirYVjKe8KPnTaKfW81sZOX_LtNp0tM5LXJPbXhygZxZZc50Yg==&c=yTYDKqA6TPSkgcVztnSeZpWfgyfhhTu8TqiuBAeLBWsq1bnhq5XV6A==&ch=0HegSY3e-OWIvW-ZPSbOjRIk3u38LKwOj4ti1A0vRoL-zvsn-zYvTQ==)
[Click here to join the fight today. INVEST in the American future!](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I63cGEZWk98egSfl0T_YA48svZbrmTOAYAhWy-2qHwShisaq9hl-k2iwa3Z_pBZYWPmTbD0By4y-XbvhGp3Yv9Fx27a095z9ZTIGY9_BbizhM-_7BkpCm_Vwn5VcAl9MzYgMhQz5pbgI837K2osLbL3qsae86e83IwOlLirYVjKe8KPnTaKfW81sZOX_LtNp0tM5LXJPbXhygZxZZc50Yg==&c=yTYDKqA6TPSkgcVztnSeZpWfgyfhhTu8TqiuBAeLBWsq1bnhq5XV6A==&ch=0HegSY3e-OWIvW-ZPSbOjRIk3u38LKwOj4ti1A0vRoL-zvsn-zYvTQ==)
Together, we will protect America's children, defend our families, and secure a future we can all be proud of.
The fight doesn't stop. Neither will we.
---
| | [INVEST IN THE FUTURE](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I63cGEZWk98egSfl0T_YA48svZbrmTOAYAhWy-2qHwShisaq9hl-k2iwa3Z_pBZYWPmTbD0By4y-XbvhGp3Yv9Fx27a095z9ZTIGY9_BbizhM-_7BkpCm_Vwn5VcAl9MzYgMhQz5pbgI837K2osLbL3qsae86e83IwOlLirYVjKe8KPnTaKfW81sZOX_LtNp0tM5LXJPbXhygZxZZc50Yg==&c=yTYDKqA6TPSkgcVztnSeZpWfgyfhhTu8TqiuBAeLBWsq1bnhq5XV6A==&ch=0HegSY3e-OWIvW-ZPSbOjRIk3u38LKwOj4ti1A0vRoL-zvsn-zYvTQ==)
---
|
Thank you for your continued support.
In Freedom,
---
| |
---
| Terry Schilling President American Principles Project

body:

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What will the new administration do first?
body:
| Hi Peter, Now that the election is over, what will the new administration prioritize in the new year? Here are a few things we're watching in the months ahead: **The debt ceiling debate may reignite in early 2025.** The debt ceiling, the cap on the total amount of debt the U.S. can hold, has been suspended as part of a deal made in the last Congressional fight.1 When the cap returns in January, it may kick off a fresh round of debates and draw attention to the more than $35 trillion the U.S. holds in debt.2 Will lawmakers take action to stem deficit spending? Or will they continue to kick the can down the road? We'll have to wait and see. **Tax cuts may be extended past 2025.** A number of popular individual and small business tax breaks are scheduled to expire at the end of 2025, which would trigger higher individual income tax rates and increase estate taxes.3 President-elect Trump may extend or make some or all of these provisions permanent as part of his 2025 priorities. However, tax cuts lead to lost revenue for the federal government, which would end up adding to the national debt. It's hard to know how lawmakers will square these competing priorities, but we're keeping a close eye on it and will keep you informed. **Tariffs could become a key issue for businesses.** The new administration has announced plans for broad tariffs on imports, especially on goods from China.4 Tariffs can impact inflation and business earnings by increasing the cost of goods and supplies from overseas. If trading partners respond by adding their own tariffs on U.S. goods, it could hurt overseas demand by making our products more expensive. How deep or broad those tariffs could be is a big source of uncertainty going into the new year. However, it's likely that any new policies would come with many rounds of debate, so the actual impact of tariffs may be much less than the worst-case scenarios. We'll keep you updated. **Markets may become volatile with uncertainty.** While the uncertainty of the election has faded, new uncertainty around policy priorities has replaced it. We're expecting volatility ahead as analysts digest reports and adjust their positions ahead of the new year. Investors are also watching data for hints about where the economy is headed next. **The bull market is now over two years old. Should we be worried that a bear market is around the corner?** Probably not. The chart below shows you the average age of recent bull markets.
---
|
---
While the past doesn't predict the future, we can see that two years isn't historically long for a bull market. In fact, the longest bull market on record lasted more than 12 years.5 A sudden turn to a bear market is not likely at this point. On the other hand, there are a lot of risks in this environment that could shake things up. If geopolitical issues flare, inflation rebounds, or the business environment starts to look dicey, we can expect markets to correct. We're carefully watching trends as we enter the final weeks of the year and thinking about what the new year could bring. Have questions or concerns about what these issues could mean for your portfolio? Hit "reply" and let me know. I'm here to answer questions and offer reassurance. Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6ImxxNldpMk5NQlVKWVZXYSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. New administrations often bring extra uncertainty about money. If you have anyone in your life who is worried about what could come next, please let me know. I'd be happy to offer my perspective on their situation.
---
Sources: 1\. [https://bipartisanpolicy.org/blog/debt-limit-2025-treasury-cash-on-hand/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC9iaXBhcnRpc2FucG9saWN5Lm9yZ1wvYmxvZ1wvZGVidC1saW1pdC0yMDI1LXRyZWFzdXJ5LWNhc2gtb24taGFuZFwvIiwiaGFzaCI6ImxxNldpMk5NQlVKWVZXYSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9) 2\. [https://tax.thomsonreuters.com/blog/what-to-know-about-tcja-expiration/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC90YXgudGhvbXNvbnJldXRlcnMuY29tXC9ibG9nXC93aGF0LXRvLWtub3ctYWJvdXQtdGNqYS1leHBpcmF0aW9uXC8iLCJoYXNoIjoibHE2V2kyTk1CVUpZVldhIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0) 4\. [https://www.yahoo.com/news/trumps-proposed-tariffs-raise-prices-205300785.html](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cueWFob28uY29tXC9uZXdzXC90cnVtcHMtcHJvcG9zZWQtdGFyaWZmcy1yYWlzZS1wcmljZXMtMjA1MzAwNzg1Lmh0bWwiLCJoYXNoIjoibHE2V2kyTk1CVUpZVldhIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0) 5\. [https://www.hartfordfunds.com/practice-management/client-conversations/investing-for-growth/10-things-you-should-know-about-bull-markets.html](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuaGFydGZvcmRmdW5kcy5jb21cL3ByYWN0aWNlLW1hbmFnZW1lbnRcL2NsaWVudC1jb252ZXJzYXRpb25zXC9pbnZlc3RpbmctZm9yLWdyb3d0aFwvMTAtdGhpbmdzLXlvdS1zaG91bGQta25vdy1hYm91dC1idWxsLW1hcmtldHMuaHRtbCIsImhhc2giOiJscTZXaTJOTUJVSllWV2EiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ) Chart sources: [https://finance.yahoo.com/news/the-bull-market-is-2-years-old-heres-where-wall-street-thinks-stocks-go-next-100050648.html?guccounter=1](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC9maW5hbmNlLnlhaG9vLmNvbVwvbmV3c1wvdGhlLWJ1bGwtbWFya2V0LWlzLTIteWVhcnMtb2xkLWhlcmVzLXdoZXJlLXdhbGwtc3RyZWV0LXRoaW5rcy1zdG9ja3MtZ28tbmV4dC0xMDAwNTA2NDguaHRtbD9ndWNjb3VudGVyPTEiLCJoYXNoIjoibHE2V2kyTk1CVUpZVldhIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0) *Current bull market as of 11/20/24

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: Anti-America Radicals are trying to SABOTAGE President Trump and Republicans
body:
“I, Friend, pledge my support for President Trump and his strong America First agenda.”

| |
---
| | | Hi, Marsha Blackburn here.

I've worn a lot of hats over the years. I'm mom, grandmother, Senator, and now - I'm a Vice Chair for the National Republican Senatorial Committee for 2026. It's the honor of a lifetime to help lead Republicans to victory once again.

But there's one small hang-up.

**Chuck Schumer and his far-Left buddies are FUMING about losing their hold on power.** They can't believe we pulled off a trifecta, so they're charging ahead to sabotage our Conservative Senate Majority and President Trump's agenda before we even take power.

I won't let these anti-America Radicals get away with it... And I have a hunch you won't either.

_**[So here's my ask today: Will you join me in pledging your FULL SUPPORT for President Trump and his agenda?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm894r0b4v030ftb1kpsgfs5o4pdhdat46g32mto_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm4ob2chh2bs "So here’s my ask today: Will you join me in pledging your FULL SUPPORT for President Trump and his agenda?")**_

---
There's a lot to get done.

If we want to help President Trump deliver on his mandate from the American People, it will take the full support of our entire MAGA movement to get it across the finish line.

_**[We've never let the anti-America Radicals shut us down before. And you can bet it WON'T happen under my watch.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1k0to6joopu2i9tag7hos5ge36i95l7vonn5pkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm4ob2chh2bs "We’ve never let the anti-America Radicals shut us down before. And you can bet it WON’T happen under my watch.")**_

I'm counting on you to help me see this through.

For America,

**Marsha Blackburn**

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: If you knew...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
People are alive today because of the lifesaving laws that GIFFORDS has helped pass at the federal level and in states across the country.
#

Friends -
If you knew that your $5 went directly towards organizing, lobbying, education, advertising, and research—all with a mission to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic—[**wouldn’t you chip in $5 right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241204-1-30&t=1&akid=9555%2E3935704%2EwccKP2)
If you knew that your $5 could help defend recent major gun safety laws, [**wouldn’t you make that contribution right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241204-1-30&t=2&akid=9555%2E3935704%2EwccKP2)
If you knew that your $5 had the power to save someone’s life, [**wouldn’t it be the best $5 you could ever spend?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241204-1-30&t=3&akid=9555%2E3935704%2EwccKP2)
We know that may sound like an exaggeration, but it’s the truth. People are alive today because of the lifesaving laws that GIFFORDS has helped pass at the federal level and in states across the country.
But there’s still far more to be done, and we all know that the fight ahead in 2025 and beyond isn’t going to be easy. We must keep fighting until every single person in our nation can live freely without the threat of gun violence in their communities.
[**So please, we’re asking you to contribute $5 to GIFFORDS PAC today. Your support directly fuels our work toward a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241204-1-30&t=4&akid=9555%2E3935704%2EwccKP2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/20617?c0=giffords-em-dec24.ZTrEEM&refcode=em241204-1-30&t=5&akid=9555%2E3935704%2EwccKP2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec24.Tl-4ZJ&refcode=em241204-1-30&t=6&akid=9555%2E3935704%2EwccKP2)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-dec24.Wil-xB&refcode=em241204-1-30&t=7&akid=9555%2E3935704%2EwccKP2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec24.5v9WVG&refcode=em241204-1-30&t=8&akid=9555%2E3935704%2EwccKP2)**
---
****

Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

subject: CNN attacking us
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM2OgjAUhZ_mdidpbyvFRRejhlkYd4OJsyv9kcaiBAoObz_RcdiefPeeL0e3XQx-ViC3gNgEOwAi8A9AHBM_6ao69vOq64rVg6N7xoC7Nznhwt6MPsdp_GbNdhB1rOTP9DmxhU5z5xb2XZm5Vof4TOWeWCVQM2-IU0xyzjFHtiaNqqmua8MKr61nVuZcuM16U_CCGcxlbUlQSFEwpIKtOWUs48Jbqj3VTmMhaQGCvooy3zuXmnC7ut7qEOfM3FsSVZNSN7zESsDybuvsNproxuHvytxbwPKtDFhOgOXleEhf1SHJE_DyNRnfn-W8e9jrhfTKdo8QYxhyCYJe_r-QSeFvAAAA__9mhG6O)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw80U2LpDwQwPFPU95akqq09nPw8MxI78Cyl4UemL0MMSk1THwhifb47Relt68__qRSlB5m79qtgvIFEHtnIyAC_Q-IS6J3fbv9Cttpni-nOyHvDPj6KFd8tqPRH35d_sj-JarG38rv9ccqn3XaZn62j5E5D9r5Xcs6s5VCLVuTcSVLIsIC5TnrK6MLKqgxtmlIiLZQxOfCaCObnc8qcxUKVBKFkmcSUuakWit0KzRrvJTiAkocg_I2MKfejV8crHZ-y800ZL7qU5rj8bEr4DWyWQLn3jUcko75FDrAa1pS8pzuboyn2Jy0SW4aga5LGj4ThwGobpOVgMUuRg-zdt0IVKOSUvz38IGtW_Y28Bp7HfjhcVqCYaA6Nv9emMbEYwKq_dRNgMXn6J0Fqt9-bu_p7ff3TR94nIvqj3J7vduvLguVne_OexeLEpTojr33NdcK_wYAAP__QRyaEg "Tuttle Twins")

Patriot,

CNN is attacking my Tuttle Twins books as a _“right-wing children’s entertainment complex,”_... _I consider this a badge of honor_.
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcuOnDAQRb_G7BrZVebRCxaZQZ1ssoo60mQzMnYBTpuHbEOHfH0EIr09Orq3rkoNs7PtVrHijQH01gQGwPALA1gi_lT3-3e_Xea5vDwRaMcM3k9zhZc7avXh1uWX6N-CbNy9-LN-XcXLjttML_esTGlQ1u20qBNTSVCi1QlVokBEyEFkSV9llOWykRKQ66vEsmhAXNtMaORXVWZ5YivgIAVwKTLkQqQoW8NVyxUpKAteMsmPorT1RLG344O8UdZtqZ6GxFV9jHM4DrsxuAXSi6fU2YZ8VCGdfMfgFpcYHcWnHcMlNBelo51GhrclDp-R_MCwbqMRDPKdaDXMynYjwxqkEPx68oGMXXbX0xp65enkYVq8JoZ1aP4nTGOkMTKs7aA62oM_R2cNw_rv_Lv-9iPKLjvg8TCsP4rt_WkeXeIrMz-tczbkBZO8O5bvQ9cK_gUAAP__5WeZOw)
Why is the media worried about children’s stories that teach about free markets, limited government, and individual liberty?

Because we’re winning.

You saw it recently with the youth vote in the election. The fact is that CNN and the mainstream media are losing control over the narrative. They are losing control over the younger generation.

I don’t know why the ideas of liberty, free enterprise, and American history are considered _"conservative?”_ These ideas should be important to ALL Americans, regardless of politics.

Here’s how you can help teach these ideas to students:

[My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins. Right now, ALL Donations are being MATCHED by a generous supporter. Can you donate $20, $40, $100, or even $250 today?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuQXZYxNnDxx2F6WnXrZKpfQSGTwEK8ZQeyChv74CZXP99Om9eRrTj961S8n0BwPonE0MgMl3BjCR_G1Op59x2Y3jYXeXgCtm8Pk0Z3i5oTFnP09_RPeRVO1P-jH_mMXLpmXEl_uszLE3zq9UV5ktFRjRNhmWQkspYQ-iyLoS68YUoI1Wb7gvOFg48NZqqxXnQts2cyVwUAK4EoXkQuRStZablhs0cND8wBTfivI2IlLnwg2jNc4veTP0mS87ojFthx0ZHBM2U8TcuxojmZQP8crgSBORR7q7kHap3pmG3BCYPE7UXwhjz2TVkhUM9itpTD8adw1MVqCE4G9P3qN10-pGnFNnIj55GqbYIJNVqr8ThkAYiMmK8EEX78JtDb8E7yyT1dev4v1W_P33dd7g9jRZnfXyebe3axZLO96d9y7tNVP8uq1fx84l_A8AAP__kHabzQ)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT_NcAvCMw6QA4fuorSX9tRU2r2sbDOAFfNHtiHl21egNNeffpo3T08Ns7PtVkHxBoi9bQIgAn0DxCXSH3W7_fTbaZ7L04OQdwz4_jRXfLmjUR9uXT5F_xakdrfi7_p9FS87bjO_3GdkyoOybqdFnTSVRCVak3AlCiLCHMU56SupiUypUV8km0Ia1KXKyzNdhDRSG5PYCjOUAjMpzpQJkZJsm0y1mWKFZZGVILMjKG09c-zteGffKOu21ExD4qo-xjkcj10Br4HN4jl1VrOPKqST7wCvcYnRcXzYMZyCPikT7TQCXZc4fEX2A1DdxkYA5jsxapiV7UagGqUQ2eXJB27ssrue19Arz08epsUbBqqD_n9hGiOPEai2g-oYAfOv0dkGqP7V_l715w_K8wMeg1H9UWzvj-beJb5q5od1zoa8AJl1R_O96FrhvwAAAP__LUqZ_w)
_Over 6 Million Copies Distributed!_

As a parent, I struggled to find educational material for children about our nation’s history and values. _**What I found either A) didn't do a good job of explaining these ideas or B) was just plain boring!**_

I decided that if I couldn’t find what I was looking for, then I should try to solve the problem. I teamed up with illustrator Elijah Stanfield to create a series of books written to entertain while also educating kids about important values and life lessons.

Once we finished, I had to see if they could pass the final test. I gave them to any parent’s harshest critic, my children. And they loved them!

**You would be amazed at how well kids understand and love these ideas when you explain them simply and with fully illustrated fun stories!**

The single most impactful thing you can do is chip in $20 or more. Every $20 helps us distribute a new Tuttle Twins book to a library, school, or family.

clean_body: "Tuttle Twins" Patriot, CNN is attacking my Tuttle Twins books as a “right-wing children’s entertainment complex,”... I consider this a badge of honor. Why is the media worried about children’s stories that teach about free markets, limited government, and individual liberty? Because we’re winning. You saw it recently with the youth vote in the election. The fact is that CNN and the mainstream media are losing control over the narrative. They are losing control over the younger generation. I don’t know why the ideas of liberty, free enterprise, and American history are considered "conservative?” These ideas should be important to ALL Americans, regardless of politics. Here’s how you can help teach these ideas to students: Over 6 Million Copies Distributed! As a parent, I struggled to find educational material for children about our nation’s history and values. What I found either A) didn't do a good job of explaining these ideas or B) was just plain boring! I decided that if I couldn’t find what I was looking for, then I should try to solve the problem. I teamed up with illustrator Elijah Stanfield to create a series of books written to entertain while also educating kids about important values and life lessons. Once we finished, I had to see if they could pass the final test. I gave them to any parent’s harshest critic, my children. And they loved them! You would be amazed at how well kids understand and love these ideas when you explain them simply and with fully illustrated fun stories! The single most impactful thing you can do is chip in $20 or more. Every $20 helps us distribute a new Tuttle Twins book to a library, school, or family. With ALL donations being matched, that means your $20 turns into $40 and helps us give away 2 copies. Your impact can be massive by donating now. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfdl03lki4jkkreucsjlb5qn5ks203efvfm40uv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm2oj2clh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6tq01rbkbv9cpjab1rv1c3gnbhk9t98l1sitb30_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm2oj2clh2bs)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2eah910gqhovtpbr7cktjqq4vtaopcak7am82s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm2oj2clh2bs) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z38o6t2e70pm1dnsbl3d34s44gc5r936i50nmfd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm2oj2clh2bs)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf1bppcrafuvtkthkke0olquc042gte7bgdh5q90_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm2oj2clh2bs)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj5lptok6sevt4ssq0q9f0n36c79easfdf10flpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm2oj2clh2bs)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0rg9pf1hjrpmj7famghkdbdiph3d0ev8ia9n2ho_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgm2oj2clh2bs)
---

clean_body: Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best , Marcus Welby , M.D. , and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your Founding Supporter Gift is $50 you will receive: ** All ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ** And a FREE copy of my children's book:Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
