name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcffs4nciepec24fkem60u5hipdr5ft38q95e5ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgmap34cph2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfnciao772ljtj3bv9v1cssoftfgmf4dc0dplns8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgmap34cph2bs)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zca7mrhn024t9gl41bqicdk2833fg6rpqitf1m48_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgmap34cph2bs) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7kpmtolbskllls6jmsljkur4hngpp1cub655utg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgmap34cph2bs)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2bacems3nvemfqe9pudqbhg5deurdphpps7t2to_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgmap34cph2bs)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z832cbd47pvtm2mbp6i8r1d7c7th35vgudmmisdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgmap34cph2bs)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7aukdaq7fkuovs6oj9at1mphd95iqnso16l225o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpgmap34cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron**

Team, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. [**That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Serve America today as we build the strongest foundation possible. name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: MAGA's dangerous deportation plan
body:
This is a threat to American values.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vmub2-ltcj08-kyd76rh0/)
---
# **MAGA's Dangerous Deportation Plan**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vmub2-ltcj09-kyd76rh1/)
---
| | | | folks, Donald Trump’s plan to deploy the U.S. military for mass deportations is not only reckless but a betrayal of the principles that define America. Even Republican Senator Rand Paul has denounced the idea, calling it a “huge mistake” and a blatant misuse of our military. Think about it: soldiers in uniform marching into cities, tasked with rounding up immigrants—including people who’ve built their lives here for decades, contributed to their communities, and raised families. It’s a dystopian image straight out of a nightmare, and one that has no place in a free and democratic society. For over 100 years, it’s been illegal to use the military in domestic law enforcement, and for good reason. America’s armed forces are meant to defend our country—not to police it. Deploying them in this way sets a chilling precedent and tarnishes their honor. It’s a gross overreach of executive power and a direct attack on the values of liberty and justice. Even Paul, a conservative and sometimes Trump ally, is warning against this disastrous plan. “I don’t see the military putting [a housekeeper] in handcuffs and marching her down the street to an encampment,” he said. And yet, that’s exactly the kind of scene Trump is pushing for. This is about more than just policy—it’s about who we are as a nation. Using the military to target undocumented immigrants is a dangerous step toward authoritarianism. It erodes trust, divides communities, and sets the stage for widespread fear and abuse. The fight to stop this starts now. It’s time to stand up for American values—compassion, fairness, and the belief that everyone deserves a shot at the American dream. Together, we must resist these draconian measures and ensure that no president uses our armed forces to carry out their personal vendettas. Let’s make our voices heard. Let’s fight for the America we believe in. [**_Our most powerful weapon right now is our microphone, so we need to use platforms around the country to hold MAGA accountable! Join us in our fight today._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vmub2-ltcj0a-kyd76rh1/)
---

# A Chance to Flip a Blue Seat to Red!
---
| A state Rep. seat in Strafford County (Somersworth and Rollinsford) became vacant today when a Democrat resigned before being sworn in, and there may be a special election to fill it. While this district leans Democrat, it presents an incredible opportunity for Republicans to flip the seat and grow our majority in the New Hampshire House.
We can’t wait until the election is officially announced—we need to act now to lay the groundwork for victory. Democrats will be ready to defend this seat, but with your help, we can mobilize early, build momentum, and ensure we have the resources to win when the time comes.
**Your support now will make all the difference in this fight!**
---
[Contribute Now!](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=b5bb1600d1&e=f3aa6419cd)
| Every dollar helps us prepare for the possibility of a special election, empowering Republicans to bring real leadership to Strafford County District 12.
**Let’s work together to turn this vacancy into a victory for New Hampshire values!**
---

---

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2de55459-21ed-4c1c-9dff-e6ba60e53e71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, MSNBC has been a trusted source of news for the last 27 years. We’re grateful of the work they did to expose the Trump Administration – and we know how important their work will be in 2025 as he heads back to the White House. But with viewership plummeting over the past few months, we’re scared people are missing out on important updates in our fight to defend democracy against MAGA threats!! So we’re gathering key data to see if Democrats in your area are tuning in to MSNBC during this critical moment. Can you take our easy one-question poll below and let us know: ARE YOU WATCHING MSNBC?
[[YES]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T621c9bd8-470a-4647-bd61-c9b62171b502/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8befd05-11b7-47b3-9674-78c841010e8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Your response will influence how we update our supporters about important news events, so please take a moment to complete our survey today! Thank you! \- The Team @ Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new kid's book "The 10 Commandments for Kids"
body:
Empower your child with timeless biblical values
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=23dcfcf66a6f48a28bf654192b86f7fe&_e=j3pWNtzRszTUU4naS7-lsyUyoVvHV8fSbMepZPHNPqL_fjGyGjs1ALqwJxH5KYtzq_chc6nY0ozFldFdi-ireHdFOn4v-IGLCmLoVvuB6n_GeiCzYDINGXG0ZOa-CPRzXhBNekoQGaZBO9xzpd49heT-6SiGGe5iNRE56bX7wayyLYsrO2-JLFje5t1S4tIUky34dQLQmcaNGou8oz1G1n46f7aqc0_z6M5ZWU0wjJtapepVLnBGM2LXrz5TGHlO2kM4T4fESa0dLSVCwyQFdTWTp3zziId1KZ8TTwgZnWBtC09ifhRV-WFrfcCMeGNAWZKbikA8ufYafc0RIa1i9_wscsdeZC_uo3ksM0cBPldBoxPdjsHN-_NtftkiPQmR)
---
Hello Friend,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=23dcfcf66a6f48a28bf654192b86f7fe&_e=j3pWNtzRszTUU4naS7-lsyUyoVvHV8fSbMepZPHNPqL_fjGyGjs1ALqwJxH5KYtzq_chc6nY0ozFldFdi-ireHdFOn4v-IGLCmLoVvuB6n_GeiCzYDINGXG0ZOa-CPRzXhBNekoQGaZBO9xzpd49heT-6SiGGe5iNRE56bX7wayyLYsrO2-JLFje5t1S4tIUky34dQLQmcaNGou8oz1G1n46f7aqc0_z6M5ZWU0wjJsJjMM2jHfa8HJLgZbIkQ8WMQM4rB7NCYMZWGgwq_bHBGidnQLcyQ4xUHRmBjF-qie4b2qe2KZPA3pxWRMSiBCV65M5hMzUoWXxMiNhq4yBHQZtkLn-WQ_kldS4z95dWzS-1eOvOo1YoEmXL1qzGqJ1)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=23dcfcf66a6f48a28bf654192b86f7fe&_e=j3pWNtzRszTUU4naS7-lsyUyoVvHV8fSbMepZPHNPqL_fjGyGjs1ALqwJxH5KYtzq_chc6nY0ozFldFdi-ireHdFOn4v-IGLCmLoVvuB6n_GeiCzYDINGXG0ZOa-CPRzXhBNekoQGaZBO9xzpd49heT-6SiGGe5iNRE56bX7wayyLYsrO2-JLFje5t1S4tIUDNSf2vO7Kmr9gpynXW0_R_yIkRCLLicbnPT6r9gq8vFfqHDfqbx5SahyGwcICtDzzp_Y2wWHpvzQOWFIPe3TsXP7EAKpaK4xAe2dXJA1O2fq6F7HHqxnsq3fAWC-vLz5pXYR9Y2NA7FfhNoRaNF4arBw5T17E1EYb-Nr6LdlMUbe7bDznSWGZeZV7hot4j-4)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

PO Box 223609. Dallas, TX 75222

Not with this much at stake. = | | = = = = = Thank you, NANCY Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. If you want to stay updated but , let us know If you would like to completely from future emails, you can do so | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

# [DeSantis being floated for Secretary of Defense?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=152570626&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTcwNjI2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMzMjg2MTcsImV4cCI6MTczNTkyMDYxNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Eg7hifpN3CAVRKDuHapTvnwr2B-iXMCAIYczcxM9rmc)
### No one but Team DeSantis is floating the idea... for now, at least
Dec 4
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=152570626&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTcwNjI2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMzMyODYxNywiZXhwIjoxNzM1OTIwNjE3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.sUOr2vAqPgCKYIaIzviesnOhO7EIRlG_lWKcdPdMiqI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=152570626&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTcwNjI2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMzMjg2MTcsImV4cCI6MTczNTkyMDYxNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Eg7hifpN3CAVRKDuHapTvnwr2B-iXMCAIYczcxM9rmc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=152570626&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTcwNjI2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMzMjg2MTcsImV4cCI6MTczNTkyMDYxNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Eg7hifpN3CAVRKDuHapTvnwr2B-iXMCAIYczcxM9rmc)
---
| | [](https://substack..myMncl5NL4sEoAlfBWvlhD_ndnmK_gULl27zR5DngUg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/desantis-being-floated-for-secretary?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The Wall Street Journal,[ citing anonymous sources with "knowledge of discussions,"](https://substack.com/redirect/9c0a047d-fc28-4c76-8e75-1b885c35acbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) followed up on a previous story with anonymous sources by former Politico-and-DeSantis-adjacent reporter [Matt Dixon](https://substack.com/redirect/b4c2be08-815f-4bc6-a373-71b08b3e8ad8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claiming that Ron DeSantis is under consideration for the role of defense secretary.
The current nominee for secretary of defense is Pete Hegseth, a FOX News weekend host and Iraq and Afghanistan combat veteran.
Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..nVHQvtVpW_oRPUhm72y-W0k6ZTVVOe2PStXDUOSERT4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152570626)
Hegseth, [mired in his own controversies](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbb4f02-b1b5-4837-a4d3-5994487e1df4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), may be the second Trump nominee to be axed before the administration even takes over in January.
Trump officials involved with the decision deny that they're planning to replace Hegseth, but have floated Joni Ernst (Iowa), Bill Hagerty (Tenn) and Mike Walz (Florida) as potential alternatives. None of the Trump team mentioned DeSantis as a contender.
So why is this story circulating on the far-right media?
_**Because Team DeSantis wants it to.**_
After trying and failing to secure the vice presidential spot, the attorney general spot, and likely other positions requested and rejected by Trump, DeSantis is desperate for relevance and a future in politics beyond his authoritarian experiment in Florida.
When DeSantis failed to secure the Vice President spot, he [falsely claimed that he was rejected because Trump wanted to play "identity politics,](https://substack.com/redirect/6bae0cfc-0b67-4ced-904d-c62c45582a72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" before[ later claiming he never wanted it at all](https://substack.com/redirect/bf36ca93-9891-4e2e-b472-5d7194a83af2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). JD Vance is the slightly less nasally version of DeSantis, so not much "diversity" in that pick.
I've been watching ([and have been subjected to](https://substack.com/redirect/24bab7aa-e933-4b41-bf07-dd8b32a15caa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) the online team of hype-men who have made DeSantis a pariah in the MAGA world long enough to know what game they're playing.
Simply put:
It's a cynical ploy to plant the idea in the public's mind and pre-condition them to accept DeSantis in a Trump cabinet role, even though DeSantis is one of the least popular governors in the country, was humiliated in his disastrous campaign for president, and is absolutely loathed by Trump.
Despite whatever attempt his flailing PR team makes at normalizing him as a potential nominee, there's another group of people who likely won't take the appointment of someone like DeSantis seriously: the military.
Despite his current problems, Hegseth has something DeSantis doesn't: actual combat experience.
DeSantis never saw combat while serving as a lawyer in Guantanamo Bay, where he [volunteered to torture](https://substack.com/redirect/b74b7699-c087-4ecc-af81-0fde863d051a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the [prisoners he was assigned to represent](https://substack.com/redirect/4a1c79b3-bd85-4977-ae17-435c393014fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And a DeSantis appointment wouldn't necessarily rid the office of accusations related to sex crimes and trafficking [\- the man who made DeSantis king in Florida committed suicide days after discovering the police were investigating him for sex trafficking minors. ](https://substack.com/redirect/1f422e41-8e7a-4378-91d3-1e2f3a311a4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
> Need to catch up on DeSantis' secret, sordid past? Read [this ](https://substack.com/redirect/ff762d06-3bd5-4d29-9216-a41358fff004?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and [this](https://substack.com/redirect/1f422e41-8e7a-4378-91d3-1e2f3a311a4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
DeSantis, who Trump has rightly shredded for turning Florida into a place of "[misery and despair](https://substack.com/redirect/19b53662-afa4-48d3-a054-4e7cb9553eaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," knows his influence as a lame-duck governor is waning. Someone -- likely his team of[ extremely online trolls](https://substack.com/redirect/153d41bf-8ab1-4c4b-9c90-4c9695021139?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- has convinced him to get _some kind_ of Trump nomination to stay politically alive.
By flooding the online and conservative news world with completely unverified and unsourced claims, DeSantis' extremely online cyber gang hopes to reach influential conservatives who will sit Trump down and force him to consider DeSantis' nomination. By creating the illusion DeSantis is under consideration, they hope to influence reality.
But the reality has never panned out too well for DeSantis.
DeSantis has lost every major "culture war" lawsuit brought against him. He's been exposed as a liar, for stolen valor, and for being inept at managing his state.
He's even losing to me in court, with each desperate attempt to limit or otherwise dismiss my case against the state flatly denied by one of the most extreme conservative judges on the circuit.
DeSantis is and always has been a loser.
And if Trump goes with his gut, as he almost always does, he won't bring the man any closer to himself than absolutely necessary.
After Matt Gaetz' nomination[ crashed and burned](https://substack.com/redirect/a665b8e0-0898-4ab6-a995-61471ef2dd5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Senate Republicans are flexing their muscles and testing the limits of Trump's power in nominating key cabinet members.
And the Senate GOP types think they can control DeSantis, which they like.
But Trump doesn't (and never has) liked DeSantis.
Fingers crossed that Trump won't feel forgiving of the Florida Fuhrer's attempts to usurp him.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Stop Musk and Ramaswamy before they destroy our government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
It's not hard to see the coming train wreck when you listen to Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy talk about their new "government efficiency" department: DOGE. It's a disaster waiting to happen , for the simple reason that they don't understand the fundamental difference between a business and a government -- one is built for profit, the other is built to serve people.
Sign on today to oppose this wrongheaded government takeover >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120424_1&amount=25]
Team:
We have to act now to urge Congress to oppose the creation of the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and the proposed appointments of Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to this agency.
This new department, introduced by President-elect Donald Trump, is billed as a means to streamline federal operations . But instead, this department is expected to pave the way for widespread deregulation, corporate favoritism, and diminished government accountability.
We believe, these reasons among many, make Musk and Ramaswamy’s DOGE a disaster waiting to happen.
Please, add your name: Stand against Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
The reasons are clear: [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
1. Lack of Public Service Experience: Musk and Ramaswamy are corporate moguls with no background in public service. Government is about serving people, not profit—something neither of these leaders has shown a commitment to.

2. Conflicts of Interest: Both have significant business ties to industries that benefit from lax regulations. Putting them in charge of efficiency reform risks favoritism toward their interests and big businesses, rather than safeguarding public needs.

3. Deregulation Disguised as Efficiency: "Efficiency" here could mean removing protections. With Musk and Ramaswamy at the helm, we could see environmental, labor, and consumer protections slashed under the guise of "streamlining."

4. Privatization of Public Services: DOGE could push to outsource critical government functions to corporations, reducing transparency and accountability to taxpayers, while increasing corporate profits.

5. Threat to Democracy: Government must be accountable to the people, not corporate elites. This department could erode public trust and prioritize corporate power over democratic values.
Sign on now to stand against Elon and Vivek’s appointments and the creation of this thinly veiled attempt of a corporate takeover of our government >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120424_1&amount=25]

clean_body: It's not hard to see the coming train wreck when you listen to Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy talk about their new "government efficiency" department: DOGE. It's a disaster waiting to happen , for the simple reason that they don't understand the fundamental difference between a business and a government -- one is built for profit, the other is built to serve people. Sign on today to oppose this wrongheaded government takeover >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Team: We have to act now to urge Congress to oppose the creation of the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and the proposed appointments of Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to this agency. This new department, introduced by President-elect Donald Trump, is billed as a means to streamline federal operations . But instead, this department is expected to pave the way for widespread deregulation, corporate favoritism, and diminished government accountability. We believe, these reasons among many, make Musk and Ramaswamy’s DOGE a disaster waiting to happen. Please, add your name: Stand against Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] The reasons are clear: [] 1. Lack of Public Service Experience: Musk and Ramaswamy are corporate moguls with no background in public service. Government is about serving people, not profit—something neither of these leaders has shown a commitment to. 2. Conflicts of Interest: Both have significant business ties to industries that benefit from lax regulations. Putting them in charge of efficiency reform risks favoritism toward their interests and big businesses, rather than safeguarding public needs. 3. Deregulation Disguised as Efficiency: "Efficiency" here could mean removing protections. With Musk and Ramaswamy at the helm, we could see environmental, labor, and consumer protections slashed under the guise of "streamlining." 4. Privatization of Public Services: DOGE could push to outsource critical government functions to corporations, reducing transparency and accountability to taxpayers, while increasing corporate profits. 5. Threat to Democracy: Government must be accountable to the people, not corporate elites. This department could erode public trust and prioritize corporate power over democratic values. Sign on now to stand against Elon and Vivek’s appointments and the creation of this thinly veiled attempt of a corporate takeover of our government >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Theology 101
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ What is our purpose? [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=50375089958f4ba2b651e5ddcc360430&_e=28zCmBou9bIAerBI_OVjz9m7TUSDqpN2SbJ65JmOwFHT7i3-TcFPDgila0dSHaSWNYlLxyUIfOADLizN-wPE2a3iuRqvjxYRNIR23lg865ppJPVjT0kcvc9CMANgp34ZrmMtkEPHeWgUNH_ukt9ams4DFJZ09bGK8vu-0lOEbdeTTDjBwPMai6JdInckikMKUi6ffl_yZ015FPh_CGroleAypdf29GHdKCzjWZB6Uhkx6hXO500OeGsVqYa9AgCqBtuMHf022wkaVa4RSK0VFOG7SP2keEk0MRBD11OioPk9BxvtsocPfEQHAht2ojSqNWWo-9FijTJBOzJeVIrZAEyPv-TMadw_yh4e0HGixEPzxZkA2RKgUp_j2lBxqF16NBZ_1PzvbDfZRS1iaZ0fY4TEx8wscdwSGW7ojTS4FTXQS4zCfNY6DArY3HS0a86U5pWxjNkzJQFOWyrPthi_og%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=50375089958f4ba2b651e5ddcc360430&_e=28zCmBou9bIAerBI_OVjz9m7TUSDqpN2SbJ65JmOwFHT7i3-TcFPDgila0dSHaSWNYlLxyUIfOADLizN-wPE2a3iuRqvjxYRNIR23lg865ppJPVjT0kcvc9CMANgp34ZrmMtkEPHeWgUNH_ukt9ams4DFJZ09bGK8vu-0lOEbdeTTDjBwPMai6JdInckikMKUi6ffl_yZ015FPh_CGroleAypdf29GHdKCzjWZB6Uhkx6hXO500OeGsVqYa9AgCqBtuMHf022wkaVa4RSK0VFOG7SP2keEk0MRBD11OioPk9BxvtsocPfEQHAht2ojSq3Tq0X0HvfqaAc_nySpvorvp4vZbVmen09nISjg5f7g3v-cLr9RBUTHbTeJmabTVOR3EzzbEAanXoEcsVtr_jK7oyBb8iJlwEaECrZvS39DWttRkE3Ksf16W6xEIoSpGCR_vi6AorTBGg2lNLrGgHtg%3D%3D) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=50375089958f4ba2b651e5ddcc360430&_e=28zCmBou9bIAerBI_OVjz9m7TUSDqpN2SbJ65JmOwFHT7i3-TcFPDgila0dSHaSWNYlLxyUIfOADLizN-wPE2a3iuRqvjxYRNIR23lg865ppJPVjT0kcvc9CMANgp34ZrmMtkEPHeWgUNH_ukt9ams4DFJZ09bGK8vu-0lOEbdeTTDjBwPMai6JdInckikMKUi6ffl_yZ015FPh_CGroleAypdf29GHdKCzjWZB6Uhkx6hXO500OeGsVqYa9AgCqBtuMHf022wkaVa4RSK0VFOG7SP2keEk0MRBD11OioPk9BxvtsocPfEQHAht2ojSqnVaS2ZXlEPDNX2LQUIvZT_pOmja5GI7kgRDXbPXT8ftHZkg9lpIKmU39iFd6gviRP0B8kE0Z4SRC87Mro03qe-LlIYmh6BkhSlD1a_qa8_dnc_xry2vU-lBgp1tWxwhHc_6ERFe0eAa4lflxFz_Qdw%3D%3D). #
Peter,
Donald Trump recently announced that he will nominate MAGA ally Kash Patel to serve as FBI Director during his second term. It is an unprecedented move: **the current FBI Director, Christopher Wray, is serving a term that is supposed to last until 2027.**
For decades, it has been understood that the FBI Director _should not be a partisan position_. Our nation’s security should take precedence over politics, every single time. Prior presidents have kept the FBI Director of their predecessors in adherence to this understanding – **until now**.
**This is a dangerous break from tradition.** Donald Trump is replacing a qualified leader with yet another crony. We can all see where this is going: **Trump will use the FBI and other national security institutions as a tool to punish his political enemies.**
**We need resources to fight back against this move and any other attempts to subvert our nation’s security.** [**So if you’re with me, Peter, will you make a contribution to support Democrats in this key moment?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98158006/515755454/-1444662483?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.04_FBI_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODEzOTRmZi01Y2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KVpicADr6z0weARJVxQRSMwgiZgmM7_CBjB-rau3FJo=)

If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click Peter, Donald Trump recently announced that he will nominate MAGA ally Kash Patel to serve as FBI Director during his second term. It is an unprecedented move: the current FBI Director, Christopher Wray, is serving a term that is supposed to last until 2027. For decades, it has been understood that the FBI Director should not be a partisan position. Our nation’s security should take precedence over politics, every single time. Prior presidents have kept the FBI Director of their predecessors in adherence to this understanding – until now. This is a dangerous break from tradition. Donald Trump is replacing a qualified leader with yet another crony. We can all see where this is going: Trump will use the FBI and other national security institutions as a tool to punish his political enemies. We need resources to fight back against this move and any other attempts to subvert our nation’s security. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ****=** **=** **=** **=** **=** **=** Together, we can be prepared to challenge any threat to our freedoms and democracy. name: Left Action
subject: Tell Target: Animals deserve better!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Target: Animals Deserve Better](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe157923-057d-42aa-a7fb-cf45f4d44aff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta52667b0-ed35-458e-bcfb-7d73f1a86081/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **Abused animals need your help.[Please sign this petition to Brian Cornell, the CEO of Target, urging the company to keep its animal welfare promises and stop using cruel cages and crates.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89e0791f-925d-456a-9102-3f600faf3805/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** On a typical egg factory farm, a hen is crammed into a battery cage roughly the size of a microwave with as many as nine other birds, where she is unable to spread her wings for her entire life. Each hen is forced to eat, sleep and defecate in the same limited space and is denied almost everything that is natural to her. Mother pigs in the pork industry are routinely confined to "gestation crates," which are small cages that prohibit the sensitive, intelligent mom from even being able to turn around. These conditions are not only cruel to animals, but they increase the spread of diseases like salmonella, leading public health and food safety organizations to oppose the caging of egg-laying chickens and crating of mother pigs. **[Nearly a decade ago, Target pledged to eliminate battery cages and gestation crates from its egg and pork supply chains](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te32851a7-d267-4536-a8d8-bd5a6fc883fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). However, the company has now changed its mind and decided to keep selling eggs and pork that come from caged chickens and crated pigs indefinitely.** This means that millions of chickens and pigs will continue to suffer in squalid, miserable cages and crates for Target even though the company told customers it would do away with allowing such abuse. **Abused animals need your help.[Please sign this petition to Brian Cornell, the CEO of Target, urging the company to keep its animal welfare promises and stop using cruel cages and crates.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef1f4bdc-3482-4a17-89bb-6412b5f1b699/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38c2021f-1005-4f41-b356-a5c41f40c1c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action P.S. - Are you on Blue Sky? [Follow Left Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65de96a6-41de-42f9-876b-1912d1828a39/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8abd63ba-aeb4-4a33-a212-e046d74f803b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15e03636-b279-4f8a-8f6f-b5c7c888b7d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d42ec81-554c-4cb5-9903-37952f0c6c04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17b6908e-5c13-470f-bbbd-7b1088d3c1ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville here.

We're at a crossroads for our democracy, and I need to hear from the MOST passionate Democrats to help shape our strategy for the battles ahead. That includes YOU. [**So please, click here to take my strategy survey right away.**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19088%2E9716520%2EiVxKtW)

| | [START YOUR SURVEY](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19088%2E9716520%2EiVxKtW)
---

I just turned 80, so you better believe I've seen a lotta crazy stuff go down in politics -- but I won't lie, this year's election had my stomach in more knots than a kitten's yarn. **Now it's more important than ever that we make a plan to stop Trump, flip the Senate, and keep pushing forward.**

I'm waiting with bated breath to see how this team responds -- **because if we don't get fired the hell up, the Senate could be putty in Trump's tiny hands for his entire presidency.**

We can't let that happen, and that's why I selected you to take my **brand new strategy survey****.** I need to hear firsthand from Democrats across the country -- not more pundits in DC!! -- so I can help my friends at the DSCC lead the charge against MAGA Republicans and win back the Senate.

**Will you calm my nerves by being one of the first to take my new survey and proving that we're not gonna back down to Trump's wackos?** [**www.dscc.org/StrategySurvey**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19088%2E9716520%2EiVxKtW)

| [START YOUR SURVEY](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19088%2E9716520%2EiVxKtW)
---

Thank you,

\- James

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19088%2E9716520%2EiVxKtW)

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

Derivative of [photo](https://go.dscc.org/go/6153?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19088%2E9716520%2EiVxKtW) by JD Lasica. [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://go.dscc.org/go/1271?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241204-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19088%2E9716520%2EiVxKtW).

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98160163/515762649/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmUyZjY1Ny02MWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAGZm9J6Wz-1njV18iE14UDBQdSKStY1z7TTsGdVQcI=&emci=a8678751-61b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7be2f657-61b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=24635485)
Friend, Meeting today’s needs helps improve tomorrow’s future. That’s why we’re proud of all the accomplishments Wes has made so far to help assist Maryland’s workforce. This includes: ✅ **Signing the GAPS Act into law** to grow public safety and apprenticeship programs. ✅ **Securing funding to help community colleges** train workers for careers in hospitality. ✅ **Partnering with MDOT and our federal partners** to expand transportation apprenticeships through the Road to Careers program. There is still plenty more to come on the path to progress. We’re working night and day to make sure that all doors are open for Marylanders throughout the state. Opening up these opportunities starts with you, Friend. By supporting our campaign, you are allowing us to continue supporting Wes Moore as he takes action to uplift everyone. **[Please, make a contribution of any amount today so we can continue Wes’s fight to expand our workforce.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98160173/515762658/1674579967?refcode=em20241204-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmUyZjY1Ny02MWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAGZm9J6Wz-1njV18iE14UDBQdSKStY1z7TTsGdVQcI=)** | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98160177/515762668/1674579967?refcode=em20241204-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmUyZjY1Ny02MWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAGZm9J6Wz-1njV18iE14UDBQdSKStY1z7TTsGdVQcI=)**

Dear Peter,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Peter, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

Please join me for a Zoom Meeting on Tues., Dec. 10, 2024, at 7:30pm, for a discussion about my platform for NY-21. There is reason to believe that some time in the first quarter of 2025, after Elise Stefanik has resigned her seat in Congress, Governor Kathy Hochul will call a Special Election.
Please register in advance for this meeting:
**[https://us02web.zoom.us/.../tZwsceytpjItGdSMJv4...](https://substack.com/redirect/304d7e42-ae9d-43ab-a68f-68be2d36c53d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

**It’s unacceptable for the federal government to discriminate against Floridians who voted for Trump, and especially egregious in the aftermath of a hurricane. ** Yet, they’ve confirmed it happened at least once, right here in Florida. **They picked the wrong state to mess with, friend.** Here’s what’s happening to investigate this:
* With the full support of Governor DeSantis, Attorney General Ashley Moody has taken legal action and demanded a trial to find out the depth of this political corruption.
* And Gov. DeSantis has instructed state agencies to take any action necessary to investigate and ensure those who engaged in this behavior are held accountable.

In Florida, we’re lucky to have leaders who fight for us. And this fight won’t be easy. **Want to stay in the loop on the outcomes of these investigations? Simply click the button below to get on the update list.**

The clock is ticking until midnight to Trump-proof our wins.
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3110783/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3110784/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi—

Time is running out. **Midnight tonight** is your final opportunity to **TRIPLE** your impact on Giving Tuesday. [**Every dollar you give now will be TRIPLED to fuel Evergreen Action's push to protect our hard-won climate progress and keep fossil fuel giants at bay.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3110785/87SdQ4wZ)

**Why now?** Trump and his clown-car of climate denying friends are salivating over the chance to roll back historic gains for the climate. But in these last 50 days, President Biden actually has a critical opportunity to lock in key protections for our planet.

If we act fast, we can get Biden to cancel six mega-polluting gas projects—and with savvy strategy, we can make this win incredibly difficult for the Trump Administration to undo.

Your gift today, which will be TRIPLED, will help: |
---
|
* **Defend** the Inflation Reduction Act from attacks by fossil fuel giants and their allies.
* **Block** dangerous LNG projects and reject fossil fuel expansion.
* **Amplify** frontline voices in courtrooms, boardrooms, and on the streets.
* **Support** state and local leadership to drive progress that can withstand future challenges.

|
---
| We've been here before. All year, fossil fuel billionaires have been eagerly waiting for our strength and hope to falter. But with your help, we'll prove them wrong. Together, we'll ensure our climate wins aren't just protected—they're permanent.

[**Your gift before midnight will be TRIPLED. Don't let this opportunity slip away—triple your impact right now.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3110786/87SdQ4wZ) |
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3110787/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Every dollar you give fuels a movement ready to fight back and build a bold, resilient climate future. Together, we've achieved historic victories. **Tonight, we can make sure they last.**

[**Let's finish this fight strong.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3110788/87SdQ4wZ) 💪 |
---
| In solidarity,

The Evergreen Action Team |
---

name: Karen at United We Dream Action
subject: ICE detained me when I was 18 years old
body:
I watched as ICE officers knocked on our door to arrest my father and me, and forced ankle monitors onto my mother and sister. | | | Hi Peter, When I was 18 years old, I watched as ICE officers knocked on our door to arrest my father and me and forced ankle monitors onto my mother and sister. This traumatic scene unfolded after years of legal battles and confusion starting when my family applied for political asylum. Our lawyer never told us our case would carry deportation orders for our entire family. Now, with Donald Trump’s plans to execute mass deportations, this scenario might become all too common. **More kids will be subject to seeing ICE agents (_or even the military)_ invade their communities and rip family members out of their homes.** It’s a horrific image, and one UWDA is committed to preventing. We’re taking action NOW to make sure immigrants know their rights. We’re also going to be using every tool at our disposal to shut down the deportation machine. But we can’t do it without you, Peter. **[It’s still Giving Week. After I was released from detention, I was drowning in shame and fear. I became isolated and depressed, scared to share my story, afraid I would be judged. When I found the United We Dream community, I was transformed by the love and acceptance of my peers, who understood my struggles and gave me the support I needed to break my silence.
Now, I speak out unapologetically about the horrors of ICE and the need for permanent protections because I know that I’m not alone.
Thanks for being on our team,
Karen, United We Dream Action

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: I watched as ICE officers knocked on our door to arrest my father and me, and forced ankle monitors onto my mother and sister. | | | Hi Peter, When I was 18 years old, I watched as ICE officers knocked on our door to arrest my father and me and forced ankle monitors onto my mother and sister. This traumatic scene unfolded after years of legal battles and confusion starting when my family applied for political asylum. Our lawyer never told us our case would carry deportation orders for our entire family. Now, with Donald Trump’s plans to execute mass deportations, this scenario might become all too common. More kids will be subject to seeing ICE agents (or even the military) invade their communities and rip family members out of their homes. It’s a horrific image, and one UWDA is committed to preventing. We’re taking action NOW to make sure immigrants know their rights. We’re also going to be using every tool at our disposal to shut down the deportation machine. But we can’t do it without you, Peter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | After I was released from detention, I was drowning in shame and fear. I became isolated and depressed, scared to share my story, afraid I would be judged. When I found the United We Dream community, I was transformed by the love and acceptance of my peers, who understood my struggles and gave me the support I needed to break my silence. Now, I speak out unapologetically about the horrors of ICE and the need for permanent protections because I know that I’m not alone. Thanks for being on our team, Karen, United We Dream Action

body:
There’s only one thing we can do to keep Trump in check...
| Look, Republicans may be in control of the House, Senate, White House, and even Supreme Court...

name: Bernie vs Establishment via Our Revolution
subject: Democratic Leaders have their heads in the sand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20606?t=1011?refcode=email-20241204_v&akid=7347%2E5885482%2EnP1R6v ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,
just-released analysis by Nate Silver makes
clear that the tectonic shift which erupted on November 5th could deliver
victory to the Republicans in election and after election:

About half of Biden’s 2020 voters who stayed home in 2024 appear to have
backed Trump this year - Nate Silver

Bernie put the reason plainly: Democrats have abandoned working-class
families. But many Democratic leaders are refusing to confront the
widespread rejection of the current Democratic party to avoid upsetting
billionaire donors and entrenched interests.

Many of us are exhausted and frustrated, but as Bernie says: despair is
not an option. The work starts now.

The Our Revolution team is scrambling everything to build inside and
outside support to comprehensively transform the party. This means banning
dark money and holding consultants accountable, building the bench by
recruiting dozens of working-class candidates for races across the country
in 2025, all while preparing to stop Trump’s attacks on Medicare, Social
Security, and crucial safety-nets for American families.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20606?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241204nd&akid=7347%2E5885482%2EnP1R6v ]It’s a huge lift to turn on a dime like this, which is why we need to ask
for your support. Can you chip in today to our Despair is Not an Option
Fund to fight for a party and a platform that fights for working families?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20606?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241204nd&akid=7347%2E5885482%2EnP1R6v ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20606?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241204nd&akid=7347%2E5885482%2EnP1R6v ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20606?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241204nd&akid=7347%2E5885482%2EnP1R6v ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20606?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241204nd&akid=7347%2E5885482%2EnP1R6v ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20606?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241204nd&akid=7347%2E5885482%2EnP1R6v ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20606?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241204nd&akid=7347%2E5885482%2EnP1R6v ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Many Democrats are burying their heads in the sand, avoiding the
fundamental rejection that’s just taken place. Sitting around and waiting
for a ‘mid-term backlash’ will not bring them back to power.

They have completely misunderstood what’s happening in this country, which
Bernie pointed out BEFORE the election and AFTER the election:

“It should come as no great surprise that a Democratic Party which has
abandoned working-class people would find that the working-class has
abandoned them...While the Democratic Party leadership defends the status
quo, the American people are angry and want change.”

Waiting around for a midterm backlash is not a strategy that will win back
the trust and votes of working families who, as Nate Silver highlights,
“were more concerned by pocketbook issues than democracy or abortion
rights.”

There is an enormous task ahead of us to get the DNC to adopt a
transformative progressive platform that puts working-class families
first, kicks billionaire dark money out of the party, and recruits
working-class candidates up and down the ballot. Our political team will
be focusing on hundreds of local races and building up progressive
majorities in cities that can protect our communities (sanctuary cities,
LGBTQ+, and others).

It is going to be a slog, and much of this work will happen out of the
spotlight and headlines of the day — but it is absolutely essential if
we’re going to create a party and a platform that will beat the GOP and
deliver for poor and working people.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: A major Crypto ally in charge of the DSCC?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After the Democratic Party faced some major losses at the polls this
November, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer is reportedly leaning
toward naming Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand as the next chair of the Democratic
Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC).

Why does this matter? Well, the DSCC is one of the main fundraising arms
for the Democratic establishment, and Gillibrand is one of the Crypto
industry’s biggest allies in Washington.

Crypto executives are buying influence in the halls of power by spending
huge sums of money against progressive candidates like Congress members
Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman, as well as U.S. Senator Sherrod Brown.

Gillibrand is one of the people in Washington who’s been most bought by
Crypto, and it shows — she introduced a bill last year to create sweeping,
industry-friendly changes to Crypto taxes and regulation.

Now, they’re on their way to winning another big fight, putting one of
their biggest allies in charge of the Democratic Senate campaign group.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241204?refcode=em20241204-36206&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36206_1203867_n3srNv&akid=36206%2E1203867%2En3srNv ]Tweet by Usamah Andrabi: Few members of Congress have been more
blatantly corrupt in using their power to green light and profit off
Crypto. Crypto was the biggest corporate spender in the 2024 election and
this choice would be a very clear step in the wrong direction to be a
Party for the working class.

Crypto is the main reason we lost a critical Senate seat in Ohio,
contributing to a Republican majority after corporate Democrats across the
country like Gillibrand welcomed their influence. If the Party wants to
start appealing to working class people again, this is not the way to go
about it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241204?refcode=em20241204-36206&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36206_1203867_n3srNv&akid=36206%2E1203867%2En3srNv ]We’re fighting back against Crypto and other corporate interests’
influence on the Democratic Party by recruiting working class candidates
to run for Congress and unseat those who no longer serve the people. Will
you fuel our work with a $5 contribution today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241204?refcode=em20241204-36206&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36206_1203867_n3srNv&akid=36206%2E1203867%2En3srNv ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241204-36206-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36206_1203867_n3srNv&akid=36206%2E1203867%2En3srNv

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36206%2E1203867%2En3srNv

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Crypto is the main reason we lost a critical Senate seat in Ohio, contributing to a Republican majority after corporate Democrats across the country like Gillibrand welcomed their influence. If the Party wants to start appealing to working class people again, this is not the way to go about it. [ ]We’re fighting back against Crypto and other corporate interests’ influence on the Democratic Party by recruiting working class candidates to run for Congress and unseat those who no longer serve the people. Will you fuel our work with a $5 contribution today? [ ]Contribute $5 In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98167465/515786000/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNhMTgzNy02Y2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HitoD6xokzjvRKCAKioXgFYQYNFlgL8K0Mne3JxDfI=) We’ve been making waves in the news since our victory on Election Day, and it’s all thanks to you. Here’s a quick look at what’s been said, in case you missed it: On our local news network, **Fox 25** , I sat down to discuss how our coalition pulled off our BIG victory. I shared how we plan to get to work on Day 1 to restore the Michigan Dream for working families. In Congress, my job is to represent everyone, and I’m committed to waking up every day and fighting for _all_ of my constituents. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98167466/515786001/1443816105?refcode=email_120424_press-hits&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNhMTgzNy02Y2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HitoD6xokzjvRKCAKioXgFYQYNFlgL8K0Mne3JxDfI=) The **New York Times** highlighted our election as one where the Democrat succeeded in earning the votes of working families. The race came down to who would lower everyday costs and bring more high-paying jobs — and that’s exactly what we’re focused on doing. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98167467/515786002/1443816105?refcode=email_120424_press-hits&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNhMTgzNy02Y2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HitoD6xokzjvRKCAKioXgFYQYNFlgL8K0Mne3JxDfI=) The **Washington Post** discussed how we built a winning campaign from the ground up. With over 260,000 doors knocked and countless conversations, we connected with our neighbors about the issues that matter most to their daily lives: lowering costs and fighting for a brighter future for all of our children. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98167468/515786003/1443816105?refcode=email_120424_press-hits&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNhMTgzNy02Y2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HitoD6xokzjvRKCAKioXgFYQYNFlgL8K0Mne3JxDfI=) The **Cook Political Report** showcased our overperformance – the biggest for a non-incumbent in the country. Our campaign was proof that listening to our community and addressing their needs truly makes a difference. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98167469/515786004/1443816105?refcode=email_120424_press-hits&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNhMTgzNy02Y2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HitoD6xokzjvRKCAKioXgFYQYNFlgL8K0Mne3JxDfI=) Our success is a testament to the incredible support of people like you. Thanks to the power of this coalition, we pulled off the biggest overperformance of any non-incumbent House candidate in the country. People are taking notice, and we’re just getting started. [_**Now, I’m determined to show voters they made the right choice. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: End-time resources you can’t miss!
body:
What do all these signs and symbols mean for you?
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3469e01eb98248c9b89d55576253d6e2&_e=Ulv6AZnlBIT1BVjKycy4BlsxvtM0RnFlQOtkdKmst4MvofdIVxg7gqbRHotfjPY8g-uLwBO2NmUiGh3Q1lnB0QuBlxOSa-GcvpyA_ZoXNSfM0WYsV7djINPt2HnBUoZAjY-voK10upwEjU8jNiREaMukn2nrKeND-t22t5Z0Z10WafpzHurJDcsOQnJ3a63BT3sHeC47AoLJY9EQrLuN7EKyKlVGTK-luGdJh_IcAiaFqCjOFdOsar2l2lYDS8JZ5lg2a9eRmdw_DuFNS7LKUyyHUjiNWXcyiMIMt3AszY-sEC1mlghZw0tna2vOKzkNzekCS8zP0kY-oc-bAT0_mpy_fP2OcPPUjUYbbLktv5nTsviuwFeI_9FyWkgOs9gVbQvPJ4IT6udeyHQSnXABgA%3D%3D)
---
Hello Peter, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3469e01eb98248c9b89d55576253d6e2&_e=Ulv6AZnlBIT1BVjKycy4BlsxvtM0RnFlQOtkdKmst4MvofdIVxg7gqbRHotfjPY8g-uLwBO2NmUiGh3Q1lnB0QuBlxOSa-GcvpyA_ZoXNSfM0WYsV7djINPt2HnBUoZAjY-voK10upwEjU8jNiREaMukn2nrKeND-t22t5Z0Z10WafpzHurJDcsOQnJ3a63BT3sHeC47AoLJY9EQrLuN7EKyKlVGTK-luGdJh_IcAiYclS39XRRiDxgf54LUXjdmNkUlmU5NfE7UqboI_nNe4cvBU5hG4Zz3Sn5sD2dq47uOcoVd77rmo1iGln_BoZkosqEGVr5c227HjUSePtPbluFSofQgsu-mqV3Ry4Xav8KE9-u7RiGGns_WxB2U7yjMYjxrlgRv5rQ6u8lzh6Yuyw%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3469e01eb98248c9b89d55576253d6e2&_e=Ulv6AZnlBIT1BVjKycy4BlsxvtM0RnFlQOtkdKmst4MvofdIVxg7gqbRHotfjPY8g-uLwBO2NmUiGh3Q1lnB0QuBlxOSa-GcvpyA_ZoXNSfM0WYsV7djINPt2HnBUoZAjY-voK10upwEjU8jNiREaMukn2nrKeND-t22t5Z0Z10WafpzHurJDcsOQnJ3a63BT3sHeC47AoLJY9EQrLuN7EKyKlVGTK-luGdJh_IcAiYTOKT7yuUenk-hGnOZAwC7TtRMQ3V3JAyEBsvAcbPQiix9X6zwYbzU756TKH79dlkbDCp3QN1WBAH-t2aRNjYwVA_8JR6sS-pPYzu5qvIpqiI8usRBa8JkO8ey1ZrqxQ6PW_mX6venXTz3f-5_RLDXmI6ByVnOPybDBPURbLtWsQ%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
