**The Second Amendment couldn 't be clearer: _" shall not be infringed."_**

But the National Firearms Act (NFA) has been doing just that for decades--**_infringing on your constitutional rights and making felons out of law-abiding gun owners simply for owning legal items._**
Will you join me in this fight to protect our freedoms?
**[YES](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0601ab06ef544a57beb29c8396a31209&_e=-y75UlyZU0P1ST4JCO4dURz_jvpzX8Y1eKsMIKcIUZA8JZqMvad7yQCA0oc-iDnKtBf2H3rJIoO849tspFz5RayBJr23Sp9seCSG-g--KE4LaX9LFvqT0L8bG1NDrxDkFez5E-iQPJn0xQ6AVXQ9TdZes-EJIh1ijp-u55GvSLNhkMqzGwPDL3juSJWqR0tZxSYFMjTY7rng1BKwCgplUpbPb3wPvw6gpdjyTwZctpCT3Et2ZmfOchRuNHGNJLJddXwqsIxAUwnzcCCYIoW_Y2leU2fpKN1NpBvAWeK9bTL27YPm5StP9Utks4DfEwxmFvm1rucRg7xbdXPESfIfRrKsmiD7L7b6GjVVE8EvY0rexZkLAQ6pOeXmV5gjbxPyBdza-1r0X4bj-HbphxwkShirU02JiOBRF_OfFTB5OIm4YtosnbKrty2NOCvNPdGa)**** [ NO](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0601ab06ef544a57beb29c8396a31209&_e=-y75UlyZU0P1ST4JCO4dURz_jvpzX8Y1eKsMIKcIUZA8JZqMvad7yQCA0oc-iDnKtBf2H3rJIoO849tspFz5RayBJr23Sp9seCSG-g--KE4LaX9LFvqT0L8bG1NDrxDkFez5E-iQPJn0xQ6AVXQ9TdZes-EJIh1ijp-u55GvSLNhkMqzGwPDL3juSJWqR0tZxSYFMjTY7rng1BKwCgplUpbPb3wPvw6gpdjyTwZctpCT3Et2ZmfOchRuNHGNJLJddXwqsIxAUwnzcCCYIoW_Y2leU2fpKN1NpBvAWeK9bTIB9dl5Tip3DkjM7Yxwa7O2nz0NTugcuCrDHdUcyXGYZ8bbOQjVR0YV5TAtLPYbUg3uYbTLztUO2JJ6H0E50qclcxHUb9lmpXAxYT7vZ_VJYWHnFpNHn8qi4Bnoyn-XI9L9ponjLvaWdOhsr7ciBrSv)**
**This stops now.**

The NFA was designed to chip away at your freedoms and restrict your ability to protect yourself and your family.

** It's a relic of the past that has no place in a free America. **

That's why I've filed bold legislation to repeal the NFA, and with Republican control in Congress, we're ready to get it done.

This is about restoring the full power of your constitutional rights.

But I need _**YOUR**_ help.

I'm calling on **50,000 Patriots** to add their names and stand with me in Congress as we take on the Radical Left and their gun-grabbing agenda.

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Three opportunities in Virginia...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Every special election marks a chance to protect or expand Democratic seats in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Next month, we’ll face our first challenges of 2025 – three special elections for seats in the Virginia House and Senate.** | **State** | **Chamber** | **District**
---|---|---
Virginia
| House | HD-26

Virginia
| Senate | SD-10

Virginia
| Senate | SD-32

Democrats hold the Virginia Senate by an ultra-thin margin. Holding our ground in these special elections is crucial to defending control of the chamber against a Republican power grab.

subject: GOAL MISSED: We fell short
body:
Don't miss this chance to TRIPLE-MATCH your gift.
USO Supporter,
I wouldn't reach out again if it weren't important -- **but, after missing our original Giving Tuesday goal, we 're about to miss our _extended_ goal deadline despite our generous donors TRIPLE-matching gifts, up to a total of $50,000*.**
We can't provide the comforts and connections to home that our military heroes deserve without the generosity of supporters like you. That's why we hope you will take advantage of this limited opportunity to TRIPLE the value of your donation for service members before it's too late: **[Please, rush an urgent gift of $29 or more now and have it TRIPLED to become $87!](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/yvb0Cw_)**

Sydney Jones, USO

name: John Duarte
subject: Statement from Congressman John Duarte
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Duarte For Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b3e0f078e045/john-duarte-launches-campaign-for-13th-congressional-district-10345569?e=76a47b375f)
---
| |
---
|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
December 4, 2024
---
| | **Statement from Congressman John Duarte**
---
| Serving our Valley in Washington, DC, has been an honor. I am incredibly proud of everything we accomplished together, especially the millions of dollars worth of community projects that will provide clean water, good roads, and flood safety for our families, no matter what neighborhood they call home.

It was my privilege to get to know you and your families. As I’ve joined in religious festivals, shaken hands at small-town parades, and knocked on thousands of your front doors, your stories have touched me, inspired my service, and will stay with me as I return to my full-time job as a father and a farmer. I hope that I have been able to make your life better in the same way you have enriched mine.

This result is not what we wanted. But we fought hard and left it all on the field. I thank my campaign team, my congressional staff, and everyone who supported our fight over the last two years: you were the best team I could ask for. Together, we sent this farmer to Congress, and together we made a difference.

I called Congressman-elect Gray last night and congratulated him on his hard-fought win. I look forward to working with him to ensure that his team can hit the ground running to serve our Valley. I will make sure that all of our constituents who need help from the government will have their cases transferred to Congressman-elect Gray’s team.

While my time in Congress is ending, my love for our Valley will never go away. I will stay active in the fight to make our Valley a better place for all.

Your Farmer,

John Duarte ###
---

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5f512829-92bb-42e6-b5d2-08b74864755a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last month, two underwater cables were severed by the Chinese Bulk Carrier YiPeng3 which dragged its anchor of the vessel along the ocean floor. _**Neither the crew nor the captain noticed this which is highly suspect**_**.** The vessel remains in international water and refuses any form of inspection.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..KlLQ0PIEJswR0SSozNgpV35aXNscgFQS71kVv500NF8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152569592)
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a0e93f2c-6252-4d82-a1b4-7a600685b934?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Source](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/de83bf1a-8319-4800-ba30-11c801df0e6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Why are these cables so significant?**
The C-Lion cable enables secure communication and data transfer between Nordic Countries and NATO Central Command and the BC East-West Interlink that provides communication between the Baltic states and NATO aligned Sweden.
This was a _**low-cost low-tech**_ way of disrupting NATO communications during a time of escalation between NATO, Russia and China.
A simple anchor can knock out communication and we must explore fail-safe communication backups. There is probably other communication and military infrastructure that are vulnerable that have not yet been attacked.
**This is the second time in a year that Chinese Ships have dragged anchors in the Baltic.**
In October, 2023, a Chinese ship _NewNew Polar Bear_ dragged an anchor along the Baltic _**for hundreds of nautical miles**_ and ruptured the Balticconnector gas pipeline and severed two fiber-optic cables.
It will take at least 6-8 weeks to restore communication.
**What do the final months of the Biden Administration look like?**
Some have commented that the Biden Administration is taking action that will escalate conflict leading to World War 3. Given a change of administrations, China and Russia believe that the policies of the US will change when President Trump returns to the White House. _**To that end, Russia has recently used a new hypersonic missile system against the Ukraine.**_
**Peace Through Strength**
Peace Through Strength has generally prevented escalation and that is what is needed in these dangerous times. We must also be prepared to use economic weapons to weaken our enemies including massive flooding of the oil and gas markets to weaken the Russian and Iranian economy, and tariffs to weaken the Chinese economy. Many of these are tactics and strategies that are being developed by President Trump to execute as he takes office in January.
**Waking up the Sleeping Giant**
America has always been a sleeping giant that is slow to wake up but once woken is the most dangerous force on the face of the earth. The time to wake up is now.
Political division must be replaced by unity against a geopolitical threat by China, Russia, Iran and North Korea. Our alliances must be strengthened, and our allies need to know that we have their backs.
**Learning Lessons**
The United States and NATO must carefully analyze and correct their vulnerabilities. They must also make sure that we have credible defenses or equally destructive missile systems to counteract Russia's newest one.
We should view this cable destruction as not an isolated incident and pay closer attention to China and Russia. The US has urged European countries not to buy cables from Chinese manufacturers. Subsea communications and other gas and oil infrastructure continue to be at risk until these European countries share more intelligence and invest in redundancies.
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way.
**Please connect, subscribe, support and share - we have to get the word out.**

clean_body: Anchor Dragging by Chinese ships weaken NATO's capabilities AGAIN! | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Goldstein For Congress - Please Subscribe and also visit us at www.goldsteinforcongress.com Anchor Dragging by Chinese ships weaken NATO's capabilities AGAIN! | | and | Dec 4 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Last month, two underwater cables were severed by the Chinese Bulk Carrier YiPeng3 which dragged its anchor of the vessel along the ocean floor. Neither the crew nor the captain noticed this which is highly suspect. The vessel remains in international water and refuses any form of inspection. | | ---|---|--- Why are these cables so significant? The C-Lion cable enables secure communication and data transfer between Nordic Countries and NATO Central Command and the BC East-West Interlink that provides communication between the Baltic states and NATO aligned Sweden. This was a low-cost low-tech way of disrupting NATO communications during a time of escalation between NATO, Russia and China. A simple anchor can knock out communication and we must explore fail-safe communication backups. There is probably other communication and military infrastructure that are vulnerable that have not yet been attacked. This is the second time in a year that Chinese Ships have dragged anchors in the Baltic. In October, 2023, a Chinese ship NewNew Polar Bear dragged an anchor along the Baltic for hundreds of nautical miles and ruptured the Balticconnector gas pipeline and severed two fiber-optic cables. It will take at least 6-8 weeks to restore communication. What do the final months of the Biden Administration look like? Some have commented that the Biden Administration is taking action that will escalate conflict leading to World War 3. Given a change of administrations, China and Russia believe that the policies of the US will change when President Trump returns to the White House. To that end, Russia has recently used a new hypersonic missile system against the Ukraine. Peace Through Strength Peace Through Strength has generally prevented escalation and that is what is needed in these dangerous times. We must also be prepared to use economic weapons to weaken our enemies including massive flooding of the oil and gas markets to weaken the Russian and Iranian economy, and tariffs to weaken the Chinese economy. Many of these are tactics and strategies that are being developed by President Trump to execute as he takes office in January. Waking up the Sleeping Giant America has always been a sleeping giant that is slow to wake up but once woken is the most dangerous force on the face of the earth. The time to wake up is now. Political division must be replaced by unity against a geopolitical threat by China, Russia, Iran and North Korea. Our alliances must be strengthened, and our allies need to know that we have their backs. Learning Lessons The United States and NATO must carefully analyze and correct their vulnerabilities. They must also make sure that we have credible defenses or equally destructive missile systems to counteract Russia's newest one. We should view this cable destruction as not an isolated incident and pay closer attention to China and Russia. The US has urged European countries not to buy cables from Chinese manufacturers. Subsea communications and other gas and oil infrastructure continue to be at risk until these European countries share more intelligence and invest in redundancies. Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word. Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein The father-son team continues on so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way. Please connect, subscribe, support and share - we have to get the word out.** Please also subscribe to Jonathan's Substack as he builds out an additional platform. | A guest post by| Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 Michael's Substack is free today. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Democracy is for people, not corporations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we’re serious about making change, then this is where we start.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241204-4564-footer&t=1&akid=4564%2E420207%2E0IeKBn)
Peter,
We need to be honest about power in this country — who has it and who doesn’t.
**In the 2024 election, 150 billionaire families poured over $1.9 billion into key elections. All of it was completely legal.** Right now, billionaires and corporations have the power, while working people and our families do not.
Even when a majority of Americans support our progressive priorities — from raising wages to providing health care for all — these majorities rarely turn into legislative action. Despite having the people, we don’t have the power.
**It hasn’t always been like this. And it doesn’t have to be like this.**
Since the disastrous _Citizens United_ ruling, there are two sets of rules in our democracy — one for wealthy mega-donors and another for working people. That’s why I’m leading the fight to rewrite the rules and restore the promise of a democracy by the people, for the people.
**If we’re serious about making real, meaningful changes in people’s lives — this is where we start.**
We need to show Democrats that the path back to the majority is not funded by billionaires and corporate donors. It’s in giving power back to the people.
[**So if you’re with us, will you add your name to our petition calling on Congress to get dark money out of our elections?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20241204_Campaign_Finance_Reform_Petition?source=em20241204-4564&akid=4564%2E420207%2E0IeKBn)
**[Add Your Name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20241204_Campaign_Finance_Reform_Petition?source=em20241204-4564&akid=4564%2E420207%2E0IeKBn)**
As Democrats reflect on what it means to be a party out of power, I will keep pushing for us to make good on our promises, earning our votes by challenging the system that’s rigged for the wealthiest and fighting for real progressive change.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241204-4564-footer&t=2&refcode2=4564_420207_0IeKBn&akid=4564%2E420207%2E0IeKBn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4564%2E420207%2E0IeKBn)

clean_body: If we’re serious about making change, then this is where we start. Peter, We need to be honest about power in this country — who has it and who doesn’t. In the 2024 election, 150 billionaire families poured over $1.9 billion into key elections. All of it was completely legal. Right now, billionaires and corporations have the power, while working people and our families do not. Even when a majority of Americans support our progressive priorities — from raising wages to providing health care for all — these majorities rarely turn into legislative action. Despite having the people, we don’t have the power. It hasn’t always been like this. And it doesn’t have to be like this. Since the disastrous Citizens United ruling, there are two sets of rules in our democracy — one for wealthy mega-donors and another for working people. That’s why I’m leading the fight to rewrite the rules and restore the promise of a democracy by the people, for the people. If we’re serious about making real, meaningful changes in people’s lives — this is where we start. There is also still time for you to enter to win an Owyhee swag package, complete with a copy of the Owyhee art book, shirt, hat, and pin. As a part of our member base, we know how much you care about our environment and climate. We know that you want to make an impact. [**Any gift you make today will be doubled, so your gift will make twice the impact. Don’t let this match go to waste!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98169636/515792583/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzZDhmMWY2LTcxYjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ud08PGoHTnR6Kxnq4fiWe5hRYhQsT7NnrBqVQNbpYJI=&emci=0c0b8d26-beb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=63d8f1f6-71b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) Did you know that $50 is all it takes for us to recruit one new volunteer to our organization? These are the folks that will go out and lobby our elected officials, asking them to deliver on climate action. Giving Tuesday is all about generosity, so by joining in the giving spirit today, we can make a difference together. OLCV works to create a safe and healthy climate for our Oregon communities and future generations by serving as our state’s political arm for the environment. [**With your gift, we can make Oregon the bright green light that it is for climate action.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98169638/515792600/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzZDhmMWY2LTcxYjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ud08PGoHTnR6Kxnq4fiWe5hRYhQsT7NnrBqVQNbpYJI=&emci=0c0b8d26-beb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=63d8f1f6-71b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98169641/515792611/-1596352716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzZDhmMWY2LTcxYjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ud08PGoHTnR6Kxnq4fiWe5hRYhQsT7NnrBqVQNbpYJI=&emci=0c0b8d26-beb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=63d8f1f6-71b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)I’ll keep this part brief because I am sure it is already on all of your minds, but we know how much work is ahead of us in the next four years. There is so much we can achieve in 2025 if we start out strong and stand tall for what we believe in here in Oregon. We can continue Oregon’s status as being a leader on climate. Friend,

Joe Biden’s pardon of Hunter came as a shock to nobody... _**We knew they were dirty, but now, they aren’t even trying to hide it.**_
I'm staying at my office late to write this letter for you, because **The Fake News Media** & **Big Tech Conglomerates** are going to censor it...
**The Democrats, and the special interests they serve want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**
They are going to be mad as hell that I sent this out...
But I don't care, because I don’t work for them:
_**I work for the American people. I WORK FOR YOU. **_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9ysR/?__vbtrk=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
From 2014 until now, the Biden Crime Family received **over $27,000,000** from foreign individuals and groups as part of a **conspiracy** to get rich from Joe Biden’s positions in government... _**Thousands of these dollars can be traced directly back to _China_**_. The Biden Crime Family went as far as to set up shell companies to _hide these payments from our investigators._
Joe Biden used his position as Vice President to change American policies, making _**millions of dollars**_ for both his son, and his son’s _**foreign business partners**_. Witnesses say Joe Biden was directly involved in business dealings with **_Russian_ , _Ukrainian_** , and **_Chinese groups_.**
****
**You know it. I know it. Even the Democrats and the DOJ know it. **

But the DOJ and FBI _**gave special treatment**_ to Hunter because he is Joe Biden’s son.

We are even learning that the White House _**directly interfered with our investigators**_ by withholding key documents and witnesses!

Friend, the level of corruption we are witnessing is _**unprecedented, in the entire history of our country:**_
_****_
_****__**Joe Biden is the most corrupt President in American history...
And he isn’t even the one that has been controlling the White House.**_

Joe can issue as many pardons as he wants: _**this fight is far from over.**_

_**The American people are _done_ tolerating corruption at the highest levels: We demand better!**_
_****_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9ysR/?__vbtrk=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Deepstate, Corrupt RINO “Republicans,” and Democrat special interest megadonors _**hate**_ that I am exposing this... they want these crimes to stay out of sight, and out of mind.
_**They want the pardons to be filed, and they want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**_
_**[We can’t let that happen.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9ysR/?__vbtrk=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
__**Now that we’ve got real, actionable evidence against Joe Biden, things are about to get much, much worse.**__
We need to raise awareness... We need to mobilize our legal experts... We need to shed light on the Biden family’s corruption _**once and for all...**_
Nobody who loves our country can sit on the sidelines in the face of this sort of corruption: __**[we need to fight back harder than ever.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9ysR/?__vbtrk=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__

_**[Can I count on you to join me in this fight, and help me EXPOSE THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9ysR/?__vbtrk=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9ysR/?__vbtrk=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Yours in Freedom,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9ysR/?__vbtrk=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNDI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene

Summer Lee is on the front lines.**

At a recent House oversight committee meeting, Rep. Lee courageously stood up against the Republican-led Dismantle DEI Act — a dangerous proposal that would “abolish” all federal DEI offices and eliminate crucial funding for programs that ensure marginalized communities have a fair shot in education, the workplace, and beyond.

**[Sign our petition today to stand with Rep. Summer Lee and defend Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion initiatives.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_hs89zv4NOLBS3vbU0UYDzn6SEdGC_23C9nU-thBvoWuCuvtcA394s2w8oug4Ppnzs-_Iebx_xI-WmwfSDFU697-hKfJM0hA-uScMP8fqgPvRITzn991Tj7m_ADExRKA1N6XaUO_rDYMnsYmBbU304cR4DpJrFYV2h4GJXMlOGIyAWF812tDIVLUd5z53MtAXjodaapqmftVwUJOCog7fN-wF8lSogxeALpXR5-u391DfSzxPwnCLNGc51_UG-PK1GEz5ZNw28Q6YQivpGl9TksaAVO4R3VMdreervcorDZTf1v8424nDRgQc4CVgf6FPq0mNUvkIHLuusAsaB08Gx/4c0/mxfgFaKRT-2Jo7d_X-J-pQ/h2/h001.nskOTe8aRNS_Q2CcTUsPYtN0rlLQS15vtvXTLLMraiI)** | | [Sign the Petition →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_hs89zv4NOLBS3vbU0UYDzn6SEdGC_23C9nU-thBvoWuCuvtcA394s2w8oug4Ppnzs-_Iebx_xI-WmwfSDFU697-hKfJM0hA-uScMP8fqgPvRITzn991Tj7m_ADExRKA1N6XaUO_rDYMnsYmBbU304cR4DpJrFYV2h4GJXMlOGI2mceItIGoBMccagrK1tMIXEws_JJ2YBKyqE0eZgok88qYxzhxSz7BwJ-8UZGIeWF1OBq9q5uSDRRcXmiMiP3MhBeNwqM785lsbtPhqIYpNsGd5cJ-Jceq1DQxKj2r-NHr6cKtREQNz2w-otk5M6uyemtJxRSk-q5ozh2s03rjjD/4c0/mxfgFaKRT-2Jo7d_X-J-pQ/h3/h001.mt_468kD4pP3KdEEcmcK-_lDpJDIYWqj-rez6GjcCFo)

Rep. Lee’s powerful words cut straight to the heart of the matter: “Contrary to Republican conjecture, remedying past discrimination is not, in turn, a discrimination...That middle word, equity, does not mean more than or better than. It means treating people fairly and impartially. It means working to fix generational and systemic discrimination to the betterment of all of us and all of our institutions.”

Her bold stance underscores a fundamental truth: **DEI isn’t just a set of policies—it’s a commitment to building a more equitable society.** Yet, far-right extremists in Congress are working to strip away these essential protections, threatening progress for communities of color, women, LGBTQ+ individuals, and others who’ve been historically excluded.

By signing our petition, you'll send a clear message: We demand Congress reject the Dismantle DEI Act and stand firmly with Rep. Summer Lee in defending workplace diversity.

**[Click here to add your name and show them we won’t back down in the face of these attacks.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_hs89zv4NOLBS3vbU0UYDzn6SEdGC_23C9nU-thBvoWuCuvtcA394s2w8oug4Ppnzs-_Iebx_xI-WmwfSDFU697-hKfJM0hA-uScMP8fqgPvRITzn991Tj7m_ADExRKA1N6XaUO_rDYMnsYmBbU304cR4DpJrFYV2h4GJXMlOGI8y3qHMe7Wu_C_O-pWt0WqpxQ4SwJItA2MO3WGHqOiTx-tO2xHmEd9FhY6or12RFM72v_wRbmP_3AaviSKUsI1x56siulQTpOUrMG5gE4Pa_MMqzuiIl1nZR2iTNNX6iTFlUVaYvPPkvvtuX9wSU23Ux79Q7JqvjwMxc_o_jscD7/4c0/mxfgFaKRT-2Jo7d_X-J-pQ/h4/h001.YnOQK_isDu8qfdytdUZIXJ7Uint9GzTUysT44ulYPlQ)**

name: Voter Action Project North Carolina
subject: It's always about power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
To quote a reporter from Slate who is tracking this closely:
" The background here is that North Carolina voters just elected another Democratic governor, retained a Democratic state Supreme Court justice, AND broke Republicans’ supermajority in the legislature. GOP legislators are trying to undo voters’ decisions by stripping power from Democratic officials. "
This bill - like so many others - is about who has the power: The voters? Or the vote suppressors? RUSH $25 or more today to try and stop this bill in North Carolina and so many like it in upcoming state legislature sessions around the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120424_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120424_2&amount=25]
News & Observer: As protesters shout, NC Senate Republicans override Cooper veto of powers-stripping bill [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120424_2&amount=25]
Opponents of voting rights are already assaulting our democracy, Team. Vote suppressors here in North Carolina are doing all they can to strip the incoming governor of power and codify their control before they lose their legislative supermajority, all because they didn't win all the elections they wanted.
Check out what this bill does:
* Transfers the power to appoint members of the State Board of Elections from incoming Gov-elect Josh Stein (D) to incoming State Auditor-elect Dave Boliek (R).

* Restricts the governor's ability to fill judicial vacancies, forcing them to choose from a list provided by the unelected officials of the departing judge's party.

* Removes the seats of two County Superior Court judges (in Wake and Forsyth counties) after those judges repeatedly ruled against suppressive election law changes.

* Prohibits the State Attorney General from participating in lawsuits that would invalidate action by the state Assembly, even in the defense of citizen's rights.

* Reduces the ballot "curing" time -- where ballots with simple mistakes can be corrected by the voter -- from nine days to three.
That's not all -- t his bill attacks the roles of the state education superintendent and the lieutenant governor, makes the State Highway Patrol an independent agency that the legislature controls, and more -- but you get the idea. If opponents of voting rights can't win at the ballot box they'll codify their power however else they can .
Please, we have to fight this bill on the ground and in the courts, plus be ready for whatever suppressive bills come when new legislative sessions start in less than a month. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120424_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Only getting better from here
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]
Happy December!
This first month of my campaign to be Virginia’s Attorney General has gotten off to a flying start. I’m truly grateful for all the support that I’ve received so far. All I can say right now is thank you.
But there is some bad news: Jason Miyares – Virginia’s MAGA Attorney General – is fighting to stay in Richmond for another four years.
We know what this guy will do: he’ll back Trump at all costs, attack a woman’s reproductive rights, and let the corporate elite take priority over hard-working families.
Next year, we have the chance to protect Virginians against any overreach by the Trump Administration. From keeping our communities safe from gun violence or preventing higher healthcare costs, we need to do everything we can to defend our freedom once Trump is sworn in. That’s why it’s so crucial we kick Jason Miyares out of office.
So folks – if you support our mission of fighting for all of the Commonwealth, chip in any amount to our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $200,000 for Democratic candidates. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98170990/515796369/1995195851?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-12-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzMmMwNDZhLTc0YjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PKFAshAZYDncpcdg-PCMgXDRXhx5M3RlBgVPUZMMNCY=)

| Peter,

Donald Trump is back at it again.

His latest scheme? Trump established a pseudo-department called the “Department of Government Government Efficacy,” led by billionaire Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy and co-chaired by Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Their mission? Slashing government spending in the name of “efficiency.” In other words, targeting programs that help working families, seniors, and children while giving billionaires more influence over our government.

Trump and his MAGA allies are using DOGE to advance their extreme vision: _dismantling Social Security, cutting Medicaid, and defunding education and public health_. **We won’t let them get away with it!**

[_**Will you help us mobilize grassroots supporters across the country so we can expose Trump’s schemes and hold him and his allies accountable to the people by rushing a donation today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98170991/515796370/1995195851?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-12-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzMmMwNDZhLTc0YjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PKFAshAZYDncpcdg-PCMgXDRXhx5M3RlBgVPUZMMNCY=)

If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so And of course, you can at any time. = | Peter, Donald Trump is back at it again. His latest scheme? Trump established a pseudo-department called the “Department of Government Government Efficacy,” led by billionaire Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy and co-chaired by Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene. Their mission? Slashing government spending in the name of “efficiency.” In other words, targeting programs that help working families, seniors, and children while giving billionaires more influence over our government. clean_body: | | | | You won't want to miss this! Friend, Time is running out to join us for the Annual Advance , the premier networking and training event for Republicans across Virginia! ALL ticket sales close tonight at midnight , so don’t wait to secure your spot. Join us this weekend at the Kimpton Forum Hotel in Charlottesville for: Expert Training : Sharpen your skills with sessions designed to equip Republican leaders and activists for success. Networking Opportunities : Connect with fellow Republicans from across the Commonwealth. Inspiring Speakers : Hear from some of Virginia’s top conservative voices. This is the event where strategy is shaped, connections are made, and victories begin. Reserve your ticket before midnight: | Our room block at the Forum Hotel & Omni are officially full, but we still have a limited number of rooms available at our alternative locations. Click below to book your room now —and make sure to purchase your ticket at the same time to secure both your accommodation and event access! Reminder:** A ticket purchase is required to confirm your hotel reservation. Don't wait—book today to guarantee your spot! | See you in Charlottesville! name: David Horowitz
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fbee4b28e387436985d9572aa2b16605&_e=tDT2FetAhEkXLfEbvDS-9ArGTgYBOEyaf2YKoHWAC9PF_UClgWXDbDHN9On_E2sci41Q1PoYlY58KBn-tGHppLnTRUBUQ4Jp-u0etuj5GZo9sIjHMtRXBgCO3cXvUi1ofWJVV-9NgORcllDSDjGPhb10luO3HvMbYsN_cIx9fwc5vNrESC5e28f27fPjcUV-Yi0IlK7IIx-k64OjYy40iIwhXeGZbG3i0AKgX0sK_sV3V_JlOkDi40P38pi-MGEJhXSy32SAx2ljRqe8VLYgHpSe0udVMyTPlD8iNuDnselwo5L3iwIzNVJqjpzq8KYZCx1a2H5wYf8NiMb2o5e8hjagNMeKQtrUEt3Mo_HWaQ4y5VUu6VR0V5zVF2IMpMhlzRlML2suY810fxLTBrWW4MZKjZ5YOt9BgYY_eRM81qw%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fbee4b28e387436985d9572aa2b16605&_e=tDT2FetAhEkXLfEbvDS-9ArGTgYBOEyaf2YKoHWAC9PF_UClgWXDbDHN9On_E2sci41Q1PoYlY58KBn-tGHppLnTRUBUQ4Jp-u0etuj5GZo9sIjHMtRXBgCO3cXvUi1ofWJVV-9NgORcllDSDjGPhb10luO3HvMbYsN_cIx9fwc5vNrESC5e28f27fPjcUV-Yi0IlK7IIx-k64OjYy40iIwhXeGZbG3i0AKgX0sK_sV3V_JlOkDi40P38pi-MGEJQLXCkxaLU7NtaYdI2YzNeAFBTzGuZs099NbaCvF-K4PMwPZf2jxh7K9n53o1dqUoAoXpYwznm1CSykvQW8iP01E1V1oXvAKYM82-z2BOOqVeD20Le_DtWg2Jr10OY0Roc8zKF1Dwfw4B7ZBN8Np8rsQnnbgbEkhWbxFXpEL0gu4%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fbee4b28e387436985d9572aa2b16605&_e=tDT2FetAhEkXLfEbvDS-9ArGTgYBOEyaf2YKoHWAC9PF_UClgWXDbDHN9On_E2sci41Q1PoYlY58KBn-tGHppLnTRUBUQ4Jp-u0etuj5GZo9sIjHMtRXBgCO3cXvUi1ofWJVV-9NgORcllDSDjGPhb10luO3HvMbYsN_cIx9fwc5vNrESC5e28f27fPjcUV-Yi0IlK7IIx-k64OjYy40iIwhXeGZbG3i0AKgX0sK_sV3V_JlOkDi40P38pi-MGEJZjta6ll9FJvst1xHYo3m0dN-D8x8pzFqfwiSuzQNxdkAcpCogFZyiJNPX84FhF9ygWtBbURnetmsoVJLVehffgzKHtOb5u0xl5aPb6IpQ99PVNNTiBxE-ITDhfZJpWZqS5Mb67L-Y0PzGtmpqyp-jNQBPeeSvyadTnEQUaWrcz0%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fbee4b28e387436985d9572aa2b16605&_e=tDT2FetAhEkXLfEbvDS-9ArGTgYBOEyaf2YKoHWAC9PF_UClgWXDbDHN9On_E2sci41Q1PoYlY58KBn-tGHppLnTRUBUQ4Jp-u0etuj5GZo9sIjHMtRXBgCO3cXvUi1ofWJVV-9NgORcllDSDjGPhb10luO3HvMbYsN_cIx9fwc5vNrESC5e28f27fPjcUV-Yi0IlK7IIx-k64OjYy40iIwhXeGZbG3i0AKgX0sK_sV3V_JlOkDi40P38pi-MGEJdz8UVETCHeJV6ENbZbIhnCzo_W0DFzoHbzODog_oGQ4xi5Tmh5MrZz9VriidxdD5WYyitr-LgEvcTtxJbrNaBKH0UIPllRAvCi0CvSJXXl7q8TF6V44wq--eda0f_QlCpjjvc07_n7wTYQmvmAQcatks-Vlzm3pqhwDUK7zK3ZE%3D)

| | | **URGENT UPDATE ABOUT SPECIAL ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT:**
__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

__Now:__ Early voting is about to begin in FL-01 and we urgently need your support to win key races like this!

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

**_[That's why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks - before early voting begins - to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump's agenda.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f51e707a3c74c8195956d5de2aaefe5&_e=ekzawJjlqvTzooPu-rBfIwT6q9z4JA2szQzt-A6azWfx1dSS_lG1Kk9PrGV4IYZ2i7Nvjyv2ia8H5Tb1OXcZZTsyJA9LD-oMuxeXZ6z9LEup7IvZmQ3JLkBE-jNzDdy4bmKL86sl6W1g7iUfIygaXX4sj2NeVIjGNZiTcqVI7h14XKSq5tHYwY7Ps3j1o3NEFq0GLEc1Xp-bom8SNueUQHDgXjHPf0jLO8vENkc7WemqCE2fHwarybx13WfvcqWVcwc6Z63hJKEFkaxA_jUJUSKAsJeag2p0AiCjZtdfbL6GuUmKlL9cpu7a9URIs7wwoA8S47gyO365H49STZ6Ab3T_8TuPmNwIeNqFc8Kqrd387Tp4txYUbSD6nFE2jfRKXTGCeee1fGqsZ2EZWGXCE3A1C6euf8YJmmYmHiD7xREG9mtB2i6p82A9Po-tbEsWxm1zZQLBXOr6Pi9qOF9SEQ%3D%3D "That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks – before early voting begins – to help fill Matt Gaetz’s seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump’s agenda.")_**

subject: Breaking News From The NH Senate Republicans - Leadership Positions Announced

| Friends, I wanted to share some breaking news with you. I am very proud to announce our NH Senate Republicans leadership team for the coming legislative session! Senator Regina Birdsell will be the new Senate Majority Leader. Sen. Birdsell is a long-standing and respected member of our team that will bring her knowledge and experience to this critical post. _Other leadership positions:_ Senator Ruth Ward – Deputy Majority Leader Senator Keith Murphy – Deputy Majority Leader Senator Denise Ricciardi- Deputy Majority Leader Senator Daryl Abbas- President Pro Tempore Senator Dan Innis- Chair, Majority Policy Conference Senator Tim Lang- Senate Majority Whip Senator Kevin Avard- Senate Majority Deputy Whip In November, the state of New Hampshire sent a loud and clear message that we want fiscally responsible, conservative leadership in the Granite State that will fight for families, keep our taxes low, and protect our Live Free or Die values. This is the team that will lead these efforts in the Senate. This is going to be an exciting legislative session and you should expect to see a lot of great legislation to move New Hampshire forward and keep it the best state in the nation! Thank you, Sen. Sharon Carson, NH Senate President P.S. The NH Senate Republicans’ campaign is always planning for the future to protect our majority from all of the Democrats’ upcoming attacks. [If you would like to help us by chipping in $5, $25 or $100, you can follow this link to make an online donation!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yNjI3ODcyNDY0MDIwOTY4NjcyJmM9aDV0MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMzkyODg5MTI3JmQ9YjN6MGIycA==.tDCmHTUSd2oDGydy_2DfdhgXHhwue32aDf624QmqAVY)

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Governor Kotek is safeguarding abortion access
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, **Following the national results of last month’s election, and recognizing the serious threat a Republican trifecta in the federal government poses to abortion access, the Governor made sure to secure a stockpile of mifepristone to last through 2028. ** [_**Add your name to show your support for Governor Kotek’s efforts to protect access to reproductive health care in our state:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98171652/515798396/581255420?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzlkOTI2OC03N2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8KT6a4COQT9s_stGIs2cKjET3tY2A-RV2bYNFBkc5E=&emci=1136a2d2-28ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=239d9268-77b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98171654/515798398/581255420?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzlkOTI2OC03N2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8KT6a4COQT9s_stGIs2cKjET3tY2A-RV2bYNFBkc5E=&emci=1136a2d2-28ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=239d9268-77b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15353729)
---
Under Governor Kotek’s leadership, no Oregonian will be denied access to reproductive health care.
Governor Kotek is committed to protecting Oregon’s values, no matter who sits in the Oval Office. And she’s always been a fierce advocate for reproductive justice.
Beyond the mifepristone emergency stockpile, Governor Kotek has already committed to protect all providers who prescribe the drug and anyone who arrives from another state to receive care. Last year, she signed the _Access to Reproductive Health Care_ bill into law, protecting access to reproductive health care and providing state funding to clinics and community organizations providing care.
While we don’t know what the next four years will look like, Oregonians should be reassured knowing that Tina is looking to protect and defend the rights we hold most dear.
Thanks,
Team Tina

| Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. **Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98171656/515798427/559856784?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzlkOTI2OC03N2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8KT6a4COQT9s_stGIs2cKjET3tY2A-RV2bYNFBkc5E=)

subject: Eric Trump Is Coming Back To Sheridan.Church Tulsa!
body:
You are invited to come meet and hear from Eric Trump on Thursday, March 6 at Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK. In October, we had Eric at Sheridan and i
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9680.1.b3b647f562b8a687a82dfede89c1268f) |

You are invited to come _meet_ and _hear_ from [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9681.1.ce618d25112ac0750758e97bac7f22fc) on Thursday, March 6 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9682.1.133a375a7cd1aabcf2b814e0d2c9fabe) in Tulsa, OK. In October, we had **Eric** at **Sheridan** and it was an incredible event. You can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/livetrump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9683.1.cbe7f120536990d17e1d57a7de06b260) However, this March will be even better because **President Trump** will already be in the **White House** and we will hear _exclusive insights_ from **Eric** of what is taking place in the **Trump administration**. There will also be other guests at this event that we will announce as we get closer. Seating is **VERY** limited for this event. Please [RSVP](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9684.1.b4f0d943f9788916c07714f63978151a) here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9685.1.27e389f7e4673edef80d4306cb766098) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

The other night in **LA** , I almost got kicked out a **Laker** game... If you want a _GOOD laugh_ then check out this **WILD story**. Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/kVAHilLRt-I](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9688.1.1f8ad4ceabe078b6b46032585f720c27)

| | [ Watch: How I Almost Got Kicked Out Of A Laker Game ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9689.1.e2fb7aff154ff250a78eb45d80945753)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9690.1.731ecc1e35619df69411d822ac12226e)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9691.1.6b469f26c3892e6713f4875f6c28eb6b), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9692.1.7b191be133fbb54c5ebe52b0e6b8c0ca). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9693.1.11d0ef64d18cde071dfaec09fd0b4ad9)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9694.1.8be166f6a4322fe7747bec95b96a6fd9) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Saturday, December 7 @6pm: **Christmas Gala w/Mayor Giuliani** (6 tickets left) | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9695.1.8dd41ae534a91604ccf4cc4763a31335) -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Sunday, January 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9696.1.1cd8c6c3852840de4fd39a24d531e991): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9697.1.375bc16070bf3f25c961cf0013bc1996) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9698.1.e85fca2aad45f1be27fe61c10c017682)
---
---

The response to [Sheridan's 1st Annual Christmas Dinner Gala](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9700.1.d4584d732420886aedff10985b87d4bf) has been **HUGE**! _This event is nearly sold out_. If you have not got your ticket or reserved your table yet, now is the time. Keynote speaker: **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** Comedy Performance: **Brad Stine** Live Auction Items Include: **Signed Donald Trump Painting** and more... Silent Auction as well. I will also be sharing about **Operation 2025 at Sheridan.Church** that evening. This is a black tie event. Please join us for what will be an incredible experience to close out 2024 and to look into 2025. Kindly RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9701.1.b749812a72796bb5e1951eb39848f431) **Date** \- Saturday, December 7, 2024 **Time** \- 6:00-8:00pm **Address** \- 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

| | [ RSVP: Gala w/Mayor Rudy Giuliani ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9702.1.fc17f8ea1990e9d0e7f5d6fad655941a)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9703.1.ed549c16cc8127ef008707ecac8476ab), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9704.1.9bb61969372c9b1b543160f6f0f669a0), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9705.1.cac1dac04b6c962c7b873da7f02ac961)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9706.1.029c7b71e7026ed02dff3ba9f2f74f9a), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9707.1.11198cecbceae7dab8ddc8822fb37752), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9708.1.d4fbdb10cb4e96a38b4b6f28966d2558), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9709.1.0f8e1ffe7a6bbb830819f84d654f7f7a), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9710.1.75446a1d8446b8bf477be74cedb59285), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9711.1.a6e04cee472582c91b362a79cfa06145), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9712.1.1b9c6dce759086acce36913ee8c0e29d), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9713.1.d8b70047afc8584ac0cd36403f6683e3), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17978097.9714.1.5f5f0e8414df813513c4f379122a2b52) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!

name: Dr. Mark M. Yarbrough
subject: How to Read the Bible like a Seminary Professor
body:
Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible? | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=76773f4864154c2dbcf8202332221ce6&_t=w_31Q5Eiels7HRSLUPzPN-hkAPyU0APXgyQt0nxSKQ0K4L_9vmS6X6oSa5LAVkkISMc57nCgBGrWl70B_zSj9xcFNsBsDZRjbA3guwiG6Rf9xm_HrjfPhlF1HDXragIF)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=76773f4864154c2dbcf8202332221ce6&_e=5tjVJjbC976yxJw3iwP4imYOkh1KtkYv468jIZrzNV8SwKly7vPSHOS5WjxnyFqZghRPw8a1sypPfKQPpwPsWm3VOyyrcoAAIci6fzFP0n_G-MPAqpH09k-Pf1UNPgwXtrgJVGUeywEY86gJxtKtnkpV4_eRVnGK93TpuprHSZ0k8hJ9eZHhBMbU6wNehQlKZ4XvefJM95aZ4WbJc1epQ0ydufgyOThiKa8jxn_9vLS26DPk9gzuXIysAUrKuliIsvA8MdDKzULgPSs7BqEIO3aTnefAGrkthSeKBZkBXbUbsdH2CIMoEHoYCaZJ-fatoo1QBF5I8K1YMCl71wc6XoRt-NeZ3FXpVvZ92VJrZmXWtBc6-FfsDkPAT2y3E0eFeGUwRxQWqhPVZnMJ-mYlbpx1Ftut4J9HeN2xu-1rYXM%3D)
Dear Friend, Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible?

You read for a few minutes, shut your Bible, and then go about your day without another thought about what you've read. In some cases, it's become more of a task than inspiration. Or you've given up on reading the Bible altogether because it's just too overwhelming.

Maybe you've said to yourself: "I don't even know how to begin." [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=76773f4864154c2dbcf8202332221ce6&_e=5tjVJjbC976yxJw3iwP4imYOkh1KtkYv468jIZrzNV8SwKly7vPSHOS5WjxnyFqZghRPw8a1sypPfKQPpwPsWm3VOyyrcoAAIci6fzFP0n_G-MPAqpH09k-Pf1UNPgwXtrgJVGUeywEY86gJxtKtnkpV4_eRVnGK93TpuprHSZ0k8hJ9eZHhBMbU6wNehQlKZ4XvefJM95aZ4WbJc1epQ0ydufgyOThiKa8jxn_9vLS26DPk9gzuXIysAUrKuliIsvA8MdDKzULgPSs7BqEIO_VrKlYCB79UkXhamHRq-Fpt5HNrUHF4smJfuA6F0uhoxf4pHpwINNSHrSFRnEUiQXy35lhUWASaclR_wXyOrOxFcKuytxDYBNtlkSiH7OZ6B7DWiFORP4eQ9-POQlmOVDRQTaYoQxdEa4ErdwqAbGo%3D)
__ I understand. We all go through this in our spiritual journey.

Please let me encourage you that God loves it when you read His Word and offer you some guidance. **The goal of studying the Bible is not information --it's transformation.**

To help you grow stronger in your faith and spiritual maturity as you read the Bible, we've put together a free online course, ["How to Read the Bible Like a Seminary Professor."](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=76773f4864154c2dbcf8202332221ce6&_e=5tjVJjbC976yxJw3iwP4imYOkh1KtkYv468jIZrzNV8SwKly7vPSHOS5WjxnyFqZghRPw8a1sypPfKQPpwPsWm3VOyyrcoAAIci6fzFP0n_G-MPAqpH09k-Pf1UNPgwXtrgJVGUeywEY86gJxtKtnkpV4_eRVnGK93TpuprHSZ0k8hJ9eZHhBMbU6wNehQlKZ4XvefJM95aZ4WbJc1epQ0ydufgyOThiKa8jxn_9vLS26DPk9gzuXIysAUrKuliIsvA8MdDKzULgPSs7BqEIO_WwDE6aAjY46L7b5SQazKxFyJPVHWGFotOmF2C31qtsOGb3g4GQkdN-aIJxJQKyL367Ve6iK4QVh41AGY5loi6o_TbUWputk-2VxEB6J71Phgupe6IiFBnZzqq4eJAsq38UEV4X9Y4IumVb-JUv5GE%3D)

In this course, Dr. Howard G. Hendricks uses his 3-step approach of observation, interpretation, and application to help you get the most from reading the Bible.

I pray, as you go through the course, you'll discover the personal joy of reading God's Word.

If you want to deepen your faith and transform your life, access your free course now: [https://courses.dts.edu/courses/how-to-read-the-bible-like-a-seminary-professor](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=76773f4864154c2dbcf8202332221ce6&_e=5tjVJjbC976yxJw3iwP4imYOkh1KtkYv468jIZrzNV8SwKly7vPSHOS5WjxnyFqZghRPw8a1sypPfKQPpwPsWm3VOyyrcoAAIci6fzFP0n_G-MPAqpH09k-Pf1UNPgwXtrgJVGUeywEY86gJxtKtnkpV4_eRVnGK93TpuprHSZ0k8hJ9eZHhBMbU6wNehQlKZ4XvefJM95aZ4WbJc1epQ0ydufgyOThiKa8jxn_9vLS26DPk9gzuXIysAUrKuliIsvA8MdDKzULgPSs7BqEIO2P52WJ4RDQb5saWj5DMbDda0Js_gk_uvw64I2bx0E5yWHJRtbjZFTZJiYZG4dfluEtV2vAUfY_lhv72jhuxAw1AtxHU21JI-UN13poLiTIMMlxAcuTVrhhFJEi1wUFBCtTYtQTCafggfDUF59V4Mu0%3D)

Blessings, [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=76773f4864154c2dbcf8202332221ce6&_e=5tjVJjbC976yxJw3iwP4imYOkh1KtkYv468jIZrzNV8SwKly7vPSHOS5WjxnyFqZghRPw8a1sypPfKQPpwPsWm3VOyyrcoAAIci6fzFP0n_G-MPAqpH09k-Pf1UNPgwXtrgJVGUeywEY86gJxtKtnkpV4_eRVnGK93TpuprHSZ0k8hJ9eZHhBMbU6wNehQlKZ4XvefJM95aZ4WbJc1epQ0ydufgyOThiKa8jxn_9vLS26DPk9gzuXIysAUrKuliIsvA8MdDKzULgPSs7BqEIO0vgMjF1R5auSYt0GSUv2Y-PsQzpNDqivUxfJSZYfhQF0B4xj0fTkxp4jW-Q5-RvL-tj5qngfywAkBKfQ-5AxBGyQeFSOy3l1vL9r0Gy8Bti5967drzcvi7bAyzzyqOLzLx7rZTdOK1KPQeVzO2hZuA%3D) [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=76773f4864154c2dbcf8202332221ce6&_e=5tjVJjbC976yxJw3iwP4imYOkh1KtkYv468jIZrzNV8SwKly7vPSHOS5WjxnyFqZghRPw8a1sypPfKQPpwPsWm3VOyyrcoAAIci6fzFP0n_G-MPAqpH09k-Pf1UNPgwXtrgJVGUeywEY86gJxtKtnkpV4_eRVnGK93TpuprHSZ0k8hJ9eZHhBMbU6wNehQlKZ4XvefJM95aZ4WbJc1epQ0ydufgyOThiKa8jxn_9vLS26DPk9gzuXIysAUrKuliIsvA8MdDKzULgPSs7BqEIOzXAr9hpWb3DKmE1E54IzEe-u6KYAdvqvZQFUZ4TkrFhoVvSgyxAPw5JDHX0ofTvOu758n8ohrDOSbOatAQYYRZmIuu3CXn1iXkKvJIgxVpFji_LaMVsq-YyPAAmjKLs3FKYhbyEQCMJmaC6UTJUTNE%3D) Dr. Mark Yarbrough President [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=76773f4864154c2dbcf8202332221ce6&_e=5tjVJjbC976yxJw3iwP4imYOkh1KtkYv468jIZrzNV8SwKly7vPSHOS5WjxnyFqZghRPw8a1sypPfKQPpwPsWm3VOyyrcoAAIci6fzFP0n_G-MPAqpH09k-Pf1UNPgwXtrgJVGUeywEY86gJxtKtnkpV4_eRVnGK93TpuprHSZ0k8hJ9eZHhBMbU6wNehQlKZ4XvefJM95aZ4WbJc1epQ0ydufgyOThiKa8jxn_9vLS26DPk9gzuXIysAUrKuliIsvA8MdDKzULgPSs7BqEIOyGFgmVEaP7prxX_g0_W4SnSa-CAHgfMd5B1WS2nG3M2CXRoxwraU1lK21rpQh0DTWg9Aq0vQeGmtXqpVv6MCafD7sk7h843DnNDMl46FmwXwBXHT0D45-MnI8Ea4vVHLYkEx0yDjQwkOcijW4Nailo%3D) P.S. name: Signature Request [via Team Marsha]
subject: FROM: Peter TO: President Trump
body:
We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter!

| |
---
| | | Hey there -

Now that the election is behind us, we are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP.

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. _**[So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3d8858e2303d4d14b5a49766f21432f1&_e=qu3kZYl0AS7zgBUumZzYyr_5cHQmeHEvfiO5jbD9XCAdK5pjui19kAln04-DX-SjvTvahBFc9Jd4Raa3qjBQg9YNHaxrQvsndSGJSm_tHbmSk6CRARfPMjqrcczjqogTnVXNSL93M04o1JR70IBqpz7QI9V0tiWsZUhXAhA-WSN7B4UxGgGlI3ov2kNzkCP8xzTZkN7yCchFpbVorzKn485HAOOhRbHVgQRjueD2EesQ_QsO4vXKqeYJuDJ5b-uatX77ipUXQKOJOrDC83nAC1V3xbFwDNS6a7JPITinPh4hYg6uocRnqTWGWadBSFlY9elUHxedHYqIqiKh49VMNpjwvuZvlxvLGgKQZVp4tq_bXOQ32BjIieK9g0l7ZylGLI9PKB---Ri_91ifgSYPU4wObDg_MBfqvPFIZdYYXWA%3D "So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:")**_

---
| Dear President Trump,

I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States.

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. _I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time._

From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts:

**1)** Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that **YOU** are the right person to lead America.

**2)** Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that **YOUR** leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans.

_Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration._

Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great.

Together, we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Sincerely,

clean_body: We want your name at the VERY TOP of this letter! | | | | | Hey there - Now that the election is behind us, we are putting together a letter of support for President Trump and want YOUR name to be at the very TOP. You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. "So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience:" | Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Sincerely, "X_______________" | | | "SIGN THE LETTER >>" Thank you, Team Marsha | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Is this extreme?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241204.p_6XOF&refcode=em20241204-7695-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7695%2E2526796%2EvE0DFz)
If this is what makes us “extreme,” then we wear that label proudly.
We’ve built a movement fighting for each and every one of these issues — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[Can you please donate $5 or anything you can afford right now to keep our movement strong? Your donation sustains Alexandria’s campaign and keeps our team of dedicated organizers doing their work for a dignified wage.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241204.p_6XOF&refcode=em20241204-7695-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7695%2E2526796%2EvE0DFz)
We really rely on your support. It makes all the difference.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241204.p_6XOF&refcode=em20241204-7695-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=7695%2E2526796%2EvE0DFz)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96c6dbc2d8e447cfb22d52ad2b66772f&_e=EFzullfvfb7rknurV_eeGjFZq-pRgCEF3w0qsGMFSkytza5SMGjHVwqEXq7uSJKlkEaqRof-yXuMeRlZOi-nFkEMywL65WA0pcHxrOY3yZ7lndnY9R_I9haOQdMn0vGFIxXutFb0s2sfHjqU8xt982hyeP4DJe1L1pRgqQQULY5c9-yJ1TeOHOxvRhWI_pzL90C-JoV7HjHggQfLS6bkVSz-gVQ7hw_antfoA-K4w1rrayWZG6MFMtiAJORm6zoJL22QQbb0zegKrAwlaJDwiufnesXRbB4W_PPaPeUpS8lhv4lOLaz9FSSmBDPvSQBv90VBbpqj0n1uhCIL3O3DEuCYcUA0Os-CF5EtBx9CnOuJSiq4qotidkC5jSqkzoGRfp8lULDRjivwFJFUj2JDLg%3D%3D)

| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96c6dbc2d8e447cfb22d52ad2b66772f&_e=EFzullfvfb7rknurV_eeGjFZq-pRgCEF3w0qsGMFSkytza5SMGjHVwqEXq7uSJKlkEaqRof-yXuMeRlZOi-nFkEMywL65WA0pcHxrOY3yZ7lndnY9R_I9haOQdMn0vGFIxXutFb0s2sfHjqU8xt982hyeP4DJe1L1pRgqQQULY5c9-yJ1TeOHOxvRhWI_pzL90C-JoV7HjHggQfLS6bkVSz-gVQ7hw_antfoA-K4w1rrayWZG6MFMtiAJORm6zoJ0Zb_YfMr0p9m5Nsa5WFzr5BSdmBabrX48a-4Z8_h4S-kXOCUezYU8Fb0MoQyQXeS3pr3IisnpKCk3mXSfwXAOWzdf5HXrZdjfYP1wa6ONTNaKFLAXzmsGR6QAtu8P9fNG5mPX2uHZqtJace1YCPIsQ%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96c6dbc2d8e447cfb22d52ad2b66772f&_e=EFzullfvfb7rknurV_eeGjFZq-pRgCEF3w0qsGMFSkytza5SMGjHVwqEXq7uSJKlkEaqRof-yXuMeRlZOi-nFkEMywL65WA0pcHxrOY3yZ7lndnY9R_I9haOQdMn0vGFIxXutFb0s2sfHjqU8xt982hyeP4DJe1L1pRgqQQULY5c9-yJ1TeOHOxvRhWI_pzL90C-JoV7HjHggQfLS6bkVSz-gVQ7hw_antfoA-K4w1rrayWZG6MFMtiAJORm6zoJ1gBi4-ivdMPyD3C1mnEoyn_iU4BvBSnuhtvuTQFfCeSJeRcObxquetQZB7TAdY9VIZsgb63padQx-9jP0sbk2TuWDjbx2b0wr9Klkma7D-Ez0urw2VhBVWnmCcGYe198SQaBtlPiGX23rHqN6mUjLg%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96c6dbc2d8e447cfb22d52ad2b66772f&_e=EFzullfvfb7rknurV_eeGjFZq-pRgCEF3w0qsGMFSkytza5SMGjHVwqEXq7uSJKlkEaqRof-yXuMeRlZOi-nFkEMywL65WA0pcHxrOY3yZ7lndnY9R_I9haOQdMn0vGFIxXutFb0s2sfHjqU8xt982hyeP4DJe1L1pRgqQQULY5c9-yJ1TeOHOxvRhWI_pzL90C-JoV7HjHggQfLS6bkVSz-gVQ7hw_antfoA-K4w1rrayWZG6MFMtiAJORm6zoJG_dAP8dTvdmOTuEbRUSH3XJRcLYOLk-mx86OgQ6xmChjbXFl_nAiBp1SJHwkolOb9Ch2vD6iqnTJFCkosyjruul5H1qgeGEXKn6T-SUIgKaLdESLyiBPyYODNNKX-1e4_AJCZWt7F2GRGeO3JnYwFQ%3D%3D)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96c6dbc2d8e447cfb22d52ad2b66772f&_e=EFzullfvfb7rknurV_eeGjFZq-pRgCEF3w0qsGMFSkytza5SMGjHVwqEXq7uSJKlkEaqRof-yXuMeRlZOi-nFkEMywL65WA0pcHxrOY3yZ7lndnY9R_I9haOQdMn0vGFIxXutFb0s2sfHjqU8xt982hyeP4DJe1L1pRgqQQULY5c9-yJ1TeOHOxvRhWI_pzL90C-JoV7HjHggQfLS6bkVSz-gVQ7hw_antfoA-K4w1rrayWZG6MFMtiAJORm6zoJjvyMRx-19nldF_6vIEtVRYeva5P-h75rR65_FYxkYC6QEv8IiSlS8_SxfrqmShXtUBKeinbaESOOPtpOPxDQU1OHehei2XTnNEtl1rPHNfhviMORWGfgbnfkTEbFniB2DrayvXKjIGVNjpavUQtHjQ%3D%3D)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96c6dbc2d8e447cfb22d52ad2b66772f&_e=EFzullfvfb7rknurV_eeGjFZq-pRgCEF3w0qsGMFSkytza5SMGjHVwqEXq7uSJKlkEaqRof-yXuMeRlZOi-nFkEMywL65WA0pcHxrOY3yZ7lndnY9R_I9haOQdMn0vGFIxXutFb0s2sfHjqU8xt982hyeP4DJe1L1pRgqQQULY5c9-yJ1TeOHOxvRhWI_pzL90C-JoV7HjHggQfLS6bkVSz-gVQ7hw_antfoA-K4w1rrayWZG6MFMtiAJORm6zoJUFlTBQP_ClufMXaRtplP_LRAG9C1O7SeVNrxlYHl2UhgXPKWnfVBlv4_eIRv7Ys0uDaseTU0dUo5sb7uV1-gQDmwFPjgJ71XSt3EvE-Cb2IStIXE0d40337BUYY26a9jXBie2u6-3y1g70rSusXNMA%3D%3D)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---

Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your Founding Supporter Gift is $50 you will receive: ** All ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ** And a FREE copy of my children's book:Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

County entered an order granting a motion for default
judgment against District Attorney Fani Willis in Judicial Watch’s
lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith
and the House January 6 Committee. In doing so, the court grants
Judicial Watch’s request for attorneys’ fees and orders Willis to
search for and provide releasable records to Judicial Watch within
five business days.

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Trump has appointed…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Donald Trump is doubling down on his extremism, and his latest Cabinet nominations make it abundantly clear: we are heading into uncharted and dangerous territory.
Instead of appointing leaders to protect and serve the American people, Trump is filling our government with loyalists determined to dismantle the agencies that safeguard our rights, our health, and our safety. This isn’t just politics — it’s an unprecedented assault on our democracy and our future.
But let me be clear: we are not powerless.
I’ve spent my entire life fighting for justice and advocating for those who need it most. I’ve stood up to powerful systems of oppression before, and I’m not backing down now. Not with so much at stake.
I’m ready to lead this fight in Congress, push back against Trump’s extremist agenda, and be a voice for the people. But I can’t do it alone.
Right now, we need to rally around every Democratic champion we have. The road ahead will be hard, but it’s a road we can face if we stand united. Can I count on you to rush a contribution today to help me fight back and defend the values we all hold dear? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_120424_trumpappts]
