subject: Urgent Update About Gaetz’s Seat in Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We know you’re probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

| |
---
| | | **URGENT UPDATE ABOUT SPECIAL ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT:**
__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

__Now:__ Early voting is about to begin in FL-01 and we urgently need your support to win key races like this!
| | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pGAtaR_sv2QfIri7IRVrcg~~/AARclAA~~~ "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Do not forget this:

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

**_[That's why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks - before early voting begins - to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump's agenda.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pGAtaR_sv2QfIri7IRVrcg~~/AARclAA~~~ "That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks – before early voting begins – to help fill Matt Gaetz’s seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump’s agenda.")_**

We know you're probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

_Can you please help us? _
| [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pGAtaR_sv2QfIri7IRVrcg~~/AARclAA~~~ "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Thank you for all you do,

**HOUSE REPUBLICANS**
Sent via Team Scalise

| |

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: [Giving Tuesday Deadline EXTENDED] We can still secure a $100,000 match donation — but we need your help TODAY!
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4NDgzNjMS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDUyMzA2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — Last week, we announced a special challenge for Giving Tuesday:
A major donor offered to contribute $100,000 to support LCV’s environmental
campaigns into 2025 if 1,000 LCV supporters like you renewed their memberships
before midnight on Giving Tuesday. Unfortunately, we fell just short of our goal, Peter... But, I’m excited to let you know that we’ve just gotten approval to extend the
deadline for ONE MORE DAY.If everyone reading this email pitched in now, we’d blow through that goal in
minutes. And with this 1,000 donor challenge, small gifts — even just $5 —
matter just as much as large ones. We only need a few dozen donations to reach our goal, Peter. I know that we can reach it with your help. Please, Peter — renew your LCV membership for just $5, and help us meet this Giving Tuesday challenge to unlock an additional $100,000 for our work >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0Mq9L- https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfEm470t_ To help us reach this critical goal, we’ll send a free tote bag to LCV members who start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday. NAME EMAIL YOUR STATUS P. FRENCH - Current Peter Willis dpwillis67@gmail.com RENEW NOW FOR $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. M. BLAKE - Current RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. We wouldn’t be able to do this work without your help, Peter. From all
of us at LCV, thank you — for your generosity, and for everything that you do for the environment. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11848363&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDUyMzA2MAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDUyMzA2MAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11848363&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDUyMzA2MAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDUyMzA2MAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~

clean_body: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best , Marcus Welby , M.D. , and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=898e3d8a3c5d41b587f0f61354794f73&_e=g78BIi08xCzBBozZ0U1TPd3FKGP5GSJFLENL4LR5IXcisP0Tp9t5vFKHc29isLX0cG9up2TFJkYxtWdDyBzkHOaGO04iwnV-1Ln8hJCkE8ofcC17uuVvKoMfI-9NTdQpfMcovqBUbWxeEcOtqPLLbXXBqCFfeb0SRoA4PhKzqnteZaPuClIeFuTTTR61pI_TzTosYCPaSU8UZfObzL89EHZ3Dj1AEaEAyqzWxiYMAYmBhPKiLWG35bVGN6tGMgCSbImSi-4tWA4qlRgV6ABJTJzO7FlMt0ahQGMDMcfkxZIo5vKwyUsZB98LHW2TCVwKj4cBb5yprkTUCnnKOYROFZfF61X7lZzSf3XuzjATJUj6Mvcf4TV4iJ9jUB_w0h3gN0t56l2FqY_F58A0ctlS0Q%3D%3D)

| **Larry Kudlow**

clean_body: As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Reader,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82427310c08c4e568edd629cdff2be92&_e=IwVISziS_5VDRm7bjX-Jms2yBrr08UL3z9TlxIhcpqSr5AZOyeUd0xm_5lQQM0rukOx3lT7pCQ8cHhKmE6tqiX7g372xCOumkDJ5t1ACdjHP0xUG_J3g_b_P0TfN_J6qlsCHgEEwJdbwEu-MeY8XwJmElRkBFflcXN_KTFScSDdKL2n1b74D5GQ4n0HA-AvdVdRCKhRv_1pS5nebE18x06UZjXFvFpeU_sKRJ2K5BXmwo7dK168wqTF0K2obPxHa5A3uNyJBL5xV53o81CG5d8oeedR2nie3yL3vNLJP8hx-QUy_qMDRsFpPbVDRezRnPBBiV3suUdx0-mDH2-BTbU7vLWfgcmeabRIURuILKWefMDdz7rGXdLzC6g4MAPe0Oq2V80LjT0GVZ8yAO0f9lg%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82427310c08c4e568edd629cdff2be92&_e=IwVISziS_5VDRm7bjX-Jms2yBrr08UL3z9TlxIhcpqSr5AZOyeUd0xm_5lQQM0rukOx3lT7pCQ8cHhKmE6tqiX7g372xCOumkDJ5t1ACdjHP0xUG_J3g_b_P0TfN_J6qlsCHgEEwJdbwEu-MeY8XwJmElRkBFflcXN_KTFScSDdKL2n1b74D5GQ4n0HA-AvdVdRCKhRv_1pS5nebE18x06UZjXFvFpeU_sKRJ2K5BXmwo7dK168wqTF0K2obPxHa0g7i8EFq3JL4Ha6hMexQM13D_zegBRp3x3ucOiscqJ6jRXVUYsDXI_jkzhYTPWOdouqd3GidEiRh04I8CwJ9sbJXbmdgXvovmLdaTEK1oQ2VWi9WA_hseoBa9NWnB-R8RliYlV5sPhv1PwZn_ixp_A%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82427310c08c4e568edd629cdff2be92&_e=IwVISziS_5VDRm7bjX-Jms2yBrr08UL3z9TlxIhcpqSr5AZOyeUd0xm_5lQQM0rukOx3lT7pCQ8cHhKmE6tqiX7g372xCOumkDJ5t1ACdjHP0xUG_J3g_b_P0TfN_J6qlsCHgEEwJdbwEu-MeY8XwJmElRkBFflcXN_KTFScSDdKL2n1b74D5GQ4n0HA-AvdVdRCKhRv_1pS5nebE18x06UZjXFvFpeU_sKRJ2K5BXmwo7dK168wqTF0K2obPxHa2U5fZC1BSG8pobkOjC2b1H4YSA7b_uRFFK2uTIRbNwehhctEPOXByhlInQYvdXzpnAwklgnofoC8xOhbG1SoGBuz4E3e8k__BmVqDEUqOViE-_hxLNvk4sut1fmrvjFUfXWWAWD9sUMV4zPkV87-MQ%3D%3D)**

We can't risk falling behind ANY goal -- so please, help us close the gap immediately: We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | The pressure's on, Team DSCC Derivative of by Gage Skidmore. . | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Imagine our shock
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_e=CyNLbkhXA-YCSJDMDNEgm3vlyYHoh2jJmYOpqzxWwbtufbZrn61oBfplak4wgJZbXej5BgAdVHUbL8BnFb049O_Ymw20YJm6E5DUWgf5JqbNzDmGxXl6YeUx64pXIeXGauh-mtjIKv5237OHB9lZ5zbJPTZAkUEGlc2bM4XhHjc5kCDuQ3BfkRl7dCzdP1V8RiTJ-nMbNU9hB4aiMkbwZ9f73pZ0CwQKs6a5X7Ckaf4Gc5t2f-Mn5R4vYlWH-TFR-m8gYF0-czRJy2O-n5B-pUHk17ZRyQG_oEjQsBRLuCnA8oE_Xg1laZSktGM3JL3FRqXIl3peV0wPAoTzb0BOhtYGbwasAe23murIyTH-ErAcIvkQVpUjSL2k3kvuKwvN)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_e=CyNLbkhXA-YCSJDMDNEgm3vlyYHoh2jJmYOpqzxWwbtufbZrn61oBfplak4wgJZbXej5BgAdVHUbL8BnFb049O_Ymw20YJm6E5DUWgf5JqbNzDmGxXl6YeUx64pXIeXGauh-mtjIKv5237OHB9lZ5zbJPTZAkUEGlc2bM4XhHjc5kCDuQ3BfkRl7dCzdP1V8RiTJ-nMbNU9hB4aiMkbwZ9f73pZ0CwQKs6a5X7Ckaf76m11C8Ux72Wh6qq6oDNI94SFb2AB2Mp0hrD9HHiE70YWOS4R_wB-IhBHvJNRYTBOnc-VknlOQZC-jTLGYHmrC9LRE13Hb9HEugJevD1LHm_bKCYCNKq2m_dvDH-6pl9L86Gph4hXPmALaeJL0mmwl)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_e=CyNLbkhXA-YCSJDMDNEgm3vlyYHoh2jJmYOpqzxWwbtufbZrn61oBfplak4wgJZbXej5BgAdVHUbL8BnFb049O_Ymw20YJm6E5DUWgf5JqbNzDmGxXl6YeUx64pXIeXGauh-mtjIKv5237OHB9lZ5zbJPTZAkUEGlc2bM4XhHjc5kCDuQ3BfkRl7dCzdP1V8RiTJ-nMbNU9hB4aiMkbwZ9f73pZ0CwQKs6a5X7Ckaf6nnfleB-SPlQfwyL3DA-Eaj4OqQqSCwsOFq6C17fXNj1tV-lrryUtRlgFmV7vHvildlEZnFxz9heT3BeaCEoiF9S6ZIsjk6OvpI3PBeHqzywngVFfLPPn2UKyLSUIADW45PBxOfca0Oc2hlZNog-pB)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_e=CyNLbkhXA-YCSJDMDNEgm3vlyYHoh2jJmYOpqzxWwbtufbZrn61oBfplak4wgJZbXej5BgAdVHUbL8BnFb049O_Ymw20YJm6E5DUWgf5JqbNzDmGxXl6YeUx64pXIeXGauh-mtjIKv5237OHB9lZ5zbJPTZAkUEGlc2bM4XhHjc5kCDuQ3BfkRl7dCzdP1V8RiTJ-nMbNU9hB4aiMkbwZ9f73pZ0CwQKs6a5X7Ckaf7x7-RMR-YDRJePNeri0wKNpjPP6RFn1oodfHadXir4dTdy8Hzbvc2S4-TvxzQKxzefh2fqqhhCDZnQLcpBshsXJMlJ2q-OFz6jw-WLudQqUUGYAAAdIrZAFwQJdoyg6W2WGj5PXi1xjFZjoW83cG3S)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_e=CyNLbkhXA-YCSJDMDNEgm3vlyYHoh2jJmYOpqzxWwbtufbZrn61oBfplak4wgJZbXej5BgAdVHUbL8BnFb049O_Ymw20YJm6E5DUWgf5JqbNzDmGxXl6YeUx64pXIeXGauh-mtjIKv5237OHB9lZ5zbJPTZAkUEGlc2bM4XhHjc5kCDuQ3BfkRl7dCzdP1V8RiTJ-nMbNU9hB4aiMkbwZ9f73pZ0CwQKs6a5X7Ckaf7sTSrTHk-qvJS3KxnseqpJUWQ-oCu5qSQaqvjHiEvZWmIqoB2lpgWK71O8YUtNgG04TGmWd6Q0lWc0RD3ZbB44BgStfxLHCuQriZOu0u4NCgvHClYSCk-g9KuLqtyY0Du6ZRVjFFj2kd27ewBOvNBK)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_e=CyNLbkhXA-YCSJDMDNEgm3vlyYHoh2jJmYOpqzxWwbtufbZrn61oBfplak4wgJZbXej5BgAdVHUbL8BnFb049O_Ymw20YJm6E5DUWgf5JqbNzDmGxXl6YeUx64pXIeXGauh-mtjIKv5237OHB9lZ5zbJPTZAkUEGlc2bM4XhHjc5kCDuQ3BfkRl7dCzdP1V8RiTJ-nMbNU9hB4aiMkbwZ9f73pZ0CwQKs6a5X7Ckaf5u5B0TDq1s1gmtGh-s1Ci52dcWtX6Wk1i5COSUZ0q8r_tla42enB6NJMlJZlawQGsxMHeEQwOEn71jCvAUoFm9lTLJ2DI8Cpn8uiqHJcXxnPnxpxEHFZ0ky0rrLAl8jnY7ZRniQieOVBY0_JHC5r2o)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_e=CyNLbkhXA-YCSJDMDNEgm3vlyYHoh2jJmYOpqzxWwbtufbZrn61oBfplak4wgJZbXej5BgAdVHUbL8BnFb049O_Ymw20YJm6E5DUWgf5JqbNzDmGxXl6YeUx64pXIeXGauh-mtjIKv5237OHB9lZ5zbJPTZAkUEGlc2bM4XhHjc5kCDuQ3BfkRl7dCzdP1V8RiTJ-nMbNU9hB4aiMkbwZ9f73pZ0CwQKs6a5X7Ckaf52ymf4XfhbbjfsPYdDmSCB1gHcVCJe_tWAsFB4O_fTNk7SgEQpdXdbRky-xD-8TVl50Im5fnght0H_7LV1M3cClCVDYpjLDsuyQMEE9p7pK8iy79i9Ni17udEZ14aJWiXIciqG22PzYpjNrOvxABlW)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_e=CyNLbkhXA-YCSJDMDNEgm7plhzkp8SmImm8HhMDOrNlZM0SNAS0sdS1s7uWvUJKDPMakP47nSb_OfJHt2nw_9eReTLwIs8dyV_cRn3Hyyp1njb00cqVNyW0B6mG5NBhsXlhgCbnum8lKoQAJDQ04oEVw99ct762LAMXE-KWrf6YOtn4S5KQcINd5dRcu0oLqwb92aI729YNINIydWruQvQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click [here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=7b57c8d7e44b4fc7ae14f0e20810a08c&_t=tk31kROUtckimsdnxJ8P_huGY_RdslmZE_xAgLYT_7FJYT5nSwyULUCT3L7LR7Xki5nTiYZSxfyeie0DQjqxXf8Owjy0BQkP-zk-5Ki2qphTRfOR_SOu1ohhSDKUMy_g) to unsubscribe

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Reminder: Join us in 2 weeks for the MassDems Holiday Party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter-
The holiday season is upon us, and there are only two weeks until the annual MassDems Holiday Party! I’m thrilled to invite you to join me, Governor Healey, and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll to enjoy cocktails, refreshments, and the wonderful company of our community.
The Holiday Party will take place on Wednesday, December 18th, at 5:30 PM at the Omni Parker House . During the festivities, we will take a moment to honor the invaluable contributions and leadership of the legislators who will be leaving the Massachusetts State House and Senate. We'll reflect on their impact and thank them for their service as we prepare to continue building a brighter future together.
You can RSVP for the holiday party here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24] , and find more details on the invite below:
RSVP today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24]
I hope to see you on December 18th!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

#
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169011.172569.260&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12584)
# **[CLICK HERE TO REGISTER](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169011.172569.260&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12584)**
_**for the Next Discussion in Our Project 2025 Series**_ **_More Information: _**Join Senator Hughes and the Center for American Progress for an online town hall about how tariffs, taxes, and cuts to social security could impact your wallet. This will again be an interactive discussion where Senator Hughes and his guest answer your questions! Please share this invitation with any friends and family who have questions about Project 2025. All are welcome!
#
* * *
## _**Did you miss our last discussion on Project 2025 and healthcare?**_

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:
When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.
And we need you to join us.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=939f60687d194363bd895d7c9b3f8ff8&_e=UBplig5-ec8k06Xr7fIVb_t40xTlYv65bHabumrTHCvQe7o1lQJ2im67CGXrC8H8KYiosM4_H4b1YM62Cm04g2nz86l4jz1WaHUN9WjKx3kt46ROlG7HubhvOUhEz9-68yEmfxoixtOtdP8YVxP8TaEot8R3Um7NxHgU4PfMHqcJqSjo9LyAfbD9S219dcfDFJ1AWJIhOFramp4cT7GT07_cPhctARfbKtc0cWlmgOMkQO2XGzuwnqEQ6y4QX-byNA2J520VM1iqd-udaayjDY3bEKwRbTgAWaxhBr2V7f7a-kO0TvCTHeiB1wqMaBp0nvYcLQHFUTcrzZuKqUN69E8YxrC8Ci2L3NUyucGXKG3VjRFl-8jr2S7TZhEM9ETWFMV6gfiqY20VExjkWtPjLg%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=939f60687d194363bd895d7c9b3f8ff8&_e=UBplig5-ec8k06Xr7fIVb_t40xTlYv65bHabumrTHCvQe7o1lQJ2im67CGXrC8H8KYiosM4_H4b1YM62Cm04g2nz86l4jz1WaHUN9WjKx3kt46ROlG7HubhvOUhEz9-68yEmfxoixtOtdP8YVxP8TaEot8R3Um7NxHgU4PfMHqcJqSjo9LyAfbD9S219dcfDFJ1AWJIhOFramp4cT7GT07_cPhctARfbKtc0cWlmgOMkQO2XGzuwnqEQ6y4QX-byd3BSIeEi9GqQ4bLIiP6O_NlKJi0Wp31e4C_lgOtQMq7s5stizzOYY0ZgzFwcTXkXo6KBmF-1idRlsykHRCiX-ef3QNff16TGZoHfl6ihjpXXtcUurZO32dVHqPiI7RoCFhlJ48gyHhiEfq4cXkbosg%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=939f60687d194363bd895d7c9b3f8ff8&_e=UBplig5-ec8k06Xr7fIVb_t40xTlYv65bHabumrTHCvQe7o1lQJ2im67CGXrC8H8KYiosM4_H4b1YM62Cm04g2nz86l4jz1WaHUN9WjKx3kt46ROlG7HubhvOUhEz9-68yEmfxoixtOtdP8YVxP8TaEot8R3Um7NxHgU4PfMHqcJqSjo9LyAfbD9S219dcfDFJ1AWJIhOFramp4cT7GT07_cPhctARfbKtc0cWlmgOMkQO2XGzuwnqEQ6y4QX-by6z_9qH4wZ843nWDuW-hEl-p521IUs6WZV8hdf3gdN8nyZA8Chundoy0jyNd1h4WST-osi8v-hl9SIsZVZaQ9HmSW5EUN91sDkt1c5BpTg_XqVLPe4M343xLwtHT-VJvrki36ty1SP6QKNSj7-uVAVQ%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=939f60687d194363bd895d7c9b3f8ff8&_e=UBplig5-ec8k06Xr7fIVb_t40xTlYv65bHabumrTHCvQe7o1lQJ2im67CGXrC8H8KYiosM4_H4b1YM62Cm04g2nz86l4jz1WaHUN9WjKx3kt46ROlG7HubhvOUhEz9-68yEmfxoixtOtdP8YVxP8TaEot8R3Um7NxHgU4PfMHqcJqSjo9LyAfbD9S219dcfDFJ1AWJIhOFramp4cT7GT07_cPhctARfbKtc0cWlmgOMkQO2XGzuwnqEQ6y4QX-byHYuqNg0w7Rb8LcZ1CofGENEvgMedoNT3fLQoRudMf0JGBjyBCkD-3lxC3wce3hrCH1F-U9desFhqOLr_2zQwcKF3I30MKwjkREjRhUDHohweC7kTh8VT4tZ2TMZyrd181GRlRc_0gAzuVJOCsMam4Q%3D%3D)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=939f60687d194363bd895d7c9b3f8ff8&_e=UBplig5-ec8k06Xr7fIVb_t40xTlYv65bHabumrTHCvQe7o1lQJ2im67CGXrC8H8KYiosM4_H4b1YM62Cm04g2nz86l4jz1WaHUN9WjKx3kt46ROlG7HubhvOUhEz9-68yEmfxoixtOtdP8YVxP8TaEot8R3Um7NxHgU4PfMHqcJqSjo9LyAfbD9S219dcfDFJ1AWJIhOFramp4cT7GT07_cPhctARfbKtc0cWlmgOMkQO2XGzuwnqEQ6y4QX-byiCLIM7NUw-eP18EpsxC-uw9-OqKRuhcjxJo89J5ysFzhC5VOwF_Co2-Zm40A0xTxOhMrpZWwG8QnCZ30Si0W5e3kWkQ81LU0VgGksBM1OWpag9-Ro9aVojKguF6QlSdzjIlbcUxnijdLphTEkpoEQg%3D%3D)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=939f60687d194363bd895d7c9b3f8ff8&_e=UBplig5-ec8k06Xr7fIVb_t40xTlYv65bHabumrTHCvQe7o1lQJ2im67CGXrC8H8KYiosM4_H4b1YM62Cm04g2nz86l4jz1WaHUN9WjKx3kt46ROlG7HubhvOUhEz9-68yEmfxoixtOtdP8YVxP8TaEot8R3Um7NxHgU4PfMHqcJqSjo9LyAfbD9S219dcfDFJ1AWJIhOFramp4cT7GT07_cPhctARfbKtc0cWlmgOMkQO2XGzuwnqEQ6y4QX-byzei1v3mq5bLF08pjacoDt3c8ZouyNggj_9_O6edSehaQJmaIlKtuRu42duA8_gidJcR134G6NEhp8MCt255HoEyj-xXncFk9Rlfkmtdp7qk-Oo53gqoR4Uwp_XB1nFQUPcQ4Cy5rjrGyWWf7DFM0CA%3D%3D)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---

body:
Did you know the governorship AND control of the Virginia legislature are on the line?

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98175305/515811267/1302732553?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_VAelections_241204_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQyYWI5OS04NWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5SUlWzBl-q6_LXhKtqL2us9yK8sOoadhF0ckRNuGyU=) Derek,

**Did you know that next year, the governorship AND control of the legislature are on the line in Virginia?**

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [_**chip in $5 to help me support Virginia Democrats in this pivotal moment in the Commonwealth’s history**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98175307/515811269/1302732553?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_VAelections_241204_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQyYWI5OS04NWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5SUlWzBl-q6_LXhKtqL2us9yK8sOoadhF0ckRNuGyU=), but first, I want to tell you why winning these races is so important.

I’ve spoken with a lot of folks about what the upcoming Republican trifecta in Washington means for our state. Many are asking what we can possibly do to withstand its dangerous agenda. If you feel like there’s no hope, I’m here to tell you that’s not the case. **What we can do over the next four years – and what Virginia has the chance to do starting NEXT MONTH – is elect Democrats at the state level to be the last line of defense against the Trump agenda.**

With abortion rights, climate, and education likely to be under attack in the coming years, having a Democratic-controlled legislature and a Democratic governor in Virginia will make a huge difference in our fight.

Think about it: let’s say Trump delivers on his threat to dismantle the Department of Education. Who at the state level can sign bills to make sure our public schools get the support they need? The governor. If Trump bans abortion federally, who can fight to protect reproductive freedom in Virginia? The state legislature.

Next month, Virginians will vote in a special election that will decide control of the state Senate – if we fail to elect Kannan Srinivasan, Republicans will flip the chamber red. And next November, Virginians will have the chance to elect a Democrat to the governor’s office. Our fight to win these elections is well underway – and we need your help.

[_**If we want to protect Virginians, we need to win these high-stake elections. Rush $5 now to help me elect VA Democrats up and down the ballot in 2025 >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98175309/515811271/1302732553?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_VAelections_241204_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQyYWI5OS04NWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5SUlWzBl-q6_LXhKtqL2us9yK8sOoadhF0ckRNuGyU=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98175310/515811273/1302732553?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_VAelections_241204_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQyYWI5OS04NWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5SUlWzBl-q6_LXhKtqL2us9yK8sOoadhF0ckRNuGyU=)****

subject: The Real Issue with Biden's Pardon Is One Corporate Media Won't Address
body:
Corporate Media has turned Biden's pardon into a circus, while wholly ignoring where they should actually hold him accountable--and we are all worse off for it

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..EARdd7zPRzJCNzCUXkFteCh96irhPZCZ7rxjlJP2HeI?) for more

* * *
# [The Real Issue with Biden's Pardon Is One Corporate Media Won't Address](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152565078&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTY1MDc4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMzNDc1OTEsImV4cCI6MTczNTkzOTU5MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3uxAZR4E3JjXbUfxb1oib_DuZcHjdiroW0o2H7EV_6I)
### Corporate Media has turned Biden's pardon into a circus, while wholly ignoring where they should actually hold him accountable--and we are all worse off for it
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152565078&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTY1MDc4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMzM0NzU5MSwiZXhwIjoxNzM1OTM5NTkxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.phtg_2EcHk-F5xcdWpw6NSHuM2rhYT6m9BK2ILhTqzQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152565078&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTY1MDc4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMzNDc1OTEsImV4cCI6MTczNTkzOTU5MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3uxAZR4E3JjXbUfxb1oib_DuZcHjdiroW0o2H7EV_6I&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152565078&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTY1MDc4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzMzNDc1OTEsImV4cCI6MTczNTkzOTU5MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3uxAZR4E3JjXbUfxb1oib_DuZcHjdiroW0o2H7EV_6I)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC90aGUtcmVhbC1pc3N1ZS13aXRoLWJpZGVucy1wYXJkb24_.gLU0_uYkk_TVdaWuZZ8V9KPTlBv62cQRNW9Q6V68oyU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/the-real-issue-with-bidens-pardon?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

President Joe Biden's pardon of his son, Hunter Biden, has drawn predictable outrage from political opponents, and even Democrats like Senator Gary Peters (MI) and Congressman Jason Crow (CO-6). Politico, The Atlantic, and The New Yorker all piled on, absurdly claiming that now Biden has "_opened the door_ " to Trump's abuse of the pardon power.
Really? The man who previously pardoned dozens of convicted war criminals, and his own family, and plans to pardon January 6 insurrectionists--is _now_ emboldened? One must be incredibly dishonest, fatally incompetent, or a combination thereof, to make such a claim. Below I [explain a solution](https://substack.com/redirect/4c7ddfe6-f990-40b4-bfa6-e6962fa985ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to this media failure. Indeed, it is important we recognize that such critiques are indeed an abject failure of corporate media.
But they're also a failure because while chasing false comparisons, corporate media continues to miss the actual issues for which they _should_ hold Biden accountable. You see, the real issue isn't whether Biden should have pardoned his son--it's what he refuses to do for others, because that failure harms us all in devastating ways and we need to talk about it. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..lWNnICW7a-3OoHSMve577rt--IaAhNpu12UzJy0YFhA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152565078)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c9d13e0-ec95-466f-87d7-5fe97d594e31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Joe Biden and son Hunter Biden stepping out of a bookstore while shopping in Nantucket, Mass., on Nov. 29, 2024. [Credit: Mandel Ngan/AFP via Getty Images]
## Where Biden Must Be Held Accountable
Earlier I wrote why I[ reject the bad faith attacks on Biden](https://substack.com/redirect/ec3db500-7dbd-4d62-9abc-45ec40f17ab2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for pardoning his son Hunter. Similarly, and because my commitment remains to justice above all else, it is critical we address the sincere critiques of Biden's decision, and what we must continue to do to hold him accountable to the American people. That begins by calling out the numerous examples of _actual_ hypocrisy in Biden's decision to pardon Hunter.
#### Do Rules Matter?
For example, Biden touts respect for rules and norms, [even refusing to override the Senate parliamentarian](https://substack.com/redirect/e5859ca9-24e1-4afc-9ed6-177ec4c09360?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and even when it meant denying a minimum wage increase for tens of millions of Americans. Yet, when it came to his son Hunter, [Biden bypassed the normal pardon process](https://substack.com/redirect/b48fbf9c-8748-4454-a085-760202137446?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by excluding the Justice Department entirely. "Respecting" the rules to let an unelected bureaucrat prevent economic relief for tens of millions of Americans but ignoring the procedure to help your son is a glaring inconsistency.
But it doesn't stop here.
#### Remember the Crime Bill?
Yet more troubling is Biden's continued defense of policies that harm marginalized communities. For example, Biden authored the 1994 crime bill, which escalated mass incarceration, ballooned the private prison industry, and devastated Black and brown communities. Among many lasting impacts of that racist bill, today over 3,000 (disproportionately Black and Latino) people languish in federal prison for nonviolent marijuana offenses--people who remain incarcerated as a result of Biden's crime bill. Meanwhile, Biden uses the awesome power of the presidency to shield his son from even a fraction of the consequences of a drug offense.
I have seen zero corporate media stories address this _actual_ hypocrisy, even though it harms countless Americans.
#### Do Only Some Father's Matter?
As another example of the double standard at play, Biden speaks emotionally of a father's duty to protect his child, especially against malicious actors. A fair point. As a father myself I felt that in my core. But inexplicably, simultaneously Biden knowingly sends tens of billions in offensive weapons to Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, [despite the UN labeling it as 'consistent with genocide,'](https://substack.com/redirect/3d11a2b9-4759-47e3-a089-b47869aaf037?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at least two damning State Department reports that Netanyahu is committing war crimes, and CNN reporting that Israel has broken the Lebanon ceasefire more than 100 times. These collective acts that Biden has enabled have resulted in the preventable killing of tens of thousands of innocent children. How can Biden reconcile these indefensible policies with his stated compassion for vulnerable children? Do Palestinian and Lebanese fathers and mothers not love their children the same way Biden loves his?
As I've said on record, [even to conservative media](https://substack.com/redirect/c1e8bd6f-7240-4d38-acc3-cf349dd004c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I don't actually blame Biden for pardoning his son of a victimless crime, especially one in which no prosecutor would have sought prison time had Hunter's last name been anything other than Biden. What I vehemently object to is Biden touting his respect for rules and procedure as tens of millions of Americans are denied economic justice--but forsaking rules to help his son. I object to Biden authoring the racist 1994 crime bill that elevated the war on drugs, the devastating effects of which are felt today by thousands of Americans--but using the awesome power of the Presidency to prevent his son from suffering the consequences of Biden's own drug policies. I object to Biden citing his fatherhood instinct to protect his son from malicious harm--but knowingly arming a right wing extremist even as that extremist bombs and kills tens of thousands of innocent Palestinian and Lebanese children with American weapons.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..lWNnICW7a-3OoHSMve577rt--IaAhNpu12UzJy0YFhA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152565078)
## So What Are The Solutions?
We must address Biden's apathy, and failure of media. Below I present a roadmap.
#### Combatting Media Failures with Ground News
On media failures, while we cannot fix corporate media, we can ensure we aren't being fed propaganda. I've found a partner to combat misinformation with an app and website called Ground News.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b537755-2298-4c6d-bdb7-428f8168d94a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ground News brings transparency to news by gathering global coverage in one place, revealing source bias, factuality, and media ownership. They help cut through partisanship and sensationalism, the lack of transparency, editorial bias, and instead focus on confirmed coverage, facts, and proper context--so you can make informed decisions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2adc7404-fc9f-4686-9373-5c80d541fd6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You have my commitment to continue to provide thoughtful, comprehensive, and fact based analysis on the key human rights issues that impact us all. Ground News is one such valuable partner in this space, and I encourage you to likewise invest in them.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/4c7ddfe6-f990-40b4-bfa6-e6962fa985ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/969f737b-7596-4aa4-8d74-1ae06333a67c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d888823-07b9-4758-b225-8987994a94dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By the way, Ground News is subscriber supported, so by signing up you directly contribute to the platform's development. And given the holiday season, if you subscribe to Ground News at the above link, you'll get 50% on the Vantage Plan.
#### Demanding Accountability from Biden
On Biden--in his final 6 weeks in office, Joe Biden must act with urgency and courage to begin to rectify some of these injustices he's enabled. What does that look like?
First, commute the sentences of the 40 people currently on federal death row. We know Trump will end the federal death penalty moratorium. Biden should commute those sentences to life in prison immediately. In fact, Biden has remarkably [pardoned zero people on death row](https://substack.com/redirect/69bcc0fe-a596-4396-a001-3121b7e7f3ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) throughout his term in office.
Second, immediately commute sentences of the 3000+ Americans imprisoned for marijuana convictions and of anyone convicted of a federal non-violent drug offense. What is it but white supremacy that could allow disproportionately white Americans to become extraordinarily wealthy selling marijuana, while simultaneously disproportionately Black and Latino Americans suffer prison for using marijuana?
Third, uphold US Leahy Laws and international human rights law and stop sending Netanyahu offensive weapons. As mentioned repeatedly, not only is this the right, legal, and moral thing to do, it is also something that vast majority of Americans demand. Stop enabling the mass murder of children should not be a controversial ask.
Fourth, free 79-year-old Indigenous activist Leonard Peltier. Civil rights activists nationwide have called for his release for decades, after he was convicted under a dubious trial of killing FBI agents in 1970. Even Amnesty International calls his conviction and incarceration, "[a human rights tragedy](https://substack.com/redirect/29ffaa4e-56aa-4b80-876d-2bc0ce07902b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/abd73331-4013-4d8b-9108-cbbd4a742276?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: The Lakota People's Law Project
Fifth, Biden could fulfill his campaign promises to protect abortion access and cancel student debt with executive orders. Could these be overturned? Possibly. Probably? But that isn't the point. The point is doing so advances justice and creates significant barriers for MAGAs. It would slow their attempts to install authoritarianism in the years ahead. Why not given women another 6 weeks to protect their healthcare? Why not force Trump to explain to 40 million Americans that he is reshackling them with $1.7T in exploitative student loan debt while he absolves 815 billionaires of $2 trillion in tax cuts they don't need? Why not fight for these things, instead of comply in advance?
Finally, speaking of fighting, Biden could push the boundaries of presidential immunity, forcing the Supreme Court to restrict him--an essential move to curb the inevitable abuses of a second Trump presidency. We know Trump will push the limits of presidential immunity, and will have a complicit Supreme Court back him up. Why let Trump be the test case? Biden should _become_ the test case and force SCOTUS to keep him in check, thereby keeping Trump in check. Instead, Biden has so far used his authority to bend rules only when his own family is at stake.
Each of the above acts are entirely within Biden's control. The only stopping him, is him.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..lWNnICW7a-3OoHSMve577rt--IaAhNpu12UzJy0YFhA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152565078)
### Conclusion
Unlike the circus painted by corporate media (note, [subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/4c7ddfe6-f990-40b4-bfa6-e6962fa985ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), the above criticisms of Biden's inactions are legitimate criticisms. Why? Because Biden's inactions in the above cases demonstrably hurt tens of millions, if not hundreds of millions, of Americans--and he has the power to single-handedly right these wrongs. Meanwhile, many politicians and most all of legacy media won't make these criticisms because doing so would require confronting the systemic injustices they've helped enable. Protecting Hunter Biden while failing to extend that same grace and justice to millions of others reveals a troubling disconnect between Biden's rhetoric and his priorities. It must stop, and it is not too late.
If Biden truly believes in justice, he cannot stop at only protecting his son. He must fight to protect _all_ Americans from malicious harm. The presidency is a powerful office--not for selective compassion, but for systemic change. And it is long past time Biden used it.
Indeed, there's no presidential pardon comprehensive enough to excuse the injustice of inaction.
**Quick Note!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**

Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! Corporate Media has turned Biden's pardon into a circus, while wholly ignoring where they should actually hold him accountable--and we are all worse off for it | | | Dec 4 | | | | | | | | | | | | President Joe Biden's pardon of his son, Hunter Biden, has drawn predictable outrage from political opponents, and even Democrats like Senator Gary Peters (MI) and Congressman Jason Crow (CO-6). Politico, The Atlantic, and The New Yorker all piled on, absurdly claiming that now Biden has "opened the door " to Trump's abuse of the pardon power. Really? The man who previously pardoned dozens of convicted war criminals, and his own family, and plans to pardon January 6 insurrectionists--is now emboldened? One must be incredibly dishonest, fatally incompetent, or a combination thereof, to make such a claim. Below I to this media failure. Indeed, it is important we recognize that such critiques are indeed an abject failure of corporate media. But they're also a failure because while chasing false comparisons, corporate media continues to miss the actual issues for which they should hold Biden accountable. You see, the real issue isn't whether Biden should have pardoned his son--it's what he refuses to do for others, because that failure harms us all in devastating ways and we need to talk about it. Let 's Address This. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- President Joe Biden and son Hunter Biden stepping out of a bookstore while shopping in Nantucket, Mass., on Nov. 29, 2024. [Credit: Mandel Ngan/AFP via Getty Images] Where Biden Must Be Held Accountable Earlier I wrote why I for pardoning his son Hunter. Similarly, and because my commitment remains to justice above all else, it is critical we address the sincere critiques of Biden's decision, and what we must continue to do to hold him accountable to the American people. That begins by calling out the numerous examples of actual hypocrisy in Biden's decision to pardon Hunter. Do Rules Matter? For example, Biden touts respect for rules and norms, , and even when it meant denying a minimum wage increase for tens of millions of Americans. Yet, when it came to his son Hunter, by excluding the Justice Department entirely. "Respecting" the rules to let an unelected bureaucrat prevent economic relief for tens of millions of Americans but ignoring the procedure to help your son is a glaring inconsistency. But it doesn't stop here. Remember the Crime Bill? Yet more troubling is Biden's continued defense of policies that harm marginalized communities. For example, Biden authored the 1994 crime bill, which escalated mass incarceration, ballooned the private prison industry, and devastated Black and brown communities. Among many lasting impacts of that racist bill, today over 3,000 (disproportionately Black and Latino) people languish in federal prison for nonviolent marijuana offenses--people who remain incarcerated as a result of Biden's crime bill. Meanwhile, Biden uses the awesome power of the presidency to shield his son from even a fraction of the consequences of a drug offense. I have seen zero corporate media stories address this actual hypocrisy, even though it harms countless Americans. Do Only Some Father's Matter? As another example of the double standard at play, Biden speaks emotionally of a father's duty to protect his child, especially against malicious actors. A fair point. As a father myself I felt that in my core. But inexplicably, simultaneously Biden knowingly sends tens of billions in offensive weapons to Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, at least two damning State Department reports that Netanyahu is committing war crimes, and CNN reporting that Israel has broken the Lebanon ceasefire more than 100 times. These collective acts that Biden has enabled have resulted in the preventable killing of tens of thousands of innocent children. How can Biden reconcile these indefensible policies with his stated compassion for vulnerable children? Do Palestinian and Lebanese fathers and mothers not love their children the same way Biden loves his? As I've said on record, , I don't actually blame Biden for pardoning his son of a victimless crime, especially one in which no prosecutor would have sought prison time had Hunter's last name been anything other than Biden. What I vehemently object to is Biden touting his respect for rules and procedure as tens of millions of Americans are denied economic justice--but forsaking rules to help his son. I object to Biden authoring the racist 1994 crime bill that elevated the war on drugs, the devastating effects of which are felt today by thousands of Americans--but using the awesome power of the Presidency to prevent his son from suffering the consequences of Biden's own drug policies. I object to Biden citing his fatherhood instinct to protect his son from malicious harm--but knowingly arming a right wing extremist even as that extremist bombs and kills tens of thousands of innocent Palestinian and Lebanese children with American weapons. So What Are The Solutions? We must address Biden's apathy, and failure of media. Below I present a roadmap. Combatting Media Failures with Ground News On media failures, while we cannot fix corporate media, we can ensure we aren't being fed propaganda. I've found a partner to combat misinformation with an app and website called Ground News. | | ---|---|--- Ground News brings transparency to news by gathering global coverage in one place, revealing source bias, factuality, and media ownership. They help cut through partisanship and sensationalism, the lack of transparency, editorial bias, and instead focus on confirmed coverage, facts, and proper context--so you can make informed decisions. | | ---|---|--- You have my commitment to continue to provide thoughtful, comprehensive, and fact based analysis on the key human rights issues that impact us all. Ground News is one such valuable partner in this space, and I encourage you to likewise invest in them. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- By the way, Ground News is subscriber supported, so by signing up you directly contribute to the platform's development. And given the holiday season, if you subscribe to Ground News at the above link, you'll get 50% on the Vantage Plan. Demanding Accountability from Biden On Biden--in his final 6 weeks in office, Joe Biden must act with urgency and courage to begin to rectify some of these injustices he's enabled. What does that look like? First, commute the sentences of the 40 people currently on federal death row. We know Trump will end the federal death penalty moratorium. Biden should commute those sentences to life in prison immediately. In fact, Biden has remarkably throughout his term in office. Second, immediately commute sentences of the 3000+ Americans imprisoned for marijuana convictions and of anyone convicted of a federal non-violent drug offense. What is it but white supremacy that could allow disproportionately white Americans to become extraordinarily wealthy selling marijuana, while simultaneously disproportionately Black and Latino Americans suffer prison for using marijuana? Third, uphold US Leahy Laws and international human rights law and stop sending Netanyahu offensive weapons. As mentioned repeatedly, not only is this the right, legal, and moral thing to do, it is also something that vast majority of Americans demand. Stop enabling the mass murder of children should not be a controversial ask. Fourth, free 79-year-old Indigenous activist Leonard Peltier. Civil rights activists nationwide have called for his release for decades, after he was convicted under a dubious trial of killing FBI agents in 1970. Even Amnesty International calls his conviction and incarceration, "." | | ---|---|--- Credit: The Lakota People's Law Project Fifth, Biden could fulfill his campaign promises to protect abortion access and cancel student debt with executive orders. Could these be overturned? Possibly. Probably? But that isn't the point. The point is doing so advances justice and creates significant barriers for MAGAs. It would slow their attempts to install authoritarianism in the years ahead. Why not given women another 6 weeks to protect their healthcare? Why not force Trump to explain to 40 million Americans that he is reshackling them with $1.7T in exploitative student loan debt while he absolves 815 billionaires of $2 trillion in tax cuts they don't need? Why not fight for these things, instead of comply in advance? Finally, speaking of fighting, Biden could push the boundaries of presidential immunity, forcing the Supreme Court to restrict him--an essential move to curb the inevitable abuses of a second Trump presidency. We know Trump will push the limits of presidential immunity, and will have a complicit Supreme Court back him up. Why let Trump be the test case? Biden should become the test case and force SCOTUS to keep him in check, thereby keeping Trump in check. Instead, Biden has so far used his authority to bend rules only when his own family is at stake. Each of the above acts are entirely within Biden's control. The only stopping him, is him. Conclusion Unlike the circus painted by corporate media (note, ), the above criticisms of Biden's inactions are legitimate criticisms. Why? Because Biden's inactions in the above cases demonstrably hurt tens of millions, if not hundreds of millions, of Americans--and he has the power to single-handedly right these wrongs. Meanwhile, many politicians and most all of legacy media won't make these criticisms because doing so would require confronting the systemic injustices they've helped enable. Protecting Hunter Biden while failing to extend that same grace and justice to millions of others reveals a troubling disconnect between Biden's rhetoric and his priorities. It must stop, and it is not too late. If Biden truly believes in justice, he cannot stop at only protecting his son. He must fight to protect all Americans from malicious harm. The presidency is a powerful office--not for selective compassion, but for systemic change. And it is long past time Biden used it. Indeed, there's no presidential pardon comprehensive enough to excuse the injustice of inaction. Quick Note! subject: The road ahead

body:
Our efforts make a difference.

|

Peter, Republicans in Indiana are already breaking their campaign promises, and the new year hasn’t even begun. In the last few weeks, some legislative leaders poured cold water on property tax reform, finally recognizing our concerns with the loss of services it would bring to local communities. This legislative cycle is likely to be another where Indiana moves in the wrong direction. The percentage of funds spent on public education will likely decrease again as the state allows millionaire families to take tax dollars to send their kids to private schools. But we will fight back. Our state legislators are the final line of defense between bad ideas making it into law — **[will you chip into our party before session starts to help us push back against these dangerous ideas?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98175359/515811612/405560545?refcode=241204road&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiYTY1Yy04NmIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=El9uep3s6bF55eNEFkI50Rio9dEuw0qSVkhgGYsX5Vc=)** We also have an opportunity to pass some of the good bills that our Democratic legislators will bring to the table, such as water safety, workers’ rights, and more. **[You can send the supermajority a message by helping build a movement to threaten their hold on power in 2026 by donating to our party today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98175360/515811613/405560545?refcode=241204road&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiYTY1Yy04NmIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=El9uep3s6bF55eNEFkI50Rio9dEuw0qSVkhgGYsX5Vc=)** Thanks,

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d51e5dba3fec43b9a492545932f8b5c7&_e=bBHwjDZh_bo3C3vwtC1vvO9fYzcOUttI3JVRMzbtlJVAGGNFZ_Ixu7u9IHUcG3Vl_gEr_aic2N_oUmc6jIQnwPNHqBrtfIk7HrMycQaaEekfUyByHXf7IDbHWEa9nlBvTUZFXQpa87gAcj2IXzzlvKaTGZBNa_JTlHK1X0KcsH_1v3c6BfsaM2JJhwBEgM-uEH_DfD57zxyE8-6Hz_y-35jhWwlFJiQK1AS3ryN_b3bXrUKaV_bnaH031D0Hf9X2Wjt1Z-qP7rMW6Rqh0byFoMBtLW426_Je8WN8qL1IH0pGKQe1AGEamgjtebYsLRfJxu6FfSKyvMhifylyRawlKAjRcyWZ8iGMHrr7icKVTDBDrruOs3_mVagAesQQqds3WN6HvYSQwUnZUspVe8Tl9Q%3D%3D)
