| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d51e5dba3fec43b9a492545932f8b5c7&_e=bBHwjDZh_bo3C3vwtC1vvO9fYzcOUttI3JVRMzbtlJVAGGNFZ_Ixu7u9IHUcG3Vl_gEr_aic2N_oUmc6jIQnwPNHqBrtfIk7HrMycQaaEekfUyByHXf7IDbHWEa9nlBvTUZFXQpa87gAcj2IXzzlvKaTGZBNa_JTlHK1X0KcsH_1v3c6BfsaM2JJhwBEgM-uEH_DfD57zxyE8-6Hz_y-35jhWwlFJiQK1AS3ryN_b3bXrUKaV_bnaH031D0Hf9X2XqF9GsAgBhQXrDDJBSXZC5AdVcXsCP3RfAGSPe0hZ0kvewRAxcTyDy-00a-4qcPLu1dIsEtd4DHgT4spe5uiBfSa847esRbh9oUgRYtgYtHFXNFDSDZSzTqEe0o4dzb2M1SQS3KTEIMwhv93EulwuA%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d51e5dba3fec43b9a492545932f8b5c7&_e=bBHwjDZh_bo3C3vwtC1vvO9fYzcOUttI3JVRMzbtlJVAGGNFZ_Ixu7u9IHUcG3Vl_gEr_aic2N_oUmc6jIQnwPNHqBrtfIk7HrMycQaaEekfUyByHXf7IDbHWEa9nlBvTUZFXQpa87gAcj2IXzzlvKaTGZBNa_JTlHK1X0KcsH_1v3c6BfsaM2JJhwBEgM-uEH_DfD57zxyE8-6Hz_y-35jhWwlFJiQK1AS3ryN_b3bXrUKaV_bnaH031D0Hf9X2xDbV5BFSaV9dcl5no2wu-EmrhnaUyKIw2oB7eLgTB82na11KzHG30aNmOnHi68lBaMZ8n7itB16B2ENQCVqG0p-u5VFxCIpJc6D17hrjBzRs05qGa-vEzVbjXXfXeddWoiHSuPezWmtFlygJ_BuVWQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."

>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.

The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d51e5dba3fec43b9a492545932f8b5c7&_e=bBHwjDZh_bo3C3vwtC1vvO9fYzcOUttI3JVRMzbtlJVAGGNFZ_Ixu7u9IHUcG3Vl_gEr_aic2N_oUmc6jIQnwPNHqBrtfIk7HrMycQaaEekfUyByHXf7IDbHWEa9nlBvTUZFXQpa87gAcj2IXzzlvKaTGZBNa_JTlHK1X0KcsH_1v3c6BfsaM2JJhwBEgM-uEH_DfD57zxyE8-6Hz_y-35jhWwlFJiQK1AS3ryN_b3bXrUKaV_bnaH031D0Hf9X2-Ri2ipHsU2CrsPnS6YUPc3E2cEK7y3376T2XvKie_uEQrS6EuSibjotcg8YbIBEpxIfI81IchvBGLa0T-TTDWDt6xEbMBul9KQfQN6MELRZEy5Tf50ape_poZhRCspxbvceC72-1WgZXPZYIJvePog%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.

**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d51e5dba3fec43b9a492545932f8b5c7&_e=bBHwjDZh_bo3C3vwtC1vvO9fYzcOUttI3JVRMzbtlJVAGGNFZ_Ixu7u9IHUcG3Vl_gEr_aic2N_oUmc6jIQnwPNHqBrtfIk7HrMycQaaEekfUyByHXf7IDbHWEa9nlBvTUZFXQpa87gAcj2IXzzlvKaTGZBNa_JTlHK1X0KcsH_1v3c6BfsaM2JJhwBEgM-uEH_DfD57zxyE8-6Hz_y-35jhWwlFJiQK1AS3ryN_b3bXrUKaV_bnaH031D0Hf9X2FqYJgQA8U7F-wOuez0U_4P5AM_y6sVmwwxUawpE_zWVh9k0H64NiCvoKE6yMHTEyi2t_7ASFl7lePmMCc_RbR6n5LRlbaiL_00sv-3eqiryaZmadumcj5obBEj0e8Db0HrQuGLnTDFmuwpsrDWEJFg%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!

**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d51e5dba3fec43b9a492545932f8b5c7&_e=bBHwjDZh_bo3C3vwtC1vvO9fYzcOUttI3JVRMzbtlJVAGGNFZ_Ixu7u9IHUcG3Vl_gEr_aic2N_oUmc6jIQnwPNHqBrtfIk7HrMycQaaEekfUyByHXf7IDbHWEa9nlBvTUZFXQpa87gAcj2IXzzlvKaTGZBNa_JTlHK1X0KcsH_1v3c6BfsaM2JJhwBEgM-uEH_DfD57zxyE8-6Hz_y-35jhWwlFJiQK1AS3ryN_b3bXrUKaV_bnaH031D0Hf9X2juXJU2ZU4MMQn0pXynNdvKBMuaAa8GD9aDf1Xv9mgCmHOpv4zHWB5hD6VkAWPKN_bD2OyFmsZ2NyJu3ig4_wtdC9eEwzF7yN1O1lW5HT3v7wD6EyPhW6LDykokwW9HT-LHSvcK2XDEq8_xKWHkBPHA%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!

clean_body: Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Subject: Urgent: Sign Our Petition for Justice in Pakistan
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/03252f98122c/subject-urgent-sign-our-petition-for-justice-in-pakistan?e=7b1b739a89)
---
| **Join Us in Demanding Justice for Those Who Sacrifice Everything for Freedom – Sign the Petition Today!**
---
| | | |
---
|
Dear Friend,
I urgently need your help. On November 26, 2024, peaceful protesters in Islamabad faced unimaginable brutality as Pakistani authorities opened fire on them. This horrific event is part of a larger, ongoing assault on democracy and human rights in Pakistan, where thousands of activists remain unjustly detained.
We are demanding action from key institutions, including:
\- An independent international inquiry into the events.\- Immediate release of all political prisoners.\- Protection of evidence and victims' families.\- Timely sanctions against those responsible for these human rights violations.
This fight is not just for Pakistan; it’s a stand for democracy and human rights worldwide. With the rise of authoritarianism globally, including in countries like Korea and Romania, we must remain vigilant in demanding that human rights are respected everywhere.
Your voice matters.**Please sign this petition and help us demand justice for those who risk everything for their freedom.**
Thank you for your support.
Best regards,
Dr. Asif Mahmood Human Rights Advocate

---
[Please Sign Now](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=279b4bbf76&e=7b1b739a89)

With the rise of authoritarianism globally, including in countries like Korea and Romania, we must remain vigilant in demanding that human rights are respected everywhere. Your voice matters.Please sign this petition and help us demand justice for those who risk everything for their freedom. Thank you for your support. Best regards, Dr. Asif Mahmood Human Rights Advocate | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Dr. Asif Mahmood. All rights reserved.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The antidote to drag queen story hour
body:
When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f4163aa100e749a0900bb1bcc2427fbd&_e=zpyhmS-Ggsz6s18OPoEEvXHI7jDEhpeTSzAnI4EIfDJt4YRNy2VHolalDSnHdSJUKncAwHSKuI4xQj1zriiAgnIyt2wDylL_TKv-LlJ7dIF9sCPNWkWXKAHCvfHMwycMheMrc4AYHF6GQmaAbe3th3a1z8yJ8lBidNLhUt4-RYsaQ9W61NgMEI78kdQD-eKPV80ZFyoD0ItaOp815Y7_tN5JFuFmJzZNhkO0ntvWXYmuxeteyMGNXN4HQQpS0sMCy-CxekG5a1ABTREE0rWGGXs3IxcYrPnVYfnO_0flY6CIh5z18Tz2w0Fd_qN7BmgP28IUcgITeDCPQ91j_zvqeZxCK7eX_2nta9Tvtq4HJb3_8e6b6EbKKr6Mu4x2ITayWThK2BB47Z7tIH4VxCNhVg%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---

---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f4163aa100e749a0900bb1bcc2427fbd&_e=zpyhmS-Ggsz6s18OPoEEvXHI7jDEhpeTSzAnI4EIfDJt4YRNy2VHolalDSnHdSJUKncAwHSKuI4xQj1zriiAgnIyt2wDylL_TKv-LlJ7dIF9sCPNWkWXKAHCvfHMwycMheMrc4AYHF6GQmaAbe3th3a1z8yJ8lBidNLhUt4-RYsaQ9W61NgMEI78kdQD-eKPV80ZFyoD0ItaOp815Y7_tN5JFuFmJzZNhkO0ntvWXYksdP7ztoaB945lTYK31QDR2TR_ZU4pRFaun-9W1FsUyNPThloiJoQwemAl6rmUZyWtPQ3eJjaYrDp2AvXmEOPNDXCgvH8IvmB4TPzxjswdN1stkTG0ZiTzaXT__iiN1rtG7gV8xsIWeVoFTc64OYIWnjyGEDVA0IrfZUf93-pSgw%3D%3D)

| But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;">
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f4163aa100e749a0900bb1bcc2427fbd&_e=zpyhmS-Ggsz6s18OPoEEvXHI7jDEhpeTSzAnI4EIfDJt4YRNy2VHolalDSnHdSJUKncAwHSKuI4xQj1zriiAgnIyt2wDylL_TKv-LlJ7dIF9sCPNWkWXKAHCvfHMwycMheMrc4AYHF6GQmaAbe3th3a1z8yJ8lBidNLhUt4-RYsaQ9W61NgMEI78kdQD-eKPV80ZFyoD0ItaOp815Y7_tN5JFuFmJzZNhkO0ntvWXYm7HqlwR2OTzkVpVZD3ZgI8zg0E0myQF455xsKfibuFUZOS2h50CqPu7Y7PxbNLPIsWwoO4t8LXiLuPfftzwAFdgbcJ3F7DfScZjXkw9onkLwwVK0gkbEkk5VKQZJPp0ozsn7k27-yyCMDiBuzQIz3u8Vu3CVBDmDwpJ2W4akV7dA%3D%3D)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f4163aa100e749a0900bb1bcc2427fbd&_e=zpyhmS-Ggsz6s18OPoEEvXHI7jDEhpeTSzAnI4EIfDJt4YRNy2VHolalDSnHdSJUKncAwHSKuI4xQj1zriiAgnIyt2wDylL_TKv-LlJ7dIF9sCPNWkWXKAHCvfHMwycMheMrc4AYHF6GQmaAbe3th3a1z8yJ8lBidNLhUt4-RYsaQ9W61NgMEI78kdQD-eKPV80ZFyoD0ItaOp815Y7_tN5JFuFmJzZNhkO0ntvWXYn97GjvYYirhRW_N8nh0_G1hLJg-PiVdPRGazMj60-szxctFABPcCHfDObnygO0D5v1yr109Mwn4r_BfWtPXQdcEmMxKXz0VBQYDnUSKf0-2L-tH6WgVO1-p0fk7tUQOxemrCwsHwpVbcTTQxMBdhtQhp4RTYNw27YAoIqmXq_VSg%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f4163aa100e749a0900bb1bcc2427fbd&_e=zpyhmS-Ggsz6s18OPoEEvXHI7jDEhpeTSzAnI4EIfDJt4YRNy2VHolalDSnHdSJUKncAwHSKuI4xQj1zriiAgnIyt2wDylL_TKv-LlJ7dIF9sCPNWkWXKAHCvfHMwycMheMrc4AYHF6GQmaAbe3th3a1z8yJ8lBidNLhUt4-RYsaQ9W61NgMEI78kdQD-eKPV80ZFyoD0ItaOp815Y7_tN5JFuFmJzZNhkO0ntvWXYl-OTq0NX7JCKdIAVyycasNnzrW8ZtgC6CB4vKdUBIgLDhsVg9B0a1Vlq2XlH-Yx797eZdrTUoVvgsqElIJIFaG4KJ-HQc3ll7ClMa4DBEXmSLF9cuVCNKtKMUOs2WxDANgQddskRMdtsR37jl8Otpr_6rr4C3YitzMReA26b6N4A%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f4163aa100e749a0900bb1bcc2427fbd&_e=zpyhmS-Ggsz6s18OPoEEvXHI7jDEhpeTSzAnI4EIfDJt4YRNy2VHolalDSnHdSJUKncAwHSKuI4xQj1zriiAgnIyt2wDylL_TKv-LlJ7dIF9sCPNWkWXKAHCvfHMwycMheMrc4AYHF6GQmaAbe3th3a1z8yJ8lBidNLhUt4-RYsaQ9W61NgMEI78kdQD-eKPV80ZFyoD0ItaOp815Y7_tN5JFuFmJzZNhkO0ntvWXYl3Xynd7utoySV-6pF7hs7tUJVYnXPuXFo6dPnan9u1rlzHEhrFqaEMX8bklnqwCBMv3voNHq5Sd4w05p7wVP9QpKZvwmbOwTR96KNHjA3BkKoIyR2LLyXIjRRAa7yY5sjXXeZW-gCqdlYxk3WUiB53mVSiBWDTfMhvMEDWToJ7EQ%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f4163aa100e749a0900bb1bcc2427fbd&_e=zpyhmS-Ggsz6s18OPoEEvXHI7jDEhpeTSzAnI4EIfDJt4YRNy2VHolalDSnHdSJUKncAwHSKuI4xQj1zriiAgnIyt2wDylL_TKv-LlJ7dIF9sCPNWkWXKAHCvfHMwycMheMrc4AYHF6GQmaAbe3th3a1z8yJ8lBidNLhUt4-RYsaQ9W61NgMEI78kdQD-eKPV80ZFyoD0ItaOp815Y7_tN5JFuFmJzZNhkO0ntvWXYkLTyeQMikmBwK9VIo_-0cIG0UrPBZwjgUWTDYbJ3Y33hG6t2IKEEGIowyAwFqYoV7aHpCbVyJQ8RaJGnMuF6RQPDJVaPMpLB9-r6_nR6KDNK1VQyopGfYGeFTWhfsK_c_XssSajEeuBF9M4Yjp5X8tIyJjHmUAEfq-BRvVegzQrQ%3D%3D)_**

clean_body: When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

| | Dear Fellow American,

As we begin to rebuild our country next year after four years of leftist tyranny, we just completed The Heritage Foundation's key strategic goals for the next four years.

We aim to:
* Dismantle the administrative state and reestablish a constitutional republic.
* Defeat globalism and defend America's interests at home and abroad.
* Take back and build American institutions.
* Restore the family.
* Promote opportunity for all.

**I 'd love to get your thoughts on these goals. So my team put together this brief survey on this strategy that you can complete at the link below. **

[**https://secured.heritage.org/thf-end-of-year-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=59962d3204b44ea8badfcbd1840406d3&_e=9kG10b7IsWExkILszkOspkJOiT8lRsXyOPlTZCboEk5Fl8KnHo9DzcOIp9qZLpKPskgKF27wvLureFfzhJLpPnFSmEF_-SB7B7pMtzA0a1hkObtK0K1FY_Lr1YlEWnBMD1wRDrzGrph8fnTRNIXduq3qzChvVHEbZ-ARThctkqkBQyXZjaUUyedP0mMQuB2OMwJ_jC0J6nx8bEulvFv04NRipuZmhUiAATEXHMDRN_xW2nYSF49dyyuzuBzYLHtUl87voAgPvNlLX_TZwkU2MP81NssnL3CLHuZs8swV7MEjxgLHKIGqlFDuqtCnxt7XtBn8epV26ZRO6BQoTR-Cki1cGTrqZzngiOtHVzzW1Kk%3D)

This survey should take just a few minutes and will help me understand your priorities as our work to save America continues.

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director of Membership

| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc126b01645046b782b835e52aef8c17&_e=HV8XEHTazRiZJ3KuyUgjFmIGZetQ-xjo_m46Fwtp03gBJCWuwr5bnwln2AesUn_rrBhBXPFWzzLGm-MzSsFirRqu8c3C7r6yptyRhc48pVbZLJ4RIRtTwPi-bUJs7vQMI0uywBxLKce1lwUnka0eEIj63cQGgerlpvyGCJ5lhxqreTNeaeOnW9CW7ZpZPwMeJbBMOBkd2eLjQKwaJi5d75tvBGa3EKm2i__2qhNfzvysnsDqO9mUysnOu6DKWa1CwPWxwwk5our-1Qvea4W6oicErEU9uPDPZDqXeubt6fC_wHQJgtEnm08xus2o9lMZqLFz7tHFPLpdevd7S0AQEErQuPNacot_X9F0qgmMTHGmOEVax6tSArxPy2mWbwMhLbLyGd2CUjpIID2GvngfBg%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Friend, Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters. To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol. The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens. In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life. You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of A Christmas Carol today. Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations. Best regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Invitation and Announcement
body:
(As promised, this is 1 of 2 last emails before end of 2024)

| | | | **Peter,**
As _promised_ , this is one of two of my last emails before I sign off for 2024.
There are two things going on next week that you will want to be on the lookout for...
**First...**
I'd like to cordially invite you to our **Merry MAGA Christmas Party & Benefit** next **Thursday, December 12** , at an 80's themed restaurant in Houston called **Hungry Like the Wolf**.
The dress code is casual. Details are in the flyer below. If you can't see the flyer, you can [click here for details](https://jamesonellis.acemlna.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE4UqLMDKF8yQxMUeBt2H6kk_Ugle02XHXLUneg7pN__ky.zeNr3Y2jit-~jvYxYHPE).
**Second...**
Next week I will be making a LIVE announcement on Friday afternoon on Facebook LIVE at 3:00 PM about the future of our movement and role for the cause of liberty.
**ProTip:** If you come to our Merry MAGA Christmas Party & Benefit the night before, you'll have the opportunity to get the inside scoop before everyone else.
Thank you for being part of this journey.
_For Liberty,_ Jameson Ellis

name: NDRC Census Watch
subject: Trump’s plans to attack the census (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Once Trump’s back in power, extremists are planning again to attack the census for political gain.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98176693/515816399/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4ZmJmZDFjLThiYjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VFA78SloKDagg3hATIkPO7Ne-sgp8bSnrWq7pFpNn40=&emci=793e03ca-abb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=e8fbfd1c-8bb2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, it’s hard to overstate how important the census is to our democracy. Since 1790, the United States has been gathering census data to decide how many seats in Congress each state should receive, not to mention how much representation each state has in the Electoral College. It’s no wonder, then, that some Republicans have cynically tried to use this powerful tool to restrict access to the ballot. Before the last census, our movement successfully blocked Trump from adding an unconstitutional and racist citizenship question. **With Trump returning to power, we need to be prepared to beat back these attacks again.[Add your name to say loudly and clearly that we won’t stand for attacks on the 2030 Census.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98176694/515816400/1686231441?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusAttacks_email_20241204-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241204-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks_&utm_campaign=CensusAttacks&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4ZmJmZDFjLThiYjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VFA78SloKDagg3hATIkPO7Ne-sgp8bSnrWq7pFpNn40=&emci=793e03ca-abb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=e8fbfd1c-8bb2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98176695/515816401/1686231441?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusAttacks_email_20241204-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241204-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks_&utm_campaign=CensusAttacks&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4ZmJmZDFjLThiYjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VFA78SloKDagg3hATIkPO7Ne-sgp8bSnrWq7pFpNn40=&emci=793e03ca-abb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=e8fbfd1c-8bb2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---
This blatant power grab was struck down by the Supreme Court the last time Trump tried to manipulate the census, but we know they are already planning to try again once he’s back in power. In fact, they wrote down all their unconstitutional and power-hungry plans for the public to read about.
**The authors of Project 2025** proposed adding a citizenship question to the census, leading to a deliberate undercounting of populations with high rates of immigrants. Not only that, but these extremists plan to appoint political officials to decide who does or doesn’t get counted in the next census, instead of impartial, nonpartisan actors.
**Peter, we cannot stand by as Trump and other extremists attack the census. Our democracy requires that we ensure everyone is fairly represented — and that’s why the NDRC is fighting back once again to protect the census.**

clean_body: Once Trump’s back in power, extremists are planning again to attack the census for political gain. | Peter, it’s hard to overstate how important the census is to our democracy. Since 1790, the United States has been gathering census data to decide how many seats in Congress each state should receive, not to mention how much representation each state has in the Electoral College. It’s no wonder, then, that some Republicans have cynically tried to use this powerful tool to restrict access to the ballot. Before the last census, our movement successfully blocked Trump from adding an unconstitutional and racist citizenship question. With Trump returning to power, we need to be prepared to beat back these attacks again. | This blatant power grab was struck down by the Supreme Court the last time Trump tried to manipulate the census, but we know they are already planning to try again once he’s back in power. In fact, they wrote down all their unconstitutional and power-hungry plans for the public to read about. The authors of Project 2025 proposed adding a citizenship question to the census, leading to a deliberate undercounting of populations with high rates of immigrants. Not only that, but these extremists plan to appoint political officials to decide who does or doesn’t get counted in the next census, instead of impartial, nonpartisan actors. Peter, we cannot stand by as Trump and other extremists attack the census. Our democracy requires that we ensure everyone is fairly represented — and that’s why the NDRC is fighting back once again to protect the census. Thank you for voicing your support for our democracy. We can’t do this work without you behind us. # [Why Did Men Wear Powdered Wigs in the Past?](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snzpli&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snzpli&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snzpli&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n the 17th and 18th centuries, everyday items we take for granted today were status symbols among the European elite, including pineapples, mirrors, and, yes, wigs. While wigs have a long history in ancient societies, they were popularized as an upper-class fashion accessory during King Louis XIV’s reign in France — for a surprising reason.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0815f8f74a3d42e2a83bc61699f12cf9&_e=yZlCClnJB8vl7CyiTv7qVyTZQ4IyJpFnvgSidU7Bd9rMjb3xEy1Igh-6zLtLfe_3tyiGMu30TMHHr87x4AXoetyxieAD5v0_7VeEWNtPjuHi61IUZIyidfnPI4Zt1_SvVRi_F7zTYCGgd-TYMWwI0EtffFqLLpAjuwlxEk99MsMpUQG0XtzIwHLk87_Z-yRzaRBYXI3-G8SPvwSIq6hWWyEI4D8HwA0Vj9pZSXIiRUnj_Rqbqce6qBf2IqJTDjRKKfe479llwNV3SBEOcQ7MlitqO6WJj7Hwtk4i1TyClcfkpFLjpoMOU-Egwkq3Xb4EY9A8_vM-zYQ9YRlbBhyOfYwwZ_5EchzVv3fE7mpHGbo6hkGkYmTetsymIjKNxSvCNw1NU2xRZ_vFR3kBgeo12w%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0815f8f74a3d42e2a83bc61699f12cf9&_e=yZlCClnJB8vl7CyiTv7qVyTZQ4IyJpFnvgSidU7Bd9rMjb3xEy1Igh-6zLtLfe_3tyiGMu30TMHHr87x4AXoetyxieAD5v0_7VeEWNtPjuHi61IUZIyidfnPI4Zt1_SvVRi_F7zTYCGgd-TYMWwI0EtffFqLLpAjuwlxEk99MsMpUQG0XtzIwHLk87_Z-yRzaRBYXI3-G8SPvwSIq6hWWyEI4D8HwA0Vj9pZSXIiRUnj_Rqbqce6qBf2IqJTDjRKvYxr32iJi3pZs49GZfK1wLfyCWRDhUOZae-0VKoafKaby2uptUe9NEiKNpYlHsBYYntIlHEnwWq5HiVwcxS7b-dbR-6FpC7mrdRKM5adM7Fmvhu6s84KkjhgyDCZG4OUtXXleVUTLgeM03qRCyX4gA%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0815f8f74a3d42e2a83bc61699f12cf9&_e=yZlCClnJB8vl7CyiTv7qVyTZQ4IyJpFnvgSidU7Bd9rMjb3xEy1Igh-6zLtLfe_3tyiGMu30TMHHr87x4AXoetyxieAD5v0_7VeEWNtPjuHi61IUZIyidfnPI4Zt1_SvVRi_F7zTYCGgd-TYMWwI0EtffFqLLpAjuwlxEk99MsMpUQG0XtzIwHLk87_Z-yRzaRBYXI3-G8SPvwSIq6hWWyEI4D8HwA0Vj9pZSXIiRUnj_Rqbqce6qBf2IqJTDjRKI1IMARqKdKypL4gB7p0bDM87dniX6O-ONPVxBllnieauAI9zk1wm_sgkbuEo5n4NV3bGaATLtx3VW1D8vr8VdPotDCnOqoRry2OtZiSwKwOt62798chR3yhYLWJESYNyZPrXKmb7BRP9UGLgst7psg%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0815f8f74a3d42e2a83bc61699f12cf9&_e=yZlCClnJB8vl7CyiTv7qVyTZQ4IyJpFnvgSidU7Bd9rMjb3xEy1Igh-6zLtLfe_3tyiGMu30TMHHr87x4AXoetyxieAD5v0_7VeEWNtPjuHi61IUZIyidfnPI4Zt1_SvVRi_F7zTYCGgd-TYMWwI0EtffFqLLpAjuwlxEk99MsMpUQG0XtzIwHLk87_Z-yRzaRBYXI3-G8SPvwSIq6hWWyEI4D8HwA0Vj9pZSXIiRUnj_Rqbqce6qBf2IqJTDjRKEheq0yv7xeqAgymjpVZXeoNf97ytBfUntFasFwagUe_LGrTF6WPTF7QzUBFMzUF9fQ6aiTw_seOaofDeplbq2ezzEuyrh89a_N11-2TPvMQPXtPPxaCVzHgyj98O7hcZikmCGPWNoPanLKIKDMZmEQ%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0815f8f74a3d42e2a83bc61699f12cf9&_e=yZlCClnJB8vl7CyiTv7qVyTZQ4IyJpFnvgSidU7Bd9rMjb3xEy1Igh-6zLtLfe_3tyiGMu30TMHHr87x4AXoetyxieAD5v0_7VeEWNtPjuHi61IUZIyidfnPI4Zt1_SvVRi_F7zTYCGgd-TYMWwI0EtffFqLLpAjuwlxEk99MsMpUQG0XtzIwHLk87_Z-yRzaRBYXI3-G8SPvwSIq6hWWyEI4D8HwA0Vj9pZSXIiRUnj_Rqbqce6qBf2IqJTDjRKwgnh7W1V0ruHXSX_2k-7ZslUmhZMvjrcDJ2aUR2mG04MDPhH9SgIvFmZ0pAJQcwx1gOs1DKydU3VEUVQ9AKSs5ytUWh3gvHYAXaHpTpk2xcIOMeODe7VFKQpUkvinWy8SBSWiNd0Co_7MrGHm4mzgQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0815f8f74a3d42e2a83bc61699f12cf9&_e=yZlCClnJB8vl7CyiTv7qVyTZQ4IyJpFnvgSidU7Bd9rMjb3xEy1Igh-6zLtLfe_3tyiGMu30TMHHr87x4AXoetyxieAD5v0_7VeEWNtPjuHi61IUZIyidfnPI4Zt1_SvVRi_F7zTYCGgd-TYMWwI0EtffFqLLpAjuwlxEk99MsMpUQG0XtzIwHLk87_Z-yRzaRBYXI3-G8SPvwSIq6hWWyEI4D8HwA0Vj9pZSXIiRUnj_Rqbqce6qBf2IqJTDjRK5JmpqTrFXoXwhJO5vWa0Q6B6Gh4q4LAHPM0Krq-X1j7Hbblgpok7hDcTs55PI7Oy_JzLsnoyj_0phiiJ85VZ0NilFmVJSPCd4Oxn3yVVWm06BXyZJw3KqHxF6tW9PBDP_Er4p72aKh0AHKhZ8x7ASw%3D%3D)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0815f8f74a3d42e2a83bc61699f12cf9&_e=yZlCClnJB8vl7CyiTv7qVyTZQ4IyJpFnvgSidU7Bd9rMjb3xEy1Igh-6zLtLfe_3tyiGMu30TMHHr87x4AXoetyxieAD5v0_7VeEWNtPjuHi61IUZIyidfnPI4Zt1_SvVRi_F7zTYCGgd-TYMWwI0EtffFqLLpAjuwlxEk99MsMpUQG0XtzIwHLk87_Z-yRzaRBYXI3-G8SPvwSIq6hWWyEI4D8HwA0Vj9pZSXIiRUnj_Rqbqce6qBf2IqJTDjRK5kZHxxSCIzRTphbwHdjliyDcpLNpLZhjb4Z9lROTOsEYfvAD9wii0hfeWsULuGePRk4eyJWWCjZMtqpXDpa8VoGXPsXDB1qYUeUhYM8M3FLP7Q_349b8pb98p6Vw_AKpJnMtTdFbXId_My2XmcZZcg%3D%3D)

body:
three things for you to know:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22596%2E4449941%2E7-DSxR)
---
| [__OUR ELECTIONS SHOULD NOT BE FOR SALE!__ CHIP IN $7 TO HELP US HIT OUR $10,000 GOAL TO END DARK MONEY »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57620?t=7&akid=22596%2E4449941%2E7-DSxR)
---
**ONE:** Elon Musk’s PAC spent $200 MILLION dollars in Dark Money to make sure Donald Trump made it to the White House.

**TWO:** And now that Trump won, Musk could have control over his companies’ government contracts and benefits – **_this is CORRUPTION, pure and simple._**

**THREE:** Our elections should NOT BE FOR SALE! The only way to stop corruption like this is to **STOP DARK MONEY!**
[**So we’re raising $10,000 toward our End _Citizens United_ Goal to fight back against the horrific influence of Dark Money. Can we count on your contribution?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57620?t=8&akid=22596%2E4449941%2E7-DSxR)

name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: Anti-America Radicals are trying to SABOTAGE President Trump and Republicans
body:
"I, {ADD YOUR NAME}, pledge my support for President Trump and his strong America First agenda."

| |
---
| | | Hi, Marsha Blackburn here.

I've worn a lot of hats over the years. I'm mom, grandmother, Senator, and now - I'm a Vice Chair for the National Republican Senatorial Committee for 2026. It's the honor of a lifetime to help lead Republicans to victory once again.

But there's one small hang-up.

**Chuck Schumer and his far-Left buddies are FUMING about losing their hold on power.** They can't believe we pulled off a trifecta, so they're charging ahead to sabotage our Conservative Senate Majority and President Trump's agenda before we even take power.

I won't let these anti-America Radicals get away with it... And I have a hunch you won't either.

Now, the Supreme Court is set in the Radical Left’s sights.

And among them, Justice Clarence Thomas has been singled out.

Because in the last four years, he has delivered some of the _**BIGGEST WINS**_ for Conservatives in _**HISTORY.**_

But most importantly...

He _**PROTECTED**_ President Trump from the **_DISGUSTING WITCH-HUNT_** that Joe Biden and the Radical Left attempted to carry out.

And the Radical Left is now doing _**ANYTHING**_ they can to _**REMOVE HIM**_ from the Supreme Court.

_**Their petition to _FORCE HIS RETIREMENT_ from the Supreme Court is now sitting at over _1.5 MILLION_ signatures... **_

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. #
Dear Friend,

Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood. This means that by the time you finish reading this email, another innocent life will be gone.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Planned Parenthood continues to receive taxpayer funding, effectively subsidizing the intentional killing of preborn children. Since 2000, nearly $10.7 billion of taxpayers' money has funded their life-ending work.

Contrast this with the nearly 3,000 Pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide dedicated to supporting expectant mothers. Planned Parenthood only operates about 600 facilities and primarily offers one service: abortion. Alarmingly, they perform 62 abortions for every prenatal care service they provide, and prenatal care services are down 80% since 2010.

As a pro-life individual, I know you don't want your hard-earned tax dollars to support an organization that prioritizes abortion.

That's why I'm urging you to join us to demand an end to this taxpayer-funded ongoing tragedy. A new Congress and president will be chosen this November, and they need to hear from us _now_ that America does NOT support funding Planned Parenthood.

Make your voice heard. Sign our petition before midnight to demand an end to this grave misuse of your taxes. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=308b9d7a1f734f7d8f22a1dbb83293ca&_e=FWJR_XkixS_yTkayj4_Ehag-Y6uATQnvfqJ3khyeD6FMcHRv4zr8LXZ6ukyhyDUIC-HJ0VyM5qAfRnUJ8nclv1HVT9NMHKMHmcc-gP2UdxIfc9rovJolBdf0bLX-C9_JlyL2kiFGuqncVQECxwhXHHohsJvos9T-7b1IZP2VFOMgmxnxJaDFAmhKOiqJznbkjS6NSw0du8JwOpCEl1DoTJi4t5hSqEhxVHCrJNPZfbeTBuh9KjpwkSVEnDerrnUGR78n1z7MBCrUnOnvERLqrHCcG7Y7IFXdPEArDSFxys3eDzl-4cagnHWFB6Dde_COw4LKlScajJ0yyQlrFpC_bn34Ojpy0dctTcDVqPedOERQL-SRIZJRJXRtsVRZ3grIH3OBJ1ShGhhcGJfz9QZHCg%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing with us for the protection of future generations!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=308b9d7a1f734f7d8f22a1dbb83293ca&_e=FWJR_XkixS_yTkayj4_Ehag-Y6uATQnvfqJ3khyeD6FMcHRv4zr8LXZ6ukyhyDUIC-HJ0VyM5qAfRnUJ8nclv1HVT9NMHKMHmcc-gP2UdxIfc9rovJolBdf0bLX-C9_JlyL2kiFGuqncVQECxwhXHHohsJvos9T-7b1IZP2VFOMgmxnxJaDFAmhKOiqJznbkjS6NSw0du8JwOpCEl1DoTJi4t5hSqEhxVHCrJNPZfbeuzkPVjYvsnLZUfZXQory-HXwYvMXVw_H6YG8e7nn8KYYnepCClK-7rADrsuaIryFx3vBPKUqyOZ4GDYnRQ3JfNl5eIZlfs6CNiWzqnCRuaMChEiArucMQCU6gt45vlHBBvpCVXwtmL8SK9fA8JgBohoA_XL0ST8WvzFdDiUFaFg%3D%3D)

|
---
I’m a black kid from Brooklyn who wholeheartedly supports President Trump.
The radical-left can drag my good name through the mud all day long. I’ll never buy into their America-hating agenda.
This is MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I’ve been a Day 1 supporter of President Trump because our movement isn’t bound by race, religion or creed, it’s our love for America that makes us stronger than anything the radical-left claims to be.
**Sadly - it’s THEIR race-baiting agenda that’s holding our country back from greatness.**
But here’s the current state of things - even though we won the election, the Fake News Media, Democrat Lawmakers, and the entire Woke Mob are still refusing to throw in the towel.
They’re spreading _dangerous lies_ that Trump and his cabinet members aren’t qualified, with some even suggesting that they don’t need to listen to Trump once he takes the oath.
Let me be clear - Inauguration Day may be two months away but we CANNOT afford to get comfortable - we have to remain resilient.
Whether it’s hostile media or on the House floor, I’ll be fighting these losers each & every day for MAGA, but I can only do it because of YOU.

clean_body: It’s more important than ever to fight for MAGA | | | | | I’m a black kid from Brooklyn who wholeheartedly supports President Trump. The radical-left can drag my good name through the mud all day long. I’ll never buy into their America-hating agenda. This is MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds. I’ve been a Day 1 supporter of President Trump because our movement isn’t bound by race, religion or creed, it’s our love for America that makes us stronger than anything the radical-left claims to be. Sadly - it’s THEIR race-baiting agenda that’s holding our country back from greatness. But here’s the current state of things - even though we won the election, the Fake News Media, Democrat Lawmakers, and the entire Woke Mob are still refusing to throw in the towel. They’re spreading dangerous lies that Trump and his cabinet members aren’t qualified, with some even suggesting that they don’t need to listen to Trump once he takes the oath. Let me be clear - Inauguration Day may be two months away but we CANNOT afford to get comfortable - we have to remain resilient. Whether it’s hostile media or on the House floor, I’ll be fighting these losers each & every day for MAGA, but I can only do it because of YOU. That’s how many grassroots Democrats have committed to defending our democracy against Republican voter suppression. 128,000 Democrats have taken a meaningful step to elect leaders who will protect abortion access in our statehouses. 128,000 Democrats have joined a movement larger than themselves to fight against Republican extremism. Grassroots supporters from every state in the country have donated to our movement to elect state Dems. But you still haven’t joined them. name: Kari Lake
subject: A Personal and Urgent Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.| | |

| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=01c3b1ca325044e1b58a587412b91ead&_e=_8Ze4CNTBSvqH5lqjYig0jVaX20LXH4D2qpOyqJYxsO4f5kouQaPAdZZCwEi8qcW_c8Awh9AYNLCkWgLfZ8qzw_yILUlE6H8QwQLXan5ZjljGuCjhwCaR9ZUKEWXsQ80HswNmOfPaubfrqB1mZ0fFwJZqWSy3wiKIBwyQWu8hTWDjNJ0HKuFBdLQP_bWKkQ965HBIC8OH7SAh7DeP4OQwsXNKdodIW0bXjaLxQKnX2SY55Qrdkzaf3qOUeFKjsXr6-2bAY9TFHgPjkWuNOPTAEpDxuSgrfdbd_plg5C_oM65NuLJTWyOQ6m8_kXQ0BAv1LEiJYTF-UaKVX9jr4Qv9NqzDNf2yilIlZ6k-YCUtc2qnlWyVZEaSCITWJ1wUP4rez9OHWU4nbaBP_JrrKASIqdzcGptoKuIIrYSk-jrPXQ%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=01c3b1ca325044e1b58a587412b91ead&_e=_8Ze4CNTBSvqH5lqjYig0jVaX20LXH4D2qpOyqJYxsO4f5kouQaPAdZZCwEi8qcW_c8Awh9AYNLCkWgLfZ8qzw_yILUlE6H8QwQLXan5ZjljGuCjhwCaR9ZUKEWXsQ80HswNmOfPaubfrqB1mZ0fFwJZqWSy3wiKIBwyQWu8hTWDjNJ0HKuFBdLQP_bWKkQ965HBIC8OH7SAh7DeP4OQwsXNKdodIW0bXjaLxQKnX2SY55Qrdkzaf3qOUeFKjsXrGOGAGIkIW-zuXJ--vHeIe51w20tF8er7XBSF2rWTFQtg0Qk1elHYXcQOKVgkb5M1toz_Zlf_v8iwjWqV_kO1Jwdd1BtvMcE03dG7fW9hy2czdd-yg5Xxhhr1KuJCV8pPMScu2g3KV2C15DHag8t6nXznmlvfn1alqgu04UOb0QE%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=01c3b1ca325044e1b58a587412b91ead&_e=_8Ze4CNTBSvqH5lqjYig0jVaX20LXH4D2qpOyqJYxsO4f5kouQaPAdZZCwEi8qcW_c8Awh9AYNLCkWgLfZ8qzw_yILUlE6H8QwQLXan5ZjljGuCjhwCaR9ZUKEWXsQ80HswNmOfPaubfrqB1mZ0fFwJZqWSy3wiKIBwyQWu8hTWDjNJ0HKuFBdLQP_bWKkQ965HBIC8OH7SAh7DeP4OQwsXNKdodIW0bXjaLxQKnX2SY55Qrdkzaf3qOUeFKjsXrXmWYALTpElOByYnQPMO7Fj7tzFjSCp2Yw4PAlzABafAp9F8_By3B8D82l9PyJT0RH7_qUI2MtSV_j-ptqpqebUxH7X5HNPmUfihTVwXfD4gyetxw14J_kmuqhQUZSqXrC5mGw3Z0PrwSDam-tpg0wLKRV0IyTKbWpabrT9yQ4m4%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=01c3b1ca325044e1b58a587412b91ead&_e=_8Ze4CNTBSvqH5lqjYig0jVaX20LXH4D2qpOyqJYxsO4f5kouQaPAdZZCwEi8qcW_c8Awh9AYNLCkWgLfZ8qzw_yILUlE6H8QwQLXan5ZjljGuCjhwCaR9ZUKEWXsQ80HswNmOfPaubfrqB1mZ0fFwJZqWSy3wiKIBwyQWu8hTWDjNJ0HKuFBdLQP_bWKkQ965HBIC8OH7SAh7DeP4OQwsXNKdodIW0bXjaLxQKnX2SY55Qrdkzaf3qOUeFKjsXrP-mIkxs42fZHNiVyMe9J9M56DwJBJDO_AYW2hXXBYWtbr7o9az799LR6HRx4nXQuuBdZyjkCeOMvGRhP_sjwFAdshZU7KpR7q-cFl5UpUjiEDDyhqysH0Gqt8hHHnmy-gmtmJszJb6p_jAPD6r5lLHGTNwGjKvFbtfvShXb4YxU%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

| | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=01c3b1ca325044e1b58a587412b91ead&_e=_8Ze4CNTBSvqH5lqjYig0jVaX20LXH4D2qpOyqJYxsO4f5kouQaPAdZZCwEi8qcW_c8Awh9AYNLCkWgLfZ8qzw_yILUlE6H8QwQLXan5ZjljGuCjhwCaR9ZUKEWXsQ80HswNmOfPaubfrqB1mZ0fFwJZqWSy3wiKIBwyQWu8hTWDjNJ0HKuFBdLQP_bWKkQ965HBIC8OH7SAh7DeP4OQwsXNKdodIW0bXjaLxQKnX2SY55Qrdkzaf3qOUeFKjsXrvY5Hm8mJdUtkFmoHCbxdULR8iEUHLJtCoEB-jI_vY7M57BVXCa6Ow3La7C31-zldfeam4NxI72ALx_h0cJuCgRKrdvq27Y3IYMtHD4cMdo8yRg5BywfUyupUOWExR8qR7ADu8k8cLGGho4Hd57loVMji1JGe32WsuLMdNFGd2M0%3D)**

So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, then they know nothing about me.And they know nothing about you , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy. Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTn2ZRmDrByGZuoZ3OyPERNh1jQCLvJ09OhDiozyHDSunMWHNHcle4XbTuH5m7Z_ZtDddsk88wsDtfULtEVjyKZmf9u6y5uVeBUQ06j8SDrQ3rAJXwMyWTgPkFcnvOIVTvHHUlUDMDr-SHo-lexb6pnY5-umZeM2Ri9BiQf-Xg3GGfLHp_I3z9vedEARjlxJDBA0Gn2fXE7ECfKiDJIrf0QmS6QiUgTWxV6cqFmLsDe0y7gJ4aZQR3FkS3W-0EomySnWmux40aAE7XfB08ru_0S3Ru2fDPohX3nMjzLoWu-3zihyPUmrtG5Qsf9xVPv0YahuWvlVA_TTB-5J36K9Cp9w/4c0/fG8TQ8JDRYu3LmNKDA7bHg/h3/h001.ggFFcF25gs3MQ_ecOUt3NzB86MU_I14WV2mS-cUjmOQ)
---
* We reelected Senator Jacky Rosen by a margin over 24,000 votes.
* One of just four battleground states where Democrats reelected every incumbent U.S. House seat.

[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTn2ZRmDrByGZuoZ3OyPERNh1jQCLvJ09OhDiozyHDSunMWHNHcle4XbTuH5m7Z_ZtDddsk88wsDtfULtEVjyKZnTIcsyKWIqKrhTXEc0DhBhIHO3uUyxljLDl1UZ_NEactUSuCl3dOADnowe-oghBLbgzCNONDgwCom2BX1jYKXWZ9DdiQ5pAEUXX7KrpAgl6bvwqISZ96QYQnbsut04-LJ2W72wFYZsCVzEyfaHsRbaHztmVUqdQYx06qqwVBZrnzaRMz0MHH9_SZDHPXQIPXq3Xt3-k6Q5faz8ZP1VVBA7Q5P8SWvc3izY5bRwTZ6biE1OBaISPJUImStmphYC2mw/4c0/fG8TQ8JDRYu3LmNKDA7bHg/h4/h001.HjxfJH4pJ2yiFJ0_hIugLSaip0jQzS24OHrRt1VzCDk)

* Recruited more than 34,000 volunteers.
* Knocked more than 2.5 million doors.
* Made more than 25.5 million calls.
* Sent nearly 8.5 million text messages.
* Opened 14 field offices statewide in key communities, including offices in the heart of Latino, Black, AAPI and Indigenous communities.
* Offered a 24/7 voter assistance hotline to answer voters’ questions in English and Spanish.
* Ran a large-scale ballot cure program curing over 11,200 ballots.

[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTn2ZRmDrByGZuoZ3OyPERNh1jQCLvJ09OhDiozyHDSunMWHNHcle4XbTuH5m7Z_ZtDddsk88wsDtfULtEVjyKZqgZRiiiupq_lozSJz6Ii41z0cWxzEMS3u10WbH69gm9SE2OWvms_yciWT2hoAYxZMRGAFkqCzbtOh0XgMnnejDrDpabdP-z2vyRoEEE6ZaAVUahKgimSvFoLdMr3QrHEHz8-9IyWrV61SqP9eTC6s2OEpokzjT__D6XEklDhe8ubVwPlpRgaZIq6Hn41f5nduENMkHvSB4zXugSrL7uXHf0p2WgJz2dXeq4YpdV1wikFSg8v6Nc7sXzJMaAvTZ72Q/4c0/fG8TQ8JDRYu3LmNKDA7bHg/h5/h001.fZ8hnEi0rTvo20cmLmDgrZTLHk4jhLuWhD-wUDuLmsE)

* We are laser-focused on the 2025 legislative session: introducing policies to support NV families and holding Republicans accountable if they enable Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda.
* The governorship _and_ formalizing abortion rights into the state constitution will be up to the voters in 2026.

clean_body: | | | | A recap of your battleground Nevada election activity. We led the charge transitioning from a party-run caucus to a state-run primary to expand ballot access. Broke 2008 turnout records for Democrat’s first primary with over 134,000 participants. Just one seat shy of a supermajority in the NV State Senate and Assembly. We reelected Senator Jacky Rosen by a margin over 24,000 votes. One of just four battleground states where Democrats reelected every incumbent U.S. House seat. Recruited more than 34,000 volunteers. Knocked more than 2.5 million doors. Made more than 25.5 million calls. Sent nearly 8.5 million text messages. Opened 14 field offices statewide in key communities, including offices in the heart of Latino, Black, AAPI and Indigenous communities. Offered a 24/7 voter assistance hotline to answer voters’ questions in English and Spanish. Ran a large-scale ballot cure program curing over 11,200 ballots. We are laser-focused on the 2025 legislative session: introducing policies to support NV families and holding Republicans accountable if they enable Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda. The governorship and formalizing abortion rights into the state constitution will be up to the voters in 2026. The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
