name: Care in Action
subject: Take urgent action today to protect health care 🚨
body:
Republicans are threatening to cut health care.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98177411/515818930/664783965?ms=120424_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTk2ZWExNy05MWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBa-o0s6CSNBB9F9ZspRo-73qaGaeoqWmpn9jra3uDo=&emci=b9ddcbf3-a4b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8e96ea17-91b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
On January 20th, Donald Trump and his administration will take office, and their disregard for health care will have wide-reaching consequences. The President-elect has nominated TV show personality Dr. Mehmet Oz to head the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS), and Republicans **are already proposing cuts to health care to give tax breaks to big corporations and the ultra‐wealthy.**
More than 1 in 5 Americans are covered by Medicaid and CHIP (Children’s Health Insurance Program), the primary comprehensive health care programs funded by the federal government. These programs ensure that all Americans, regardless of income, **have access to the basic right of health care.**
Simply put, cutting these programs would be devastating for millions of Americans.
[**_Take a moment now to contact your representatives and demand they protect Medicaid and expand health care access:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98177412/515818931/-1323163894?ms=120424_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTk2ZWExNy05MWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBa-o0s6CSNBB9F9ZspRo-73qaGaeoqWmpn9jra3uDo=&emci=b9ddcbf3-a4b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8e96ea17-91b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
[CONTACT YOUR REPRESENTATIVES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98177413/515818932/-1323163894?ms=120424_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTk2ZWExNy05MWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBa-o0s6CSNBB9F9ZspRo-73qaGaeoqWmpn9jra3uDo=&emci=b9ddcbf3-a4b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8e96ea17-91b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
We need affordable health care to ensure all Americans have access to the care they deserve. These proposed cuts to Medicaid would take away millions of Americans’ access to health care, and put that money in the pockets of corporations instead.
**Medicare provides health care to over 67 million elderly and disabled Americans— and it’s on the chopping block too. **Restricting Medicare access would be severely detrimental for caregivers who rely on Medicare or Medicaid for their own health care and for the families they care for.
[**_Can you take a minute to contact your representatives and demand they protect Medicaid, a vital lifeline for millions of caregivers and families who need care?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98177414/515818933/-1323163894?ms=120424_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTk2ZWExNy05MWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBa-o0s6CSNBB9F9ZspRo-73qaGaeoqWmpn9jra3uDo=&emci=b9ddcbf3-a4b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8e96ea17-91b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
[CONTACT YOUR REPRESENTATIVES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98177415/515818934/-1323163894?ms=120424_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTk2ZWExNy05MWIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBa-o0s6CSNBB9F9ZspRo-73qaGaeoqWmpn9jra3uDo=&emci=b9ddcbf3-a4b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=8e96ea17-91b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
Thank you for taking action,

Care in Action

name: Royce White for Senate
subject: I’m sharing my announcement with you FIRST
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I'm getting a head start NOW
|
---
Peter,

I have an important announcement, and you're the first person I'm reaching out to with it.

**I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota again, this time to take down Radical Leftist Tina Smith! [**Can you chip in to give me the head start I need?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b49293039a048c593a7e630dbba2f04&_e=5Vcfj1BZ01zUySoDOQPa01RCN1ADsTvoI0TOY7IU76zOiF4qS-oMVdwy6dDVhxVb8Jco-t9R8M8sRW-wWLQiJmknKTztyZlMf5ROWMw2el5qFAErQCMgVgrXJ672NiuAKTVUQvVDDstpEX3gjqyVnbKjh1AjxmaS2OlHxMRHwQqhpHAPCpYA_6ui0HiN7UemF3y1MT2VuJUiWSNiD4TjjqsZKo_xBYQ600KQGgPPHybUCtGVsARsBMfXPEtr21diZzMrIUlhVOCcsA1zLBuLt3RPk8dzoGirMJ6OLQuINckRpnSIoInCG6hCvWiP_LA9okxkrSrNW5kljF0LoJJW3Q%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b49293039a048c593a7e630dbba2f04&_e=5Vcfj1BZ01zUySoDOQPa01RCN1ADsTvoI0TOY7IU76zOiF4qS-oMVdwy6dDVhxVb8Jco-t9R8M8sRW-wWLQiJmknKTztyZlMf5ROWMw2el5qFAErQCMgVgrXJ672NiuAKTVUQvVDDstpEX3gjqyVnbKjh1AjxmaS2OlHxMRHwQqhpHAPCpYA_6ui0HiN7Uem9y3TSgcfJmc5kWTEcWxHiTFMtD__bwaAQOBwEsThGM0Zzb9hoFVJO-jyd0xCEvopdvTjanHU6r9EeIRwaExMq4Dfxk3lLBQf949EcNz6-J6PhaKjen5KkJhQ2LSv-xwLSKnPHnF7DCtP_8I2GzGNjQ%3D%3D)
Now that I have two political campaigns under my belt, I understand what it takes to win. It's not easy for a Free-Thinking Black Republican to win in Minnesota. The Democrats control the media, schools, election integrity, and the areas with the most voter turnout.

_They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles._

For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters.

**This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat Tina Smith and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans.**

__The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose.

__[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b49293039a048c593a7e630dbba2f04&_e=5Vcfj1BZ01zUySoDOQPa01RCN1ADsTvoI0TOY7IU76zOiF4qS-oMVdwy6dDVhxVb8Jco-t9R8M8sRW-wWLQiJmknKTztyZlMf5ROWMw2el5qFAErQCMgVgrXJ672NiuAKTVUQvVDDstpEX3gjqyVnbKjh1AjxmaS2OlHxMRHwQqhpHAPCpYA_6ui0HiN7UemdiUYu7_-aAnFx6syfwIUqm79iG-YhlBsMn6y3msZPED7G-A10kDgbRHFmuHCjZJswqmhKbfg7pRaN41jSZxp3wzScSeHVt8C7tx7b6RJuYokVMVDz7jCOCfLRlqHHCVO8xxSKqzXEkKHVtkhomSwpw%3D%3D)_
But I 'm warmed up now, and I'm ready to DUNK on the Radical Left once and for all._

**In the 2024 election, we gained 8 points of the 24 that we needed. No one outside of our movement expected my campaign to be competitive, yet I got 1.3 MILLION VOTES with ZERO HELP!**

[**THIS IS WHY I NEED TO START NOW! I 'M RELYING ON YOU TO CHIP IN AND GIVE ME THE HEAD START THAT I NEED TO WIN!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b49293039a048c593a7e630dbba2f04&_e=5Vcfj1BZ01zUySoDOQPa01RCN1ADsTvoI0TOY7IU76zOiF4qS-oMVdwy6dDVhxVb8Jco-t9R8M8sRW-wWLQiJmknKTztyZlMf5ROWMw2el5qFAErQCMgVgrXJ672NiuAKTVUQvVDDstpEX3gjqyVnbKjh1AjxmaS2OlHxMRHwQqhpHAPCpYA_6ui0HiN7UemOtBrqNT_2jXJRWubQy4-tM6RnVyHcaQ7ihdJDD9Grk77qGoaGDROK4ANs8N3zQIlx_PlJ1_BcHO8KFYUy_2_mMlB_JIDpuSWpkiTr6gP0ptq_fdXojdm8lpfm2wht82X7zbiFQ9N0EKCygJob-ijXQ%3D%3D)

Tina Smith has spent every waking moment since she was elected in 2018 building a massive war chest, preparing for her re-election in 2026. I need your help by midnight to start amassing the resources to defeat her.

[**Peter, I 'm humbly asking you to donate just $10 before midnight to defeat a Radical Leftist who's been anti-Trump since the beginning.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b49293039a048c593a7e630dbba2f04&_e=5Vcfj1BZ01zUySoDOQPa01RCN1ADsTvoI0TOY7IU76zOiF4qS-oMVdwy6dDVhxVb8Jco-t9R8M8sRW-wWLQiJmknKTztyZlMf5ROWMw2el5qFAErQCMgVgrXJ672NiuAKTVUQvVDDstpEX3gjqyVnbKjh1AjxmaS2OlHxMRHwQqhpHAPCpYA_6ui0HiN7Uem07c36DBNLPdyXJNDRzEs0jOLTYh08NeT4irwrrZ2P5hExE4oqrylN9fDEmIxqs7LKdDPJVXXkXMZiewn4H9YX4bjdWJkZ7cXgIaVMVWOUH18SCjXQ_CjHUidwV_-5ipPkuks3O3OqV0WzFl6QE04vQ%3D%3D)

Here's to our Head Start,
Royce White for Senate

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b49293039a048c593a7e630dbba2f04&_e=5Vcfj1BZ01zUySoDOQPa01RCN1ADsTvoI0TOY7IU76zOiF4qS-oMVdwy6dDVhxVb8Jco-t9R8M8sRW-wWLQiJmknKTztyZlMf5ROWMw2el5qFAErQCMgVgrXJ672NiuAKTVUQvVDDstpEX3gjqyVnbKjh1AjxmaS2OlHxMRHwQqhpHAPCpYA_6ui0HiN7Uemt0tqfETLgtEkH3283WTWoNTMxhVGzhVebJqOS6dQzTCv4psAkTx16KSloMjdvw0FVj7bUcdHbNiwTZIDjstJOWW3i1TkEaHmAYXeeDF3wmHK3e6NVB-jyIkP92V0SYkqXk-orhOyibRkhn9HznH2aA%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is working tirelessly to FLIP Minnesota Red and give President Trump the MAGA reinforcements he needs. Can you help him by clicking the button below?

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b49293039a048c593a7e630dbba2f04&_e=5Vcfj1BZ01zUySoDOQPa01RCN1ADsTvoI0TOY7IU76zOiF4qS-oMVdwy6dDVhxVb8Jco-t9R8M8sRW-wWLQiJmknKTztyZlMf5ROWMw2el5qFAErQCMgVgrXJ672NiuAKTVUQvVDDstpEX3gjqyVnbKjh1AjxmaS2OlHxMRHwQqhpHAPCpYA_6ui0HiN7UemKwkgLP9M46R4-luwnas6IfubU72D3Xr11rhO7U-YOLheN1ojGxdP1ajsO_CZUfFDwJNl193WiS33otEWR_cpn6DnxBkico4DjvNtE0v8l2ik7gDsYbWbv8NJS5Ul08WqNdmvMD-3Lzdxqpt52QcB6A%3D%3D)

They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles. For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters. This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat Tina Smith and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans. The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose. But I 'm warmed up now, and I'm ready to DUNK on the Radical Left once and for all. In the 2024 election, we gained 8 points of the 24 that we needed. No one outside of our movement expected my campaign to be competitive, yet I got 1.3 MILLION VOTES with ZERO HELP! Tina Smith has spent every waking moment since she was elected in 2018 building a massive war chest, preparing for her re-election in 2026. I need your help by midnight to start amassing the resources to defeat her. Here's to our Head Start, Royce White for Senate | Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is working tirelessly to FLIP Minnesota Red and give President Trump the MAGA reinforcements he needs. Can you help him by clicking the button below? PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2024 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98177596/515819453/126959580?refcode=WTEFHX06_20241204_RiggsSplit_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODZmZDQ3OS05MmIyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhq6I8BxDGu0oD5p5ZKXFUnVlnTTQqic8542vqZpkX4=) Hi Peter,

I'm writing with good news and bad news.

The good news: A smooth and transparent recount process has confirmed pro-choice **Justice Allison Riggs** ' Supreme Court WIN in North Carolina!

The bad news: Instead of conceding, Justice Riggs' extremist anti-choice opponent is challenging more than 60,000 legitimate ballots, many of them cast by veterans and active-duty members of the military.

Let's make one thing VERY clear: **Recounts are a normal part of the process in a close race, but Riggs' anti-choice opponent is attempting to sidestep the will of the voters and engineer a new outcome after having his loss confirmed.**

That's why I'm coming to you, Peter. name: Powered By People
subject: Sycophants and billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Did you see what Ted Cruz just said about Trump’s cabinet picks so far?
> "I think the entire slate of Cabinet nominees President Trump has put forward is very strong." -Ted Cruz
Trump is stacking his cabinet with sycophants and billionaires—a staggering eight of his nominees so far are billionaires like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy who are completely out of touch with the daily struggles millions of Americans are facing.
Ted Cruz doesn’t care about Texans who are working hard to make ends meet, he only cares about furthering his own political future by praising Trump.
We believe that every person who works 40 hours per week should be able to live with dignity. Beto and Powered by People are committed to fighting for the future of Texas and our country.
[**Will you help us continue the fight for the future of Texas by chipping in any amount today?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241204.Wm5aom&refcode=ema20241204-239907&t=1&akid=239907%2E444211%2EPtMS6S)

name: Tobias Read
subject: SURVEY: Where do you stand on Vote By Mail?
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98177745/515820243/-569431239?refcode=241204em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkMmQ3YS05M2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KYeyGx-_0JkHK7tPACj1ZAn24Nte0pI2u2vk3uB42c=)

| | Hi folks, it’s Oregon Secretary of State-elect Tobias Read. Did you know that MAGA Republicans in Oregon have _already_ launched an effort to repeal Vote by Mail in our state? I ran and won on this issue because Vote by Mail is safe, secure, and democratic. Those who want to dismantle it are trying to tip the scales on future elections because they know they can’t win on their own merit. But as your next Secretary of State — the person tasked with overseeing elections in Oregon — I want to hear from you: **[Do you agree that we should expand voting rights and preserve Vote By Mail? Or do you stand with the MAGA-inspired initiative to restrict it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98177746/515820244/-1463078012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkMmQ3YS05M2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KYeyGx-_0JkHK7tPACj1ZAn24Nte0pI2u2vk3uB42c=&emci=37f1938d-57b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=bb6d2d7a-93b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30662126)**
---
[**I SUPPORT VOTE BY MAIL**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98177747/515820245/-1463078012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkMmQ3YS05M2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KYeyGx-_0JkHK7tPACj1ZAn24Nte0pI2u2vk3uB42c=&emci=37f1938d-57b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=bb6d2d7a-93b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30662126)
---
[**I WANT TO RESTRICT IT**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98177754/515820246/-1463078012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkMmQ3YS05M2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KYeyGx-_0JkHK7tPACj1ZAn24Nte0pI2u2vk3uB42c=&emci=37f1938d-57b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=bb6d2d7a-93b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30662126)
---
As Oregon’s Secretary of State,**I will fight to defend the voting rights of every single person in Oregon, whether they voted for me or not. That’s what my job is, and that’s what democracy means.** **Your support is crucial in strengthening our collective voice against those who seek to restrict democracy.[Please, let us know where you stand today. Your voice matters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98177762/515820261/-1463078012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkMmQ3YS05M2IyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_KYeyGx-_0JkHK7tPACj1ZAn24Nte0pI2u2vk3uB42c=&emci=37f1938d-57b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=bb6d2d7a-93b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30662126)** Thanks for your support, Tobias Read

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Life in prison for saving a cop’s life
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9fda9b1cd09b4007a7faae41e9c12d16&_e=fRmwSU1Lled4kll2o_vJqfBzu5npPnsWZfBdNbfFvyHOMIwi03_3DnilDLrn7F2nvo0h3SkOSsob-W1iwxttzFerus4jVoOUoNfRabax6OO-TgCtvFspNq1vVWkFZiQV0gHQ9c08LJjkiPRrYlRn3A7qO8o_xWu4pvqADakliIaFmjVWAzGp_0rKyqbjc_a8VOd4nhWIpQdh0aBYo4vM7c1TgsF3DGi66KDzqCxwg0DK6PDJnceuh3v25HYAtPUkCjYd8frJfoQIj9wJIxRi9RPo4b9LBLl37C3zb34vodW_z40mLGPB6E044csnzXH5wAc8Ttcozfufi51caBsDC9iKPHKp5zjdKOgbWYNfo4L62tSIMOrWzg8PBXGDm6DLaTR7LfH7uAv1ZZb7b2yYDw%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9fda9b1cd09b4007a7faae41e9c12d16&_e=fRmwSU1Lled4kll2o_vJqfBzu5npPnsWZfBdNbfFvyHOMIwi03_3DnilDLrn7F2nvo0h3SkOSsob-W1iwxttzFerus4jVoOUoNfRabax6OO-TgCtvFspNq1vVWkFZiQV0gHQ9c08LJjkiPRrYlRn3A7qO8o_xWu4pvqADakliIaFmjVWAzGp_0rKyqbjc_a8VOd4nhWIpQdh0aBYo4vM7c1TgsF3DGi66KDzqCxwg0BwdkRz_fQAchFLi-VWxQnQtK93xhrfG0ojTIJ_xl_58Zh8vByXd_99KVkabL8Mq1HGfcKidS_C0M5IP0L-eBM9SATyuohlidgp3mMjgsulMbr9UTit5WMe6IfwCW7BDYqjl8fRi4ONjUMlqenz25YnPuCoEpsr4DJmTf9Dbx06gw%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9fda9b1cd09b4007a7faae41e9c12d16&_e=fRmwSU1Lled4kll2o_vJqfBzu5npPnsWZfBdNbfFvyHOMIwi03_3DnilDLrn7F2nvo0h3SkOSsob-W1iwxttzFerus4jVoOUoNfRabax6OO-TgCtvFspNq1vVWkFZiQV0gHQ9c08LJjkiPRrYlRn3A7qO8o_xWu4pvqADakliIaFmjVWAzGp_0rKyqbjc_a8VOd4nhWIpQdh0aBYo4vM7c1TgsF3DGi66KDzqCxwg0CNfmiTONF0oSmORzMWa3T7gKTeIvQeMt7Vqgo3LA5mK3g8FfwrCkgXrAAm-o-zAloRVo6W0IkmEP4Pi0_nh4CJf4zd5EaNkR2HikDeVdHXWw8eZJDWMMAVlwV2UfkDSU-mHI9M0C7eJ0YIk4fsoEAm1IIXEKRfteYDqIotIT9eRA%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9fda9b1cd09b4007a7faae41e9c12d16&_e=fRmwSU1Lled4kll2o_vJqfBzu5npPnsWZfBdNbfFvyHOMIwi03_3DnilDLrn7F2nvo0h3SkOSsob-W1iwxttzFerus4jVoOUoNfRabax6OO-TgCtvFspNq1vVWkFZiQV0gHQ9c08LJjkiPRrYlRn3A7qO8o_xWu4pvqADakliIaFmjVWAzGp_0rKyqbjc_a8VOd4nhWIpQdh0aBYo4vM7c1TgsF3DGi66KDzqCxwg0AUAt54ARKaIkLR1b1GL0MoGJolhMySscQNFlkYkp5c5J-pnUsQKsNMjvwJqb8Otfs5PGGAs0j60PXU-fFBv-yz9xSb_LMDXatYTKQy140AnDZl-X8fJOKCtSjEVGh4u-pt6aYN6SGkFV0nkpCGx8oG_DHcUgCDXyUYfIpvWQu9FA%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9fda9b1cd09b4007a7faae41e9c12d16&_e=fRmwSU1Lled4kll2o_vJqfBzu5npPnsWZfBdNbfFvyHOMIwi03_3DnilDLrn7F2nvo0h3SkOSsob-W1iwxttzFerus4jVoOUoNfRabax6OO-TgCtvFspNq1vVWkFZiQV0gHQ9c08LJjkiPRrYlRn3A7qO8o_xWu4pvqADakliIaFmjVWAzGp_0rKyqbjc_a8VOd4nhWIpQdh0aBYo4vM7c1TgsF3DGi66KDzqCxwg0DPHTTF1G5Kt6m3P-H00RU19UAHawuTZeY7LvA2vQseEEVOvAy2y_AVMSaxET-6jYCrt2air50LN0DtLKHu9bJG2QQV_v5O-mq0AIbh9Xj5hvx2uyB-6y0IukZC1_WjulLWlssIBcS9yqaW2aFhyZQmGiTIlQB7CYZBQHiFt4Ixgg%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9fda9b1cd09b4007a7faae41e9c12d16&_e=fRmwSU1Lled4kll2o_vJqfBzu5npPnsWZfBdNbfFvyHOMIwi03_3DnilDLrn7F2nvo0h3SkOSsob-W1iwxttzFerus4jVoOUoNfRabax6OO-TgCtvFspNq1vVWkFZiQV0gHQ9c08LJjkiPRrYlRn3A7qO8o_xWu4pvqADakliIaFmjVWAzGp_0rKyqbjc_a8VOd4nhWIpQdh0aBYo4vM7c1TgsF3DGi66KDzqCxwg0B9eQBfI5x8TsYR5PgDm7PcYEmpFSIYlBaB7SFTBTsbWwullaADhKmDQKO8jrwsee_QXcn8DwE3GfxSL4qbx8LbYuvScacZd0SVAdaiumdlBw42SGT9CYv1bGN1BQ_K3w04mIr0gn7IjG_0puhm8ukv1HviJ7si_fxzvg5iDOGskw%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9fda9b1cd09b4007a7faae41e9c12d16&_e=fRmwSU1Lled4kll2o_vJqfBzu5npPnsWZfBdNbfFvyHOMIwi03_3DnilDLrn7F2nvo0h3SkOSsob-W1iwxttzFerus4jVoOUoNfRabax6OO-TgCtvFspNq1vVWkFZiQV0gHQ9c08LJjkiPRrYlRn3A7qO8o_xWu4pvqADakliIaFmjVWAzGp_0rKyqbjc_a8VOd4nhWIpQdh0aBYo4vM7c1TgsF3DGi66KDzqCxwg0Dmsg3XfWLxxckuXC-iM04JOLzR_DayEJvsMp9sn-5NBsgieJtQYe69rFiKANaOa4WJ1iQeDElGHrJ3UTLIMdRHJbHPduJmokTTT5CdFyHX5IGCaJwGmQv_JBfEkv1e9pkLVUmSSwJCm_2ZK2xDtvcPnazAAQHKEWD3aSxUiUzD5w%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

subject: Destruction is not the way forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Educated
body:
| | | [](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=59651fabfb5d4a03a00e440da4d088ae&_e=vxosaJ6sug4ob4SfrgtS2NLb5rzuxrd8GPZf4aXYKH3rz7Z2Sz2iEdgQWc6IoP8hoF-tXk4yjAM3HMgqlgWoAJzL3TVIYwMZpoKiDAQwzH-jpgsD_BjioEAkorixpf8qgOQu4Mrj8_dCteIZn5IHBpb_LRmeCyAcwXFnEGiGjdB0oEgo0aRjJpGwggy2_XBDXthTxYEEVzPbNmH0-trqq0RcFotizRhln0_QVcT-a7bD4uIE6lUQRgzMSlgdHJlhoQL3dcIk_LWTdA0tv_OnKQyOYxjH3hHMOjMvwc2O63iMMEFRLpk_qkX3V4zsBdsjCZcKjYi2XIGgLVqbz3SosDf3W2-Nh6JMPUThqUbXKXNa_4ybNk9HA1XCQFiD1Ff2188AzGcfMlFnLt87k6spVboSM1Sr8_f2lRvnTobkbZ1_ZyOkpREN3wS5VHNzM2k4) Peter, **Donald Trump has made it clear his intentions to dismantle the Department of Education. And now he’s tapped Linda McMahon to help him do it.** But the Department of Education was created by Congress, and only Congress has the power to truly undo it. But now Congress is controlled by Trump’s MAGA Party by a very slim margin, especially in the House of Representatives. **[We must make our voices heard that the American people want to protect public education in this country. So we need 5,000 supporters to sign our petition immediately urging Congress to continue funding the Department of Education. Sign your name now →](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=59651fabfb5d4a03a00e440da4d088ae&_e=vxosaJ6sug4ob4SfrgtS2DE7kFQGqMVK1GCl7eA6KOuSe_IlJKtzNdE-gm-PEf6ToXwJJt-txHR-8GzJw-7wKOfagoMNL2bEoCJn7bfmZxy6rCgepCu3twTWN7YEa9Skk3_bqhrWT7smGezL0nbjzi6y931EinS9PsxnWZovYLNOxdiap_aw5qbpUUOgMfJNgqJqwkq3L8ISIyqk3uogf6Ey00fEcFLG7Wc_bnOO7aSRvCWPKCxOtPcJqIuDQQYH)** [SIGN NOW→](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=59651fabfb5d4a03a00e440da4d088ae&_e=vxosaJ6sug4ob4SfrgtS2DE7kFQGqMVK1GCl7eA6KOuSe_IlJKtzNdE-gm-PEf6ToXwJJt-txHR-8GzJw-7wKDKwIQfxqH6KC_0iwGZYjhhy-_5vVUObtJ1ny2Grtnl6krAzznYEp3DY5QMT0OqlcnJE0XP1I4yZpeD0achn9wGuJwL1bZogjdNqzGK9PFt7mTcfIu2VV400VE-RTo9M0eUDY7mGPxPj6GHALTTYSAbhAzajkdY0OiTHOnJWumJj) We get it. Americans' faith in our institutions is at an all-time low. But the solution is not to destroy the institutions that help the country run. It is to elect good folks who will reform them so that they can operate the way they were meant to. Trump ran on a message of making the country great again and leaving the details up to your imagination. But the truth is, he will follow Project 2025’s guide to utterly dismantling the government, including the **Department of Education.** **[Destruction will not improve anyone’s lives, and we must ensure Congress hears us loud and clear. So Sign your name and join us in the chorus:](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=59651fabfb5d4a03a00e440da4d088ae&_e=vxosaJ6sug4ob4SfrgtS2DE7kFQGqMVK1GCl7eA6KOuSe_IlJKtzNdE-gm-PEf6ToXwJJt-txHR-8GzJw-7wKDZFMMS2z8Evkn7M5Yx6UdU4G8nAXGjiU1NuU-GtkVWZaXmrIjWVA5aPaSmdgeytElGRtmoHBCDdT__XkKO_sK9GiSeYxcF0GcbUIUMnPdwvDjor_M-tWzP2zd0e4OIx76BYIPZg4eer8lz0wZsj187PRRUJeQzsqVl0ucwhDJV2)** [SIGN NOW→](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=59651fabfb5d4a03a00e440da4d088ae&_e=vxosaJ6sug4ob4SfrgtS2DE7kFQGqMVK1GCl7eA6KOuSe_IlJKtzNdE-gm-PEf6ToXwJJt-txHR-8GzJw-7wKAj-NEG2D8oi_UWOeZPWQnMvtW9GPEGziwt4IAUnZp-cQBq5F666TeF6CBrTsLCOXCGnKFOTvetKQc0rxu_o3uwF9Nz2gmSxNBRTl3eMa6nMtx2EDUF30kPSa6VExvfiFrktG5JF4I1ehDfvt1KaqWtoixtJ1v3b96ksZ9_jJexe) Thank you, Educated We Stand **** **** Paid for by Educated. name: David Hogg
subject: My Christmas wish 🎄
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need more of the bold action Leaders-endorsed candidates are known for.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241204-1&t=1&akid=1495%2E587540%2Eo0ci3w)
Peter,
**This Christmas all I want is a Democratic Party that focuses on building housing, public transit, and high speed rail.**
We need to cut red tape and incentivize building, and ban corporations from buying up homes. We call this a housing crisis. It’s time to start acting like it.
Right now, Leaders We Deserve is vetting young progressive candidates who are ready to run for office in 2025 and 2026 and help to ensure we’re addressing these critical issues that are impacting young people – and _everyone_ for that matter.
**We need bold action – and that’s what Leaders-endorsed candidates are known for, Peter.**
Just look at Sarah McBride, who passed paid family and medical leave in Delaware at the state level before becoming the first trans member of Congress.
Or look at Oscar De Los Santos, who blocked Arizona’s draconian anti-abortion law resurrected from the 1800s (literally). When I called him to let him know we would endorse him he couldn’t pick up and texted me “sorry I can’t talk rn repealing the abortion ban from 1864.” Now he is the minority leader.
**Young people get sh*t done.** We need more of us in elected office to tackle urgent issues like the housing crisis. And together, we are making it happen.
**[Peter, can you make my Christmas wish come true with a $5 contribution to help Leaders We Deserve elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241204-1?refcode=em20241204-1495&amount=5&refcode2=1495_587540_o0ci3w&akid=1495%2E587540%2Eo0ci3w)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241204-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241204-1495&refcode2=1495_587540_o0ci3w&akid=1495%2E587540%2Eo0ci3w)**
Thank you!!!
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241204-1&t=2&refcode2=1495_587540_o0ci3w&akid=1495%2E587540%2Eo0ci3w)**

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98178067/515821044/793841832?contactdata=nn1SEnamCiIrhZruZ3PoVh0a5W6T5nboyPw5t9BHk27U80yACHP4YSMhYWMxrCuQqHPZYYJlBLPevvjo7tjg+6bwB9lxATITh7hsbXs7NiNf925yJ8//uaKkZ4/Piy4BlIv8jWaWcP5d4m7gQMF9jfFBwIo0+tvyULE7j5B7ry8=&ms=GT24_EM8_Img&sourceid=1166159&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmNzY0YTAyLTk0YjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Q6kssWOkmqzFxSdcVDwiQysdWpNvGmyB2-nQqXcMnw=&emci=4c8a0d37-deac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=7f764a02-94b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1504551)
Dear Peter,
I’ll be the first to say it: it has been a busy week. I know your inbox has probably been packed full of emails from all kinds of organizations asking for your help on Giving Tuesday—including us.
**So, let me say a simple and heartfelt thank you. Thank you for putting Save the Redwoods League at the top of your list and making our Giving TREESday campaign a success!**
Thanks to the generosity of 947 members, we exceeded our goal! $101,539 will go toward purchasing and protecting 1,600+ acres of land along the iconic Sonoma Coast. Those wonderful gifts will be matched putting us one step closer to conserving the **[Sonoma Coast Redwoods](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98178068/515821045/-651014446?sourceid=1166159&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmNzY0YTAyLTk0YjItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Q6kssWOkmqzFxSdcVDwiQysdWpNvGmyB2-nQqXcMnw=&emci=4c8a0d37-deac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=7f764a02-94b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1504551)** , now and forever.
I cannot say enough how critical this acquisition project is. Protecting this forest is so important for the future of our environment. Climate and fire resilience, expanded recreation opportunities, biodiverse habitat—the benefits go on and on.
**You have my utmost gratitude for your support. Thank you for being a part of our community and for being a true friend to the redwoods!**
Sincerely,
| Sam Hodder
President and CEO
---|---

clean_body: A special Giving TREESday thank you🌲 Dear Peter, I’ll be the first to say it: it has been a busy week. I know your inbox has probably been packed full of emails from all kinds of organizations asking for your help on Giving Tuesday—including us. So, let me say a simple and heartfelt thank you. Thank you for putting Save the Redwoods League at the top of your list and making our Giving TREESday campaign a success! Thanks to the generosity of 947 members, we exceeded our goal! $101,539 will go toward purchasing and protecting 1,600+ acres of land along the iconic Sonoma Coast. Those wonderful gifts will be matched putting us one step closer to conserving the , now and forever. I cannot say enough how critical this acquisition project is. Protecting this forest is so important for the future of our environment. Climate and fire resilience, expanded recreation opportunities, biodiverse habitat—the benefits go on and on. You have my utmost gratitude for your support. Thank you for being a part of our community and for being a true friend to the redwoods! Sincerely, | Sam Hodder President and CEO ---|--- * | | | | ---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | |

name: David Horowitz
subject: Internal Revenue Service Notice
body:
It's the only way to bring a reckoning to an Administration that has done everything in its power to destroy this country.| | | Just like they did under Obama, the IRS has become a tool of the radical Left to attack and destroy conservatives.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed15c72bb07c472d81c69cc4d89fdd1c&_e=f0EtcqjTL_ETziKijctocwWDqFI2bSSiW1LhzphriJl_osOn523klxJ0DgmEW5XJ9Kt9xO5qFtYmJ-cnTR4IDYvsHrsHOMPBjp7PbMKlh-Ayf_xClc-5-v3PmV7zQJfPQ4Uozo6lxAwRyhzZu1KM5qwbu0aGeyfsV_xLFLFgK4Hdq0xr_Fp0vI1gF6I7w2m_pUxYm2ltphjN95TjQoQ37W93nbxbK99IzLAE49P5BQ60tPjjDQG9TRAcdkKMB0bsPa4GCEvtJnQN41X7j3ynwvRaz-NTKYs8JE-N_PVrhhoUBv5FhFAETModR9oDLjbU62zo9Zo72QJgX6Gp6vmwEFGH1Nz6K65FVFmNGQXmUni8tnendCW94kbM89Q35kM2hcnMfuCtg9iU70a2LIZMRCd7sDsBtjr017otbfJv0M0cB56PaVeJB_VB11ln11MS)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, If you agree it’s time, we make the IRS panic over their attacks on conservatives than I’m asking you to join me today. The radical Biden-Harris IRS is out of control, and it's up to us to fight back. At the David Horowitz Freedom Center, we're taking on the IRS head-on and pushing Congress to give them the audit they deserve. We're calling on Congress and the incoming administration to launch a formal investigation into the radicalism plaguing the IRS, and we need your help.** ****[**Will you join me and help us turn the table on the IRS?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed15c72bb07c472d81c69cc4d89fdd1c&_e=f0EtcqjTL_ETziKijctocwWDqFI2bSSiW1LhzphriJl_osOn523klxJ0DgmEW5XJ9Kt9xO5qFtYmJ-cnTR4IDYvsHrsHOMPBjp7PbMKlh-Ayf_xClc-5-v3PmV7zQJfPQ4Uozo6lxAwRyhzZu1KM5qwbu0aGeyfsV_xLFLFgK4Hdq0xr_Fp0vI1gF6I7w2m_pUxYm2ltphjN95TjQoQ37W93nbxbK99IzLAE49P5BQ60tPjjDQG9TRAcdkKMB0bsPa4GCEvtJnQN41X7j3ynwt7GgBUEm54EO0uzXVp630ArSHUzQ5g6Gfujh1yjV_9sDTqUIjBtsPutKUwnOeWdsM1eZkVwjMK0AlbTah_DhKyuBeTqBz58ruUjWt5F1z4EsocdHizFwNsVLdgVlXp4ScKOiz8zuOz6yMsaMbpYeVW6cSHZndFCN39HC18ev0W2)** Just like they did under Obama, the IRS has become a tool of the radical Left to attack and destroy conservatives. The only way to stop them is to drag these crooked bureaucrats in front of Congress, make them answer to their crimes, and finally hold them accountable for destroying conservatives' lives. Congress can stop them or at least tie their hands until we can clean house. But we need to apply pressure to get Congress to act. It's the only way to bring a reckoning to an Administration that has done everything in its power to destroy this country. In front of the public, these crooks must be asked the hard questions you and I both know they don't have answers to...
---
| |
* Why did you give "Black Lives Matter" tax-exempt status after they burned our cities and funneled millions of dollars to political campaigns?
* Why did you allow a United Nations "non-profit" to pay Hamas terrorists who were part of the horrific Oct. 7th attack?
* Why did you unleash an army of IRS agents after middle-class American conservatives while letting Washington, D.C. elites get a free pass to commit tax fraud and get rich?

---
With the IRS, you're Guilty until proven Innocent. We should hold them to the same standard they hold us. I know this is how they treat innocent Americans because they've spent years trying to financially destroy my non-profit - the David Horowitz Freedom Center. It all started a few years ago with what we thought was a simple IRS audit. Then it spiraled into $600,000 in legal fees, longtime business partners abandoning us, and threats to shut our entire organization down. You may be asking: Why is the IRS trying to shut you down? It's simple: we're EXPOSING the radical Left. And we're good at it, too. Here's what the Freedom Center does that's so threatening to the IRS:
---
* We publish best-selling books, pamphlets, and articles exposing the Socialist Left's battle plans.
* We extensively cover the truth about Islamic extremism and the erasure of God from our public institutions.
* We engage college students and expose (with the goal of firing) radical university staff members.
* We work with elected officials to stop liberal indoctrination in K-12 schools.

---
It's no wonder we're such a big threat to them. We stand for everything they HATE: freedom, liberty, prosperity, and conservative Judeo-Christian values. And most importantly, we stand for AMERICA when they want to DESTROY her. **[**Will you stand with me and help turn the tables on the IRS through a donation of $35, $50, $100, or more today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed15c72bb07c472d81c69cc4d89fdd1c&_e=f0EtcqjTL_ETziKijctocwWDqFI2bSSiW1LhzphriJl_osOn523klxJ0DgmEW5XJ9Kt9xO5qFtYmJ-cnTR4IDYvsHrsHOMPBjp7PbMKlh-Ayf_xClc-5-v3PmV7zQJfPQ4Uozo6lxAwRyhzZu1KM5qwbu0aGeyfsV_xLFLFgK4Hdq0xr_Fp0vI1gF6I7w2m_pUxYm2ltphjN95TjQoQ37W93nbxbK99IzLAE49P5BQ60tPjjDQG9TRAcdkKMB0bsPa4GCEvtJnQN41X7j3ynwvlzy9btZOz6JMrOBWmym0qiHbKD4bgBdh1es4fMncLTGUUdV2gqMEj12trLNz5hBkBWrWLFHeURctwrTDXAFvgVPH6T8HD-0mF6RI-IPrjirspgwsBc4Nz5RdtJ-r8Off5vXqTWsiP9Zo8O9rhOTzPlehG-Or56LfG_tHTvyvii)** My friend, the attacks we've faced have been terrible and unprecedented... They got MasterCard to shut off our credit card processing (thank God we got it turned back on now)... They got the local bank we've been with for years to suddenly close our accounts-which were all in good standing... They got the hotel where we've held our annual conference for the last 20 years to abruptly pull our contract... And they got Big Tech giants-like Google, Instagram, and Vimeo-to PERMANENTLY BAN us from using their services. The Left is desperate to do anything and everything it takes to shut down the Freedom Center. And sadly, many of their attacks have worked. Our shoestring budget is stretched thin. The IRS has unlimited money and can bleed us dry, forcing us into bankruptcy. Yet, we are not giving up. **[**Can I count on you to hang in this fight with us?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed15c72bb07c472d81c69cc4d89fdd1c&_e=f0EtcqjTL_ETziKijctocwWDqFI2bSSiW1LhzphriJl_osOn523klxJ0DgmEW5XJ9Kt9xO5qFtYmJ-cnTR4IDYvsHrsHOMPBjp7PbMKlh-Ayf_xClc-5-v3PmV7zQJfPQ4Uozo6lxAwRyhzZu1KM5qwbu0aGeyfsV_xLFLFgK4Hdq0xr_Fp0vI1gF6I7w2m_pUxYm2ltphjN95TjQoQ37W93nbxbK99IzLAE49P5BQ60tPjjDQG9TRAcdkKMB0bsPa4GCEvtJnQN41X7j3ynwkylPN-2slTS9D6lMIAhAohfILdl8JctZvjkPH4d3WOd3mpG0xM6HrstbLaWrzLH5CaV8lOWZ0_md6KskY5LRVjNJt1aAJamXktgCN8O0osCLiiNF5i0sPGLEIkXstuTxOWbByAkjVVJ7WMQ1K7Ylm9NxO8Lnw_M-oRa8iCu1P97)** I'm not backing down because this is my life's mission. This may come as a surprise to you, but I was raised by Socialist parents. I was trained in the radical Left's tactics, and until 1980, I was a self-proclaimed Communist. I know the Left's playbook... because I helped write it. But the shiny allure of Marxism quickly revealed its true colors when I woke up to just how much damage our agenda was doing. And when the Black Panthers murdered my friend, I knew this ideology was truly evil. I cast my ballot for President Reagan, and I never looked back. In the decades since, I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center and have fought tirelessly to expose this radical ideology and wipe it out of our country. Today, with the attacks against us so severe, it's time to fight fire with fire. We are calling on Congress and the incoming administration to investigate the radical ideology that has overtaken the IRS, but we need your financial support to keep this fight going. It takes time, resources, and relentless effort to push back against a government agency with unlimited funding. But with your help, we can win. **[**Whether you can give $35, $50, $100, $250, or more-every dollar you contribute will help us stand up to the IRS and protect conservatives from their attacks.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed15c72bb07c472d81c69cc4d89fdd1c&_e=f0EtcqjTL_ETziKijctocwWDqFI2bSSiW1LhzphriJl_osOn523klxJ0DgmEW5XJ9Kt9xO5qFtYmJ-cnTR4IDYvsHrsHOMPBjp7PbMKlh-Ayf_xClc-5-v3PmV7zQJfPQ4Uozo6lxAwRyhzZu1KM5qwbu0aGeyfsV_xLFLFgK4Hdq0xr_Fp0vI1gF6I7w2m_pUxYm2ltphjN95TjQoQ37W93nbxbK99IzLAE49P5BQ60tPjjDQG9TRAcdkKMB0bsPa4GCEvtJnQN41X7j3ynwpAI_f8R4sEVoDjM-L-PZG3MutDX1URkF8ESk5DnPN0lpzGBwOQ2mEZ7WkAVbLxyv-Q7BWBB5nHKMygAfnsTIwtTn6SW3CmylomiNk4BvvshGwlT4iVvJRQ8vqUySTkVLWnbxK4IwAPTt8NIqHXWz1PTDDL_gh9Hyn4Prg-RDf-V)** And my friend, remember we are not just fighting back for us. We are fighting back so the next time the IRS thinks about going after an innocent conservative, they think twice. Thank you for standing with us and helping us take on the radical IRS.****
---
God Bless You,
---
---

clean_body: It's the only way to bring a reckoning to an Administration that has done everything in its power to destroy this country.| | | Just like they did under Obama, the IRS has become a tool of the radical Left to attack and destroy conservatives. | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, If you agree it’s time, we make the IRS panic over their attacks on conservatives than I’m asking you to join me today. The radical Biden-Harris IRS is out of control, and it's up to us to fight back. At the David Horowitz Freedom Center, we're taking on the IRS head-on and pushing Congress to give them the audit they deserve. We're calling on Congress and the incoming administration to launch a formal investigation into the radicalism plaguing the IRS, and we need your help. Just like they did under Obama, the IRS has become a tool of the radical Left to attack and destroy conservatives. The only way to stop them is to drag these crooked bureaucrats in front of Congress, make them answer to their crimes, and finally hold them accountable for destroying conservatives' lives. Congress can stop them or at least tie their hands until we can clean house. But we need to apply pressure to get Congress to act. It's the only way to bring a reckoning to an Administration that has done everything in its power to destroy this country. In front of the public, these crooks must be asked the hard questions you and I both know they don't have answers to... | | Why did you give "Black Lives Matter" tax-exempt status after they burned our cities and funneled millions of dollars to political campaigns? Why did you allow a United Nations "non-profit" to pay Hamas terrorists who were part of the horrific Oct. 7th attack? Why did you unleash an army of IRS agents after middle-class American conservatives while letting Washington, D.C. elites get a free pass to commit tax fraud and get rich? With the IRS, you're Guilty until proven Innocent. We should hold them to the same standard they hold us. I know this is how they treat innocent Americans because they've spent years trying to financially destroy my non-profit - the David Horowitz Freedom Center. It all started a few years ago with what we thought was a simple IRS audit. Then it spiraled into $600,000 in legal fees, longtime business partners abandoning us, and threats to shut our entire organization down. You may be asking: Why is the IRS trying to shut you down? It's simple: we're EXPOSING the radical Left. And we're good at it, too. Here's what the Freedom Center does that's so threatening to the IRS: We publish best-selling books, pamphlets, and articles exposing the Socialist Left's battle plans. We extensively cover the truth about Islamic extremism and the erasure of God from our public institutions. We engage college students and expose (with the goal of firing) radical university staff members. We work with elected officials to stop liberal indoctrination in K-12 schools. It's no wonder we're such a big threat to them. We stand for everything they HATE: freedom, liberty, prosperity, and conservative Judeo-Christian values. And most importantly, we stand for AMERICA when they want to DESTROY her. My friend, the attacks we've faced have been terrible and unprecedented... They got MasterCard to shut off our credit card processing (thank God we got it turned back on now)... They got the local bank we've been with for years to suddenly close our accounts-which were all in good standing... They got the hotel where we've held our annual conference for the last 20 years to abruptly pull our contract... And they got Big Tech giants-like Google, Instagram, and Vimeo-to PERMANENTLY BAN us from using their services. The Left is desperate to do anything and everything it takes to shut down the Freedom Center. And sadly, many of their attacks have worked. Our shoestring budget is stretched thin. The IRS has unlimited money and can bleed us dry, forcing us into bankruptcy. Yet, we are not giving up. I'm not backing down because this is my life's mission. This may come as a surprise to you, but I was raised by Socialist parents. I was trained in the radical Left's tactics, and until 1980, I was a self-proclaimed Communist. I know the Left's playbook... because I helped write it. But the shiny allure of Marxism quickly revealed its true colors when I woke up to just how much damage our agenda was doing. And when the Black Panthers murdered my friend, I knew this ideology was truly evil. I cast my ballot for President Reagan, and I never looked back. In the decades since, I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center and have fought tirelessly to expose this radical ideology and wipe it out of our country. Today, with the attacks against us so severe, it's time to fight fire with fire. We are calling on Congress and the incoming administration to investigate the radical ideology that has overtaken the IRS, but we need your financial support to keep this fight going. It takes time, resources, and relentless effort to push back against a government agency with unlimited funding. But with your help, we can win. And my friend, remember we are not just fighting back for us. We are fighting back so the next time the IRS thinks about going after an innocent conservative, they think twice. Thank you for standing with us and helping us take on the radical IRS. God Bless You, David Horowitz** | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

name: Rusty Hicks
subject: finally, some reflections…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Headshot of Rusty Hicks [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM_Rusty.png]Dear ,
With so many razor-close U.S. House races across California, I feel like I’ve barely had time to collect my thoughts about the 2024 Election and what comes next for us as a party and a country in 2025.
But here is what I know for sure: I am so grateful you are a part of our team.
To every volunteer who knocked, called, texted, or gave, we are here because of you and your hard work.
A very special thank you to everyone who has donated after November 5th in order to fund our operations to ensure every single eligible vote is counted in uncalled races. Without you, some of these narrow red-to-blue flips may have been lost.
Thank you for all you’ve done and all you will do to recover and rebuild what has been lost.
While we can be incredibly proud of what we've achieved here in California: flipping red seats to blue, strengthening our legislative majorities, setting a record for the number of women in the state legislature, and continuing our work to protect California's values, I know the result of the Presidential race is devastating.
As a result, many of us are feeling the pain and sadness of a tough loss. That’s okay.
But we must remember what Vice President Harris said: “We believe in the promise of America.” Like you, I am prepared to fight to ensure that promise is alive and well for all Americans for generations to come. Simply put, so many are counting on us in this challenging moment in our Nation’s history. We must not let them down.
And we’ve already kept up that fight this month through our ballot curing efforts. Now, we gear up for the long haul and prepare for all the work that is ahead.
Until then, get some well-deserved rest and get ready to get back into the fight. Because it will take all of us to protect all we hold dear and preserve the Democracy we love so much. And I know California Democrats will continue to lead the way!
Yours,
- Rusty
Chair of the California Democratic Party

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
